results.question: 现在整体出租率怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    -- 集中房源
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 1 THEN t.total_rooms ELSE 0 END) AS focus_total_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 1 THEN t.rented_rooms ELSE 0 END) AS focus_rented_rooms,
    -- 整租房源
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 2 THEN t.total_rooms ELSE 0 END) AS whole_total_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 2 THEN t.rented_rooms ELSE 0 END) AS whole_rented_rooms,
    -- 合租房源
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 3 THEN t.total_rooms ELSE 0 END) AS joint_total_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 3 THEN t.rented_rooms ELSE 0 END) AS joint_rented_rooms,
    -- 汇总
    SUM(t.total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
    SUM(t.rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms,
    ROUND(SUM(t.rented_rooms) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(t.total_rooms), 0), 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct
FROM (
    -- 集中房源房间
    SELECT
        1 AS business,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_freeze, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    -- 整租房源房间
    SELECT
        2 AS business,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_freeze, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    -- 合租房源房间
    SELECT
        3 AS business,
        COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_freeze, 0) = 0
) t;

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    t.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    'whole' AS 业务类型,
    wh.door_number AS 门牌号,
    ap.property_adrr AS 物业地址,
    wr.id AS 房间ID,
    wt.lease_price AS 月租金,
    wt.lease_starttime AS 租赁开始时间,
    wt.lease_endtime AS 租赁结束时间
FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.id = wt.room_id AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = wr.housing_id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN (SELECT id, tenants_name FROM qft_whole_tenants WHERE company_id = 1001) t ON t.id = wt.id
WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND wt.tenants_name = '张三'

UNION ALL

SELECT
    jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    'joint' AS 业务类型,
    jh.door_number AS 门牌号,
    ap.property_adrr AS 物业地址,
    jr.id AS 房间ID,
    jt.lease_price AS 月租金,
    jt.lease_starttime AS 租赁开始时间,
    jt.lease_endtime AS 租赁结束时间
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = jh.property_adrr AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND jt.tenants_name = '张三'

UNION ALL

SELECT
    ft.name AS 租客姓名,
    'focus' AS 业务类型,
    fr.room_number AS 门牌号,
    ap.property_adrr AS 物业地址,
    fr.id AS 房间ID,
    fti.lease_price AS 月租金,
    fti.lease_starttime AS 租赁开始时间,
    fti.lease_endtime AS 租赁结束时间
FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.id = ft.room_id AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = fh.property_adrr AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fti ON fti.tenant_id = ft.id AND fti.company_id = 1001
WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ft.name = '张三';

results.question: 翡翠城2栋2-1-101租出去了没？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    wh.door_number,
    wh.building,
    wh.unit_name,
    wr.is_lease,
    CASE wr.is_lease 
        WHEN 0 THEN '未租' 
        WHEN 1 THEN '已租' 
        WHEN 2 THEN '待转租' 
    END AS lease_status,
    wt.tenants_name,
    wt.lease_starttime,
    wt.lease_endtime
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt ON wt.room_id = wr.id AND wt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ap.property_adrr LIKE '%翡翠城%'
    AND wh.building LIKE '%2%'
    AND wh.unit_name LIKE '%2%'
    AND wh.door_number LIKE '%101%';

          WHERE fdo.company_id = 1001
            AND IFNULL(fdo.is_delete, 0) = 0
            AND fdo.is_sign = 1
      )
    UNION ALL

    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001

results.question: 下个月有哪些合租租客合同到期？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    jt.id AS 租客ID,
    jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    jt.phone AS 联系电话,
    jh.id AS 房源ID,
    jh.house_code AS 房源编号,
    jr.room_number AS 房间号,
    jt.lease_starttime AS 租赁开始时间,
    jt.lease_endtime AS 租赁到期时间,
    jt.lease_price AS 出房价格,
    jt.payment_method AS 缴费方式
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND jt.lease_endtime >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND jt.lease_endtime < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
ORDER BY jt.lease_endtime ASC;

results.question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    t.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    t.phone AS 联系电话,
    i.collection_date AS 应收日期,
    i.start_valid_date AS 账期开始,
    i.end_valid_date AS 账期结束,
    i.final_money AS 应收金额,
    i.real_money AS 已收金额,
    i.debt_money AS 欠款金额,
    CASE i.pay_status
        WHEN 1 THEN '未收'
        WHEN 2 THEN '部分收款'
        WHEN 3 THEN '已收完'
        WHEN 4 THEN '坏账'
    END AS 收款状态
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON t.id = i.tenants_id
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND t.company_id = 1001
  AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
  AND i.pay_status IN (1, 2)

UNION ALL

SELECT
    t.name AS 租客姓名,
    t.phone AS 联系电话,
    i.collection_date AS 应收日期,
    i.start_valid_date AS 账期开始,
    i.end_valid_date AS 账期结束,
    i.final_money AS 应收金额,
    i.real_money AS 已收金额,
    i.debt_money AS 欠款金额,
    CASE i.pay_status
        WHEN 1 THEN '未收'
        WHEN 2 THEN '部分收款'
        WHEN 3 THEN '已收完'
        WHEN 4 THEN '坏账'
    END AS 收款状态
FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_focus_tenants t ON t.id = i.tenants_id
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND t.company_id = 1001
  AND t.name = '张三'
  AND i.pay_status IN (1, 2)

UNION ALL

SELECT
    t.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    t.phone AS 联系电话,
    i.collection_date AS 应收日期,
    i.start_valid_date AS 账期开始,
    i.end_valid_date AS 账期结束,
    i.final_money AS 应收金额,
    i.real_money AS 已收金额,
    i.debt_money AS 欠款金额,
    CASE i.pay_status
        WHEN 1 THEN '未收'
        WHEN 2 THEN '部分收款'
        WHEN 3 THEN '已收完'
        WHEN 4 THEN '坏账'
    END AS 收款状态
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_whole_tenants t ON t.id = i.tenants_id
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND t.company_id = 1001
  AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
  AND i.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND i.business_type = 2

ORDER BY 应收日期;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS income_money,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS expend_money
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND account_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month ASC;

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN wh.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('w_', wh.id)
        WHEN jh.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('j_', jh.id)
        WHEN fh.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('f_', fh.id)
    END) AS 总房源数,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN wt.id IS NOT NULL AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0)=0 THEN CONCAT('wt_', wt.id)
        WHEN jt.id IS NOT NULL AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0)=0 THEN CONCAT('jt_', jt.id)
        WHEN ft.id IS NOT NULL AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0)=0 THEN CONCAT('ft_', ft.id)
    END) AS 已租房间数,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
            WHEN wt.id IS NOT NULL AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0)=0 THEN CONCAT('wt_', wt.id)
            WHEN jt.id IS NOT NULL AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0)=0 THEN CONCAT('jt_', jt.id)
            WHEN ft.id IS NOT NULL AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0)=0 THEN CONCAT('ft_', ft.id)
        END) * 100.0 /
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
            WHEN wr.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('wr_', wr.id)
            WHEN jr.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('jr_', jr.id)
            WHEN fr.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('fr_', fr.id)
        END), 0)
    , 2) AS 出租率百分比
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.property_adrr = ap.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt ON wt.room_id = wr.id AND wt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.housing_id = jh.id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.room_id = jr.id AND jt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.housing_id = fh.id AND fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft ON ft.room_id = fr.id AND ft.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
HAVING 总房源数 > 0
ORDER BY 出租率百分比 DESC;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.name AS 店面名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN fh.is_delete = 0 THEN fr.id 
        WHEN wh.is_delete = 0 THEN wr.id 
        WHEN jh.is_delete = 0 THEN jr.id 
    END) AS 总房间数,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
        WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 AND fh.is_delete = 0 THEN fr.id 
        WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 AND wh.is_delete = 0 THEN wr.id 
        WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 AND jh.is_delete = 0 THEN jr.id 
    END) AS 已租房间数,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
            WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 AND fh.is_delete = 0 THEN fr.id 
            WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 AND wh.is_delete = 0 THEN wr.id 
            WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 AND jh.is_delete = 0 THEN jr.id 
        END) * 100.0 /
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE 
            WHEN fh.is_delete = 0 THEN fr.id 
            WHEN wh.is_delete = 0 THEN wr.id 
            WHEN jh.is_delete = 0 THEN jr.id 
        END), 0), 2
    ) AS 出租率百分比
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.store_id = s.id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.housing_id = fh.id AND fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.store_id = s.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.store_id = s.id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.housing_id = jh.id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY 出租率百分比 DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 整租的账单近6个月收上来多少钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(f.money) AS total_collected_money
FROM qft_finance f
WHERE f.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND f.nature = 1
  AND f.source_type = 2
  AND f.housing_id IN (
      SELECT id FROM qft_whole_housing
      WHERE company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  )
  AND f.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH);

results.question: 成都三个门店的应收和实收分别是多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.name AS store_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN bi.trade_type = 1 THEN bi.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END) AS total_receivable,
    SUM(CASE WHEN bi.trade_type = 1 THEN bi.total_real_money ELSE 0 END) AS total_real_received
FROM qft_bill bi
JOIN qft_store s ON bi.store_id = s.id AND s.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_prov_city_area pca ON s.city_id = pca.id AND pca.name LIKE '%成都%'
WHERE bi.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(bi.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(bi.is_invalid, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY total_receivable DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 每个门店整租和合租各有多少套房源？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.name AS 门店名称,
    SUM(CASE WHEN wh.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 整租房源数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN jh.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 合租房源数
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing wh 
    ON wh.store_id = s.id 
    AND wh.company_id = 1001 
    AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh 
    ON jh.store_id = s.id 
    AND jh.company_id = 1001 
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY s.name;

results.question: 每个门店的维修单情况怎么样？哪个最多？

SELECT 
    s.name AS 门店名称,
    COUNT(r.id) AS 维修单总数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已完成数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 未完成数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.intersection = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 未交差数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.return_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 未回访数
FROM qft_store s

    ON s.id = r.store_id 
    AND r.company_id = 1001 
    AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY 维修单总数 DESC;

results.question: 整租的收房价和出房价差价多少？哪套赚得最多？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    wh.id AS housing_id,
    wh.house_code,
    wh.door_number,
    wh.joe_price AS 收房价,
    wt.lease_price AS 出房价,
    (wt.lease_price - wh.joe_price) AS 差价
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.housing_id = wh.id
    AND wr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt ON wt.room_id = wr.id
    AND wt.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND wh.joe_price IS NOT NULL
    AND wt.lease_price IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 差价 DESC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 智能电表的充值记录统计一下，谁充的最多？

results.question: 哪些合租租客有欠费？按欠费金额排个序。

results.question: 每个门店收了多少钱、付了多少钱？利润怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_expend,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0)
    - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS profit
FROM
    qft_store s
LEFT JOIN
    qft_finance f ON f.store_id = s.id AND f.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE
    s.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY
    s.id, s.name
ORDER BY
    profit DESC;

results.question: 总收入和总支出是多少？我们赚钱了还是亏钱了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS net_profit,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN '盈利'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) < 0 THEN '亏损'
        ELSE '持平'
    END AS profit_status
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND cashier = 1;

results.question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    '整租' AS 业务类型,
    COUNT(DISTINCT wh.id) AS 房源数量,
    COUNT(DISTINCT wr.id) AS 房间数量,
    -- 应收总额
    COALESCE(SUM(wti.final_money), 0) AS 应收总额,
    -- 实收总额
    COALESCE(SUM(wti.real_money), 0) AS 实收总额,
    -- 应支总额
    COALESCE(SUM(wbe.final_money), 0) AS 应支总额,
    -- 实支总额
    COALESCE(SUM(wbe.real_money), 0) AS 实支总额,
    -- 毛利润（实收-实支）
    COALESCE(SUM(wti.real_money), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(wbe.real_money), 0) AS 毛利润
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income wti ON wti.housing_id = wh.id AND wti.business_type = 2 AND wti.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wti.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND wti.is_deposit = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_bill_expend wbe ON wbe.housing_id = wh.id AND wbe.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wbe.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND wbe.is_deposit = 0
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

SELECT
    '合租' AS 业务类型,
    COUNT(DISTINCT jh.id) AS 房源数量,
    COUNT(DISTINCT jr.id) AS 房间数量,
    -- 应收总额
    COALESCE(SUM(jti.final_money), 0) AS 应收总额,
    -- 实收总额
    COALESCE(SUM(jti.real_money), 0) AS 实收总额,
    -- 应支总额
    COALESCE(SUM(jbe.final_money), 0) AS 应支总额,
    -- 实支总额
    COALESCE(SUM(jbe.real_money), 0) AS 实支总额,
    -- 毛利润（实收-实支）
    COALESCE(SUM(jti.real_money), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(jbe.real_money), 0) AS 毛利润
FROM qft_joint_housing jh
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.housing_id = jh.id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income jti ON jti.housing_id = jh.id AND jti.business_type = 3 AND jti.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND jti.is_deposit = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_bill_expend jbe ON jbe.housing_id = jh.id AND jbe.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jbe.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND jbe.is_deposit = 0
WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0;

results.question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,

    -- ==================== 出租率分析 ====================
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN fr.id END) AS focus_room_total,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN fr.id END) AS focus_room_rented,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN wr.id END) AS whole_room_total,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN wr.id END) AS whole_room_rented,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN jr.id END) AS joint_room_total,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN jr.id END) AS joint_room_rented,

    (
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN fr.id END) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN wr.id END) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN jr.id END)
    ) AS total_rooms,

    (
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN fr.id END) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN wr.id END) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN jr.id END)
    ) AS total_rented,

    ROUND(
        (
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN fr.id END) +
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN wr.id END) +
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN jr.id END)
        ) * 100.0 /
        NULLIF(
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN fr.id END) +
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN wr.id END) +
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0 THEN jr.id END),
            0
        ),
        2
    ) AS occupancy_rate_pct,

    -- ==================== 近12个月收入分析 ====================
    ROUND(IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(fti.real_money)
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fti
        WHERE fti.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fti.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND fti.store_id = s.id
          AND fti.collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
          AND fti.is_deposit = 0
    ), 0), 2) AS focus_income_12m,

    ROUND(IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(jti.real_money)
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
        WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND jti.store_id = s.id
          AND jti.collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
          AND jti.is_deposit = 0
    ), 0), 2) AS joint_whole_income_12m,

    -- ==================== 欠费分析 ====================
    ROUND(IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(fti2.debt_money)
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fti2
        WHERE fti2.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fti2.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND fti2.store_id = s.id
          AND fti2.pay_status IN (1, 2)
          AND fti2.is_deposit = 0
    ), 0), 2) AS focus_arrears,

    ROUND(IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(jti2.debt_money)
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti2
        WHERE jti2.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jti2.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND jti2.store_id = s.id
          AND jti2.pay_status IN (1, 2)
          AND jti2.is_deposit = 0
    ), 0), 2) AS joint_whole_arrears,

    -- 应支欠费（公司欠房东）
    ROUND(IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(fbe.arrear_money)
        FROM qft_focus_bill_expend fbe
        WHERE fbe.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(fbe.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND fbe.store_id = s.id
          AND fbe.pay_status IN (1, 2)
          AND fbe.is_deposit = 0
    ), 0), 2) AS focus_expend_arrears,

    ROUND(IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(wbe.arrear_money)
        FROM qft_whole_bill_expend wbe
        WHERE wbe.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(wbe.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND wbe.store_id = s.id
          AND wbe.pay_status IN (1, 2)
          AND wbe.is_deposit = 0
    ), 0), 2) AS whole_expend_arrears,

    ROUND(IFNULL((
        SELECT SUM(jbe.arrear_money)
        FROM qft_joint_bill_expend jbe
        WHERE jbe.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(jbe.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND jbe.store_id = s.id
          AND jbe.pay_status IN (1, 2)
          AND jbe.is_deposit = 0
    ), 0), 2) AS joint_expend_arrears

FROM qft_store s

-- 集中房间
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr
    ON fr.store_id = s.id AND fr.company_id = 1001

-- 整租房间（qft_whole_room 无 store_id，通过房源关联）
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
    ON wh.store_id = s.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_room wr
    ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wr.company_id = 1001

-- 合租房间
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr
    ON jr.store_id = s.id AND jr.company_id = 1001

WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0

GROUP BY s.id, s.name

ORDER BY
    occupancy_rate_pct ASC,
    (
        IFNULL((SELECT SUM(fti2.debt_money) FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fti2
                WHERE fti2.company_id=1001 AND IFNULL(fti2.is_delete,0)=0
                  AND fti2.store_id=s.id AND fti2.pay_status IN(1,2) AND fti2.is_deposit=0), 0) +
        IFNULL((SELECT SUM(jti2.debt_money) FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti2
                WHERE jti2.company_id=1001 AND IFNULL(jti2.is_delete,0)=0
                  AND jti2.store_id=s.id AND jti2.pay_status IN(1,2) AND jti2.is_deposit=0), 0)
    ) DESC,
    (
        IFNULL((SELECT SUM(fti.real_money) FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fti
                WHERE fti.company_id=1001 AND IFNULL(fti.is_delete,0)=0
                  AND fti.store_id=s.id AND fti.collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
                  AND fti.is_deposit=0), 0) +
        IFNULL((SELECT SUM(jti.real_money) FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
                WHERE jti.company_id=1001 AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete,0)=0
                  AND jti.store_id=s.id AND jti.collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
                  AND jti.is_deposit=0), 0)
    ) ASC
;

results.question: 有没有租客是逾期后才交的钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone,
    i.id AS income_id,
    i.collection_date AS should_pay_date,
    i.real_pay_date AS actual_pay_date,
    i.final_money AS should_pay_money,
    i.real_money AS actual_pay_money,
    'joint' AS business_type
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_joint_tenants t ON t.id = i.tenants_id AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND t.company_id = 1001
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND i.pay_status = 3
  AND i.real_pay_date > i.collection_date

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone,
    i.id AS income_id,
    i.collection_date AS should_pay_date,
    i.real_pay_date AS actual_pay_date,
    i.final_money AS should_pay_money,
    i.real_money AS actual_pay_money,
    'whole' AS business_type
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_whole_tenants t ON t.id = i.tenants_id AND t.company_id = 1001
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND i.pay_status = 3
  AND i.real_pay_date > i.collection_date
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

SELECT DISTINCT
    t.tenant_id AS tenant_id,
    t.tenant_name AS tenant_name,
    '' AS phone,
    i.id AS income_id,
    i.collection_date AS should_pay_date,
    i.repay_pay_date AS actual_pay_date,
    i.final_money AS should_pay_money,
    i.real_money AS actual_pay_money,
    'focus' AS business_type
FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info t ON t.tenant_id = i.tenants_id AND t.company_id = 1001
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND i.pay_status = 3
  AND i.repay_pay_date > i.collection_date;

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,

    -- 出租率相关
    COALESCE(room_stats.total_rooms, 0) AS total_rooms,
    COALESCE(room_stats.rented_rooms, 0) AS rented_rooms,
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(room_stats.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
             ELSE COALESCE(room_stats.rented_rooms, 0) * 100.0 / room_stats.total_rooms
        END, 2
    ) AS occupancy_rate,

    -- 近30天收入
    COALESCE(income_stats.income_30d, 0) AS income_30d,

    -- 欠费率
    COALESCE(debt_stats.total_receivable, 0) AS total_receivable,
    COALESCE(debt_stats.total_debt, 0) AS total_debt,
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(debt_stats.total_receivable, 0) = 0 THEN 0
             ELSE COALESCE(debt_stats.total_debt, 0) * 100.0 / debt_stats.total_receivable
        END, 2
    ) AS debt_rate,

    -- 维修响应率（已完成/总维修单）
    COALESCE(repair_stats.total_repair, 0) AS total_repair,
    COALESCE(repair_stats.finished_repair, 0) AS finished_repair,
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(repair_stats.total_repair, 0) = 0 THEN 100
             ELSE COALESCE(repair_stats.finished_repair, 0) * 100.0 / repair_stats.total_repair
        END, 2
    ) AS repair_finish_rate,

    -- 健康度综合评分（满分100）
    ROUND(
        -- 出租率得分（40分）
        (CASE WHEN COALESCE(room_stats.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
              ELSE LEAST(COALESCE(room_stats.rented_rooms, 0) * 1.0 / room_stats.total_rooms, 1) * 40
         END)
        +
        -- 收入得分（20分）：以近30天收入 >= 50000 为满分基准
        LEAST(COALESCE(income_stats.income_30d, 0) / 50000.0, 1) * 20
        +
        -- 欠费率得分（20分）：欠费率越低得分越高，欠费率=0得满分，欠费率>=30%得0分
        (CASE WHEN COALESCE(debt_stats.total_receivable, 0) = 0 THEN 20
              ELSE GREATEST(1 - COALESCE(debt_stats.total_debt, 0) / NULLIF(debt_stats.total_receivable, 0) / 0.3, 0) * 20
         END)
        +
        -- 维修完成率得分（20分）
        (CASE WHEN COALESCE(repair_stats.total_repair, 0) = 0 THEN 20
              ELSE COALESCE(repair_stats.finished_repair, 0) * 1.0 / repair_stats.total_repair * 20
         END)
    , 2) AS health_score

FROM qft_store s

-- 房间出租统计（整租+合租+集中）
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
           SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM (
        SELECT wh.store_id, wr.is_lease
        FROM qft_whole_room wr
        JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = wr.housing_id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0

        UNION ALL

        SELECT jh.store_id, jr.is_lease
        FROM qft_joint_room jr
        JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0

        UNION ALL

        SELECT fh.store_id, fr.is_lease
        FROM qft_focus_room fr
        JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) all_rooms
    GROUP BY store_id
) room_stats ON room_stats.store_id = s.id

-- 近30天收入统计
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(money) AS income_30d
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND nature = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    GROUP BY store_id
) income_stats ON income_stats.store_id = s.id

-- 欠费统计（集中+整租+合租应收账单）
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(final_money) AS total_receivable,
           SUM(debt_money) AS total_debt
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, final_money, debt_money
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND is_deposit = 0

        UNION ALL

        SELECT store_id, final_money, debt_money
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND is_deposit = 0
          AND business_type = 3

        UNION ALL

        SELECT store_id, final_money, debt_money
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND is_deposit = 0
          AND business_type = 2
    ) all_income
    GROUP BY store_id
) debt_stats ON debt_stats.store_id = s.id

-- 维修工单统计
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           COUNT(*) AS total_repair,
           SUM(CASE WHEN repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS finished_repair
    FROM qft_room_repair
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) repair_stats ON repair_stats.store_id = s.id

WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY health_score DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    -- 装修成本汇总（整租+合租+集中）
    COALESCE(SUM(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rrr.business_type IN (1,2,3) THEN rrr.renovation_cost ELSE 0 END), 0) AS 总装修成本,
    -- 已收租金汇总（集中整租）
    COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(f.real_money)
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income f
        JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON f.housing_id = fh.id AND fh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE f.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND f.pay_status IN (2, 3)
          AND fh.property_adrr = ap.id
    ), 0) AS 集中整租已收租金,
    -- 已收租金汇总（整租）
    COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(ji.real_money)
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income ji
        JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON ji.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE ji.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(ji.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND ji.pay_status IN (2, 3)
          AND ji.business_type = 2
          AND wh.property_adrr = ap.id
    ), 0) AS 整租已收租金,
    -- 已收租金汇总（合租）
    COALESCE((
        SELECT SUM(ji2.real_money)
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income ji2
        JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON ji2.housing_id = jh.id AND jh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE ji2.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(ji2.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND ji2.pay_status IN (2, 3)
          AND ji2.business_type = 3
          AND jh.property_adrr = ap.id
    ), 0) AS 合租已收租金
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN qft_rm_renovation_record rrr
    ON (
        -- 集中整租房源
        rrr.housing_id IN (SELECT id FROM qft_focus_housing WHERE property_adrr = ap.id AND company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0)
        OR
        -- 整租房源
        rrr.housing_id IN (SELECT id FROM qft_whole_housing WHERE property_adrr = ap.id AND company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0)
        OR
        -- 合租房源
        rrr.housing_id IN (SELECT id FROM qft_joint_housing WHERE property_adrr = ap.id AND company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0)
    )
    AND rrr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(rrr.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
ORDER BY 总装修成本 DESC;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    -- 统计近90天新签租客数（各业务类型合并）
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN t.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
             AND t.tenants_contract_nature = 1
        THEN t.id
    END) AS new_sign_tenant_90d,
    -- 统计当前在租租客总数（租赁未到期且未删除）
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN t.lease_endtime >= CURDATE()
        THEN t.id
    END) AS active_tenant_total,
    -- 统计老租客（续签/转租/换房，当前在租）
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN t.lease_endtime >= CURDATE()
             AND t.tenants_contract_nature IN (2, 3, 4)
        THEN t.id
    END) AS old_tenant_active,
    -- 老租客占比
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN t.lease_endtime >= CURDATE()
                 AND t.tenants_contract_nature IN (2, 3, 4)
            THEN t.id
        END) * 100.0
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
            WHEN t.lease_endtime >= CURDATE()
            THEN t.id
        END), 0),
    2) AS old_tenant_ratio_pct
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
    -- 集中整租租客（qft_focus_tenants_info 通过 tenant_id 关联 qft_focus_tenants 获取 store_id）
    SELECT
        fti.company_id,
        fti.id,
        fti.create_time,
        fti.tenants_contract_nature,
        fti.lease_endtime,
        fr.store_id
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_info fti
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft ON ft.id = fti.tenant_id
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.id = ft.room_id AND fr.is_delete = 0
    WHERE fti.company_id = 1001
      AND ft.is_delete = 0
    UNION ALL
    -- 整租租客
    SELECT
        wt.company_id,
        wt.id,
        wt.create_time,
        wt.tenants_contract_nature,
        wt.lease_endtime,
        wh.store_id
    FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = (
        SELECT wr2.housing_id FROM qft_whole_room wr2 WHERE wr2.id = wt.room_id AND wr2.is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
    )
    WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
      AND wt.is_delete = 0
    UNION ALL
    -- 合租租客
    SELECT
        jt.company_id,
        jt.id,
        jt.create_time,
        jt.tenants_contract_nature,
        jt.lease_endtime,
        jr.store_id
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND jr.is_delete = 0
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND jt.is_delete = 0
) t ON t.store_id = s.id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
HAVING active_tenant_total > 0
ORDER BY new_sign_tenant_90d ASC, old_tenant_ratio_pct DESC;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    '出租率' AS 指标,
    CONCAT(ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2
    ), '%') AS 指标值,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已出租,
    COUNT(*) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 空置房间数
FROM (
    -- 集中房源房间
    SELECT is_lease FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    -- 整租房间
    SELECT is_lease FROM qft_whole_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    -- 合租房间
    SELECT is_lease FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
) t

UNION ALL

SELECT
    '应收回款率' AS 指标,
    CONCAT(ROUND(
        SUM(real_money) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(final_money), 0), 2
    ), '%') AS 指标值,
    NULL AS 已出租,
    NULL AS 总房间数,
    NULL AS 空置房间数
FROM (
    -- 集中应收
    SELECT final_money, real_money FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0 AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    -- 整租合租应收
    SELECT final_money, real_money FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0 AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
) income_t

UNION ALL

SELECT
    '欠款账单占比' AS 指标,
    CONCAT(ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status IN (1, 2) AND collection_date < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0
        / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2
    ), '%') AS 指标值,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pay_status IN (1, 2) AND collection_date < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已出租,
    COUNT(*) AS 总房间数,
    NULL AS 空置房间数
FROM (
    SELECT pay_status, collection_date FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0 AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT pay_status, collection_date FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0 AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
) overdue_t

UNION ALL

SELECT
    '应支回款率（付房东）' AS 指标,
    CONCAT(ROUND(
        SUM(real_money) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(final_money), 0), 2
    ), '%') AS 指标值,
    NULL AS 已出租,
    NULL AS 总房间数,
    NULL AS 空置房间数
FROM (
    SELECT final_money, real_money FROM qft_focus_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0 AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT final_money, real_money FROM qft_whole_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0 AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT final_money, real_money FROM qft_joint_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0 AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
) expend_t

UNION ALL

SELECT
    '空置率' AS 指标,
    CONCAT(ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2
    ), '%') AS 指标值,
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已出租,
    COUNT(*) AS 总房间数,
    NULL AS 空置房间数
FROM (
    SELECT is_lease FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT is_lease FROM qft_whole_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT is_lease FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
) vacancy_t;

results.question: 城东门店合租的欠费租客有谁？欠的是哪间房？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    jt.phone AS 联系电话,
    jh.door_number AS 门牌号,
    jh.building AS 座栋,
    jh.unit_name AS 单元,
    ap.property_adrr AS 物业地址,
    jr.room_number AS 房间号,
    jti.debt_money AS 欠费金额,
    jti.collection_date AS 应收时间
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income jti ON jt.id = jti.tenants_id
    AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jti.company_id = 1001
    AND jti.debt_money > 0
    AND jti.pay_status IN (2, 4)
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id
    AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jh.company_id = 1001
JOIN qft_store s ON s.id = jh.store_id
    AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND s.company_id = 1001
    AND s.name LIKE '%城东%'
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = jh.property_adrr
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jt.company_id = 1001
ORDER BY jti.debt_money DESC;

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    wh.id AS housing_id,
    wh.house_code AS 房源编号,
    ap.property_adrr AS 物业地址,
    wh.building AS 座栋,
    wh.unit_name AS 单元,
    wh.door_number AS 门牌号,
    wh.housing_name AS 房东姓名,
    wh.housing_phone AS 房东电话,
    wh.hosting_create_time AS 托管开始时间,
    wh.hosting_end_time AS 托管到期时间,
    CONCAT(
        IFNULL(wh.contract_year, 0), '年',
        IFNULL(wh.contract_month, 0), '月',
        IFNULL(wh.contract_day, 0), '天'
    ) AS 合同期限,
    DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) AS 距到期天数,
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) < 0 THEN '已到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) <= 60 THEN '60天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) <= 90 THEN '90天内到期'
        ELSE '正常'
    END AS 到期状态
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND wh.hosting_end_time IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, CURDATE()) ASC;

results.question: 集中式和合租哪个更划算？从投入和收益两方面分析。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    business_type_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT expend_id) AS expend_bill_count,
    SUM(expend_final_money) AS total_expend_money,
    SUM(expend_real_money) AS total_expend_paid,
    SUM(expend_arrear_money) AS total_expend_arrear,
    COUNT(DISTINCT income_id) AS income_bill_count,
    SUM(income_final_money) AS total_income_money,
    SUM(income_real_money) AS total_income_received,
    SUM(income_debt_money) AS total_income_debt,
    SUM(income_final_money) - SUM(expend_final_money) AS gross_profit,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(income_final_money) - SUM(expend_final_money)) / NULLIF(SUM(expend_final_money), 0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS profit_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT
        '集中式' AS business_type_name,
        e.id AS expend_id,
        e.final_money AS expend_final_money,
        e.real_money AS expend_real_money,
        e.arrear_money AS expend_arrear_money,
        NULL AS income_id,
        0 AS income_final_money,
        0 AS income_real_money,
        0 AS income_debt_money
    FROM qft_focus_bill_expend e
    WHERE e.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(e.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND e.is_deposit = 0
      AND e.is_history = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '集中式' AS business_type_name,
        NULL AS expend_id,
        0 AS expend_final_money,
        0 AS expend_real_money,
        0 AS expend_arrear_money,
        i.id AS income_id,
        i.final_money AS income_final_money,
        i.real_money AS income_real_money,
        i.debt_money AS income_debt_money
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
    WHERE i.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND i.is_deposit = 0
      AND i.is_history = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_type_name,
        e.id AS expend_id,
        e.final_money AS expend_final_money,
        e.real_money AS expend_real_money,
        e.arrear_money AS expend_arrear_money,
        NULL AS income_id,
        0 AS income_final_money,
        0 AS income_real_money,
        0 AS income_debt_money
    FROM qft_joint_bill_expend e
    WHERE e.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(e.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND e.is_deposit = 0
      AND e.is_history = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_type_name,
        NULL AS expend_id,
        0 AS expend_final_money,
        0 AS expend_real_money,
        0 AS expend_arrear_money,
        i.id AS income_id,
        i.final_money AS income_final_money,
        i.real_money AS income_real_money,
        i.debt_money AS income_debt_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
    WHERE i.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND i.is_deposit = 0
      AND i.is_history = 0
      AND i.business_type = 3
) t
GROUP BY business_type_name;

results.question: 门锁最近的开门记录有啥异常吗？有没有凌晨被打开的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    r.id AS 记录ID,
    r.open_door_time AS 开门时间,
    r.open_name AS 开门人,
    r.open_phone AS 开门人电话,
    r.type AS 开门方式,
    r.lock_id AS 锁编号,
    CASE r.business_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '集中整租'
        WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
        WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
    END AS 业务类型,
    CASE 
        WHEN HOUR(r.open_door_time) >= 0 AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) < 6 THEN '⚠️ 凌晨异常时段(0-6点)'
        ELSE '正常时段'
    END AS 异常标记
FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
WHERE r.company_id = 1001
    AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) >= 0 
    AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) < 6
ORDER BY r.open_door_time DESC
LIMIT 200;

results.question: 每个员工负责了多少事务？谁最忙？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    u.id AS user_id,
    u.realname AS employee_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS repair_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.id) AS finance_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT co.id) AS checkout_count,
    (
        COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT f.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT co.id)
    ) AS total_tasks
FROM qft_user u
LEFT JOIN qft_room_repair r
    ON r.creater_id = u.id
    AND r.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.creater_id = u.id
    AND f.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_tenants_check_out co
    ON co.creater_id = u.id
    AND co.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(co.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE u.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(u.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND u.user_type = 1
GROUP BY u.id, u.realname
ORDER BY total_tasks DESC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 合租每间房的均价是多少？哪间最贵哪间最便宜？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    jr.id AS room_id,
    jh.id AS housing_id,
    jr.room_number,
    ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
    jh.building,
    jh.unit_name,
    jh.door_number,
    jr.pricing_money,
    AVG(jr.pricing_money) OVER() AS avg_price,
    MAX(jr.pricing_money) OVER() AS max_price,
    MIN(jr.pricing_money) OVER() AS min_price,
    CASE 
        WHEN jr.pricing_money = MAX(jr.pricing_money) OVER() THEN '最贵'
        WHEN jr.pricing_money = MIN(jr.pricing_money) OVER() THEN '最便宜'
        ELSE '普通'
    END AS price_tag
FROM qft_joint_room jr
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jh.company_id = 1001
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jr.pricing_money IS NOT NULL
    AND jr.pricing_money > 0
ORDER BY jr.pricing_money DESC;

results.question: 如果把所有欠费都收回来，能多收多少钱？占总应收的比例是多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    -- 集中整租欠费
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 1 THEN t.debt_money ELSE 0 END) AS focus_debt,
    -- 整租欠费
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 2 THEN t.debt_money ELSE 0 END) AS whole_debt,
    -- 合租欠费
    SUM(CASE WHEN t.business = 3 THEN t.debt_money ELSE 0 END) AS joint_debt,
    -- 总欠费金额
    SUM(t.debt_money) AS total_debt_money,
    -- 总应收金额
    SUM(t.final_money) AS total_receivable_money,
    -- 欠费占总应收比例
    CONCAT(ROUND(SUM(t.debt_money) / NULLIF(SUM(t.final_money), 0) * 100, 2), '%') AS debt_ratio
FROM (
    -- 集中整租应收
    SELECT
        1 AS business,
        final_money,
        debt_money
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND pay_status IN (1, 2)
      AND is_history = 0
      AND IFNULL(is_bad_debt, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    -- 整租应收
    SELECT
        2 AS business,
        final_money,
        debt_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND pay_status IN (1, 2)
      AND is_history = 0
      AND business_type = 2
      AND IFNULL(is_bad_debt, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    -- 合租应收
    SELECT
        3 AS business,
        final_money,
        debt_money
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND pay_status IN (1, 2)
      AND is_history = 0
      AND business_type = 3
      AND IFNULL(is_bad_debt, 0) = 0
) t;

results.question: 帮我做个经营简报：房源总量、租客总量、出租率、本期收入、欠费总额。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    -- 房源总量（集中+整租+合租）
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_focus_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) +
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_whole_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) +
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_joint_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) AS total_housing,

    -- 租客总量（集中+整租+合租）
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_focus_tenants
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) +
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_whole_tenants
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) +
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_joint_tenants
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) AS total_tenants,

    -- 出租率 = 已租房间 / 总房间
    ROUND(
        (
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_focus_room
                WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND is_lease = 1
            ) +
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_whole_room
                WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND is_lease = 1
            ) +
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_joint_room
                WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND is_lease = 1
            )
        ) * 100.0 /
        NULLIF(
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_focus_room
                WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
            ) +
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_whole_room
                WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
            ) +
            (
                SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qft_joint_room
                WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
            ),
            0
        ),
        2
    ) AS rental_rate_pct,

    -- 本期收入（本月已收财务流水，收入类型）
    (
        SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money), 0)
        FROM qft_finance
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND nature = 1
          AND DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')
    ) AS current_month_income,

    -- 欠费总额（集中+整租+合租 应收账单中的欠款金额）
    (
        SELECT IFNULL(SUM(debt_money), 0)
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND debt_money > 0
    ) +
    (
        SELECT IFNULL(SUM(debt_money), 0)
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND debt_money > 0
    ) AS total_arrears;

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    '集中' AS 业务类型,
    ft.name AS 租客姓名,
    fh.id AS 房源ID,
    fr.room_number AS 房间号,
    fi.lease_price AS 月租金额
FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fi ON fi.tenant_id = ft.id AND fi.company_id = 1001
JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.id = ft.room_id AND fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0
JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND ft.name = '张三'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    '整租' AS 业务类型,
    wt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    wh.id AS 房源ID,
    wh.door_number AS 房间号,
    wt.lease_price AS 月租金额
FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = (SELECT housing_id FROM qft_whole_room WHERE id = wt.room_id AND company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0 LIMIT 1) AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0

FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0

results.question: 有多少房间还没做交割？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 未做交割房间数
FROM (
    -- 集中整租已租房间
    SELECT r.id, 1 AS business_type
    FROM qft_focus_room r
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants t ON t.room_id = r.id AND t.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(t.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND r.is_lease = 1
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM qft_focus_delivery_order d
          WHERE d.company_id = 1001
            AND IFNULL(d.is_delete,0) = 0
            AND d.room_id = r.id
            AND d.tenant_id = t.id
            AND d.role = 1
            AND d.sale_type = 1
      )

    UNION ALL

    -- 整租已租房间
    SELECT wr.id, 2 AS business_type
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt ON wt.room_id = wr.id AND wt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND wr.is_lease = 1
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM qft_focus_delivery_order d
          WHERE d.company_id = 1001
            AND IFNULL(d.is_delete,0) = 0
            AND d.room_id = wr.id
            AND d.tenant_id = wt.id
            AND d.role = 1
            AND d.sale_type = 2
      )

    UNION ALL

    -- 合租已租房间
    SELECT jr.id, 3 AS business_type
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.room_id = jr.id AND jt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND jr.is_lease = 1
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM qft_focus_delivery_order d
          WHERE d.company_id = 1001
            AND IFNULL(d.is_delete,0) = 0
            AND d.room_id = jr.id
            AND d.tenant_id = jt.id
            AND d.role = 1
            AND d.sale_type = 3
      )
) tmp;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS income,
    SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS expend
FROM qft_finance f
WHERE f.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND f.account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(fr.id) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已租房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 空置房间数,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(fr.id) * 100, 2) AS 出租率,
    ROUND(AVG(fr.cumte_vacancy_day), 1) AS 平均空置天数,
    ROUND(AVG(fr.pricing_money), 2) AS 平均定价
FROM qft_focus_room fr
INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fr.housing_id = fh.id 
    AND fh.company_id = 1001 
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id 
    AND ap.company_id = 1001 
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
HAVING 总房间数 >= 5
ORDER BY 出租率 DESC, 平均空置天数 ASC;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT s.id AS store_id,
       s.name AS store_name,
       COUNT(r.room_id) AS total_rooms,
       SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(r.room_id) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fr.id AS room_id, fr.store_id, fr.is_lease FROM qft_focus_room fr WHERE fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT wr.id AS room_id, wh.store_id, wr.is_lease FROM qft_whole_room wr
        INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
    UNION ALL
    SELECT jr.id AS room_id, jr.store_id, jr.is_lease FROM qft_joint_room jr WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
) r ON r.store_id = s.id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete,0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
ORDER BY occupancy_rate DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    -- 集中房间统计
    IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0) AS total_rooms,
    IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0) AS leased_rooms,
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN (IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE (IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0)) * 100.0
             / (IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0))
        END, 2
    ) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    -- 近12个月收入
    IFNULL(income_data.total_income, 0) AS total_income_12m,
    -- 近12个月实收
    IFNULL(income_data.total_real_income, 0) AS total_real_income_12m,
    -- 近12个月欠费
    IFNULL(income_data.total_debt, 0) AS total_debt_12m,
    -- 欠费率
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN IFNULL(income_data.total_income, 0) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE IFNULL(income_data.total_debt, 0) * 100.0 / income_data.total_income
        END, 2
    ) AS debt_rate_pct,
    -- 近12个月支出（房东应支）
    IFNULL(expend_data.total_expend, 0) AS total_expend_12m,
    -- 毛利润 = 实收 - 实支
    IFNULL(income_data.total_real_income, 0) - IFNULL(expend_data.total_real_expend, 0) AS gross_profit_12m
FROM qft_store s
-- 集中房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) fr_total ON fr_total.store_id = s.id
-- 集中已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0 AND is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) fr_leased ON fr_leased.store_id = s.id
-- 整租房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT wh.store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
    GROUP BY wh.store_id
) wr_total ON wr_total.store_id = s.id
-- 整租已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT wh.store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0 AND wr.is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY wh.store_id
) wr_leased ON wr_leased.store_id = s.id
-- 合租房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) jr_total ON jr_total.store_id = s.id
-- 合租已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0 AND is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) jr_leased ON jr_leased.store_id = s.id
-- 近12个月应收汇总（集中+整租合租）
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(final_money) AS total_income,
           SUM(real_money)  AS total_real_income,
           SUM(debt_money)  AS total_debt
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, final_money, real_money, debt_money
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id, final_money, real_money, debt_money
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    ) t
    GROUP BY store_id
) income_data ON income_data.store_id = s.id
-- 近12个月应支汇总（集中+整租+合租）
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(final_money) AS total_expend,
           SUM(real_money)  AS total_real_expend
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, final_money, real_money
        FROM qft_focus_bill_expend
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND pay_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id, final_money, real_money
        FROM qft_whole_bill_expend
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND pay_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id, final_money, real_money
        FROM qft_joint_bill_expend
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND pay_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    ) t
    GROUP BY store_id
) expend_data ON expend_data.store_id = s.id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY occupancy_rate_pct ASC, debt_rate_pct DESC, gross_profit_12m ASC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 有没有租客是逾期后才交的钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT '集中' AS business_type, i.tenants_id AS tenant_id, ft.name AS tenant_name, ft.phone,
       i.collection_date AS should_pay_date, i.repay_pay_date AS actual_pay_date,
       i.final_money, i.real_money
FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft ON ft.id = i.tenants_id AND ft.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND i.pay_status IN (2, 3)
  AND i.is_deposit = 0
  AND i.repay_pay_date > i.collection_date
  AND i.repay_pay_date IS NOT NULL
  AND i.collection_date IS NOT NULL

UNION ALL

SELECT CASE j.business_type WHEN 2 THEN '整租' WHEN 3 THEN '合租' ELSE '其他' END AS business_type,
       j.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
       CASE j.business_type
           WHEN 2 THEN wt.tenants_name
           WHEN 3 THEN jt.tenants_name
       END AS tenant_name,
       CASE j.business_type
           WHEN 2 THEN wt.phone
           WHEN 3 THEN jt.phone
       END AS phone,
       j.collection_date AS should_pay_date, j.real_pay_date AS actual_pay_date,
       j.final_money, j.real_money
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income j
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt ON wt.id = j.tenants_id AND wt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0 AND j.business_type = 2
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.id = j.tenants_id AND jt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0 AND j.business_type = 3
WHERE j.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(j.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND j.pay_status IN (2, 3)
  AND j.is_deposit = 0
  AND j.real_pay_date > j.collection_date
  AND j.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
  AND j.collection_date IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY actual_pay_date DESC;

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,

    -- 1. 出租率 (已租房间数 / 总房间数)
    ROUND(IFNULL(room_stats.rented_count, 0) / GREATEST(IFNULL(room_stats.total_count, 1), 1) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,

    -- 2. 近90天收入总额
    IFNULL(income_stats.total_income, 0) AS income_90d,

    -- 3. 欠费率 (有欠费的账单数 / 总账单数)
    ROUND(IFNULL(arrear_stats.arrear_count, 0) / GREATEST(IFNULL(arrear_stats.total_bill_count, 1), 1) * 100, 2) AS arrear_rate_pct,

    -- 4. 维修响应率 (已领取任务数 / 总维修工单数)
    ROUND(IFNULL(repair_stats.received_count, 0) / GREATEST(IFNULL(repair_stats.total_repair_count, 1), 1) * 100, 2) AS repair_response_rate_pct,

    -- 5. 综合健康度评分 (满分100)
    ROUND(
        (IFNULL(room_stats.rented_count, 0) / GREATEST(IFNULL(room_stats.total_count, 1), 1)) * 40
        + (1 - IFNULL(arrear_stats.arrear_count, 0) / GREATEST(IFNULL(arrear_stats.total_bill_count, 1), 1)) * 20
        + (IFNULL(repair_stats.received_count, 0) / GREATEST(IFNULL(repair_stats.total_repair_count, 1), 1)) * 20
        + (IFNULL(income_stats.total_income, 0) / GREATEST(IFNULL(max_income.max_val, 1), 1)) * 20
    , 2) AS health_score

FROM qft_store s

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_cnt) AS total_count,
        SUM(rented_cnt) AS rented_count
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_cnt,
               SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_cnt
        FROM qft_focus_room
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
        GROUP BY store_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT wh.store_id AS store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_cnt,
               SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_cnt
        FROM qft_whole_room wr
        INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
        WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
        GROUP BY wh.store_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT jr.store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_cnt,
               SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_cnt
        FROM qft_joint_room jr
        WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
        GROUP BY jr.store_id
    ) room_union
    GROUP BY store_id
) room_stats ON room_stats.store_id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(money) AS total_income
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
      AND nature = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    GROUP BY store_id
) income_stats ON income_stats.store_id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           COUNT(*) AS total_bill_count,
           SUM(CASE WHEN debt_money > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS arrear_count
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, debt_money
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
          AND is_deposit = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id, debt_money
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
          AND is_deposit = 0
    ) bill_union
    GROUP BY store_id
) arrear_stats ON arrear_stats.store_id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           COUNT(*) AS total_repair_count,
           SUM(CASE WHEN receive = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received_count
    FROM qft_room_repair
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
      AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    GROUP BY store_id
) repair_stats ON repair_stats.store_id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(total_income) AS max_val
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_income
        FROM qft_finance
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
          AND nature = 1
          AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
        GROUP BY store_id
    ) t
) max_income ON 1 = 1

WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete,0) = 0
ORDER BY health_score DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    fh.id AS housing_id,
    ap.property_adrr AS 物业地址,
    fh.building AS 座栋,
    IFNULL(ren.装修总成本, 0) AS 装修总成本,
    IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) AS 租金已收总额,
    IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0) AS 房东已付总额,
    IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) - IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0) AS 租金净收入,
    IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) - IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0) - IFNULL(ren.装修总成本, 0) AS 净利润,
    CASE WHEN IFNULL(ren.装修总成本, 0) > 0 
        THEN ROUND((IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) - IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0) - IFNULL(ren.装修总成本, 0)) / ren.装修总成本 * 100, 2)
        ELSE NULL 
    END AS 投资回报率百分比
FROM qft_focus_housing fh
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = fh.property_adrr AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT housing_id, SUM(renovation_cost) AS 装修总成本
    FROM qft_rm_renovation_record
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND business_type = 1
    GROUP BY housing_id
) ren ON ren.housing_id = fh.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT housing_id, SUM(real_money) AS 租金已收总额
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND is_deposit = 0
    GROUP BY housing_id
) income ON income.housing_id = fh.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT housing_id, SUM(real_money) AS 房东已付总额
    FROM qft_focus_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND is_deposit = 0
    GROUP BY housing_id
) expend ON expend.housing_id = fh.id
WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY 净利润 DESC;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.tenant_id) AS total_active_tenants,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN t.tenant_id END) AS new_tenants_90d,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.create_time < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN t.tenant_id END) AS old_tenants,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN t.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN t.tenant_id END) 
        / COUNT(DISTINCT t.tenant_id) * 100, 2
    ) AS new_tenant_pct
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
    -- 集中租客
    SELECT ft.id AS tenant_id, fh.store_id, fi.create_time
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fi ON fi.tenant_id = ft.id AND fi.company_id = 1001
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.id = ft.room_id AND fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND fi.lease_endtime >= CURDATE()
      AND fi.lease_starttime <= CURDATE()

    UNION ALL

    -- 整租租客
    SELECT wt.id AS tenant_id, wh.store_id, wt.create_time
    FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.id = wt.room_id AND wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = wr.housing_id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND wt.lease_endtime >= CURDATE()
      AND wt.lease_starttime <= CURDATE()

    UNION ALL

    -- 合租租客
    SELECT jt.id AS tenant_id, jh.store_id, jt.create_time
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND jt.lease_endtime >= CURDATE()
      AND jt.lease_starttime <= CURDATE()
) t ON t.store_id = s.id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete,0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
HAVING total_active_tenants >= 5
ORDER BY new_tenant_pct ASC, old_tenants DESC;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.generated_sql:
-- 1. 集中式房间出租率
SELECT '集中式出租率' AS metric,
       COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
       SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM qft_focus_room fr
WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

-- 2. 整租出租率
SELECT '整租出租率' AS metric,
       COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
       SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM qft_whole_room wr
WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

-- 3. 合租出租率
SELECT '合租出租率' AS metric,
       COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
       SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM qft_joint_room jr
WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

-- 4. 综合出租率（所有业务类型合计）
SELECT '综合出租率' AS metric,
       total_all AS total_rooms,
       leased_all AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(leased_all / total_all * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT SUM(t) AS total_all, SUM(l) AS leased_all FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS t, SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS l FROM qft_focus_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM qft_whole_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM qft_joint_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    ) x
) y

UNION ALL

-- 5. 综合空置率
SELECT '综合空置率' AS metric,
       total_all AS total_rooms,
       total_all - leased_all AS vacant_rooms,
       ROUND((total_all - leased_all) / total_all * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT SUM(t) AS total_all, SUM(l) AS leased_all FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS t, SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS l FROM qft_focus_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM qft_whole_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM qft_joint_room WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
    ) x
) z

UNION ALL

-- 6. 集中式租客应收回款率
SELECT '集中应收回款率' AS metric,
       ROUND(SUM(fi.final_money), 2) AS total_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(fi.real_money), 2) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(fi.real_money) / SUM(fi.final_money) * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fi
WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fi.is_deposit = 0

UNION ALL

-- 7. 整租+合租应收回款率
SELECT '整租合租应收回款率' AS metric,
       ROUND(SUM(ji.final_money), 2) AS total_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(ji.real_money), 2) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(SUM(ji.real_money) / SUM(ji.final_money) * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income ji
WHERE ji.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ji.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ji.is_deposit = 0

UNION ALL

-- 8. 综合应收回款率
SELECT '综合应收回款率' AS metric,
       ROUND(total_final, 2) AS total_rooms,
       ROUND(total_real, 2) AS leased_rooms,
       ROUND(total_real / total_final * 100, 2) AS rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT SUM(f) AS total_final, SUM(r) AS total_real FROM (
        SELECT SUM(final_money) AS f, SUM(real_money) AS r FROM qft_focus_tenants_income WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0 AND is_deposit = 0
        UNION ALL
        SELECT SUM(final_money), SUM(real_money) FROM qft_joint_tenants_income WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0 AND is_deposit = 0
    ) x
) w;

results.question: 城东门店合租的欠费租客有谁？欠的是哪间房？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    jt.phone AS 联系电话,
    ap.property_adrr AS 物业地址,
    jh.building AS 座栋,
    jh.unit_name AS 单元,
    jh.door_number AS 门牌号,
    jr.room_number AS 房间号,
    SUM(ji.debt_money) AS 欠费金额
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income ji
INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.id = ji.tenants_id AND jt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = jh.property_adrr AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_store s ON s.id = jh.store_id AND s.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(s.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE ji.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ji.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND ji.business_type = 3
  AND ji.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND ji.debt_money > 0
  AND s.name LIKE '%城东%'
GROUP BY jt.id, jt.tenants_name, jt.phone, ap.property_adrr, jh.building, jh.unit_name, jh.door_number, jr.room_number
ORDER BY 欠费金额 DESC;

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    wh.id AS housing_id,
    wh.house_code,
    wh.housing_name,
    wh.housing_phone,
    ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
    wh.building,
    wh.unit_name,
    wh.door_number,
    wh.hosting_create_time,
    wh.hosting_end_time,
    wh.contract_year,
    wh.contract_month,
    wh.contract_day,
    CONCAT(
        IFNULL(wh.contract_year, 0), '年',
        IFNULL(wh.contract_month, 0), '月',
        IFNULL(wh.contract_day, 0), '日'
    ) AS contract_period,
    DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, NOW()) AS remaining_days,
    CASE 
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, NOW()) < 0 THEN '已到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 60 THEN '60天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(wh.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN '90天内到期'
        ELSE '正常'
    END AS urgency_level
FROM qft_whole_housing wh
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr AND ap.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND wh.is_check_out = 0
  AND wh.hosting_end_time IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY remaining_days ASC;

results.question: 集中式和合租哪个更划算？从投入和收益两方面分析。
results.generated_sql:
-- 集中式：平均收房价 vs 平均出房价，以及收益差
SELECT
    '集中式' AS business_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id) AS house_count,
    ROUND(AVG(ft.joe_price), 2) AS avg_housing_price,
    ROUND(AVG(fi.lease_price), 2) AS avg_lease_price,
    ROUND(AVG(fi.lease_price) - AVG(ft.joe_price), 2) AS avg_profit_per_room,
    ROUND((AVG(fi.lease_price) - AVG(ft.joe_price)) / NULLIF(AVG(ft.joe_price), 0) * 100, 2) AS profit_margin_pct
FROM qft_focus_housing fh
INNER JOIN qft_focus_trust ft ON ft.housing_id = fh.id AND IFNULL(ft.joe_price, 0) > 0
INNER JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.housing_id = fh.id AND fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fi ON fi.tenant_id IN (
    SELECT t.id FROM qft_focus_tenants t WHERE t.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND t.room_id = fr.id
) AND fi.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fi.lease_price, 0) > 0
WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

-- 合租：平均收房价 vs 平均出房价，以及收益差
SELECT
    '合租' AS business_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT jh.id) AS house_count,
    ROUND(AVG(jh.joe_price), 2) AS avg_housing_price,
    ROUND(AVG(jt.lease_price), 2) AS avg_lease_price,
    ROUND(AVG(jt.lease_price) - AVG(jh.joe_price / NULLIF(jh.room_count, 0)), 2) AS avg_profit_per_room,
    ROUND((AVG(jt.lease_price) - AVG(jh.joe_price / NULLIF(jh.room_count, 0))) / NULLIF(AVG(jh.joe_price / NULLIF(jh.room_count, 0)), 0) * 100, 2) AS profit_margin_pct
FROM qft_joint_housing jh
INNER JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.housing_id = jh.id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.room_id = jr.id AND jt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0 AND IFNULL(jt.lease_price, 0) > 0
WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(jh.joe_price, 0) > 0;

    r.open_door_time,
