    "wh
results.generated_sql:
-- =====================================================
-- 整体业务健康度综合评估：出租率、回款率、空置率
-- =====================================================

SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id)                                                        AS total_housing_count,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN ctr.id IS NOT NULL THEN fh.id
    END)                                                                          AS rented_housing_count,

    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ctr.id IS NOT NULL THEN fh.id END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id), 0) * 100, 2
    )                                                                             AS occupancy_rate_pct,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN ctr.id IS NULL THEN fh.id
    END)                                                                          AS vacant_housing_count,

    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ctr.id IS NULL THEN fh.id END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id), 0) * 100, 2
    )                                                                             AS vacancy_rate_pct,

    ROUND(SUM(CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1
         AND b.is_invalid = 0
         AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
        THEN b.total_trade_money
        ELSE 0
    END), 2)                                                                      AS total_receivable_money,

    ROUND(SUM(CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1
         AND b.is_invalid = 0
         AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
        THEN b.total_real_money
        ELSE 0
    END), 2)                                                                      AS total_received_money,

    ROUND(SUM(CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1
         AND b.is_invalid = 0
         AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
        THEN b.total_debt_money
        ELSE 0
    END), 2)                                                                      AS total_debt_money,

    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE
            WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0 AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
            THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0
        END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE
            WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0 AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
            THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0
        END), 0) * 100, 2
    )                                                                             AS payment_collection_rate_pct,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1
         AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2)
         AND b.is_invalid = 0
         AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
         AND b.trade_date < NOW()
        THEN b.id
    END)                                                                          AS overdue_bill_count,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN b.is_bad_debt = 1
         AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
        THEN b.id
    END)                                                                          AS bad_debt_bill_count

FROM qft_focus_housing fh

LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    ON  ctr.housing_id = fh.id
    AND ctr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ctr.start_time <= NOW()
    AND ctr.end_time   >= NOW()

LEFT JOIN qft_bill b
    ON  b.house_id   = fh.id
    AND b.company_id = 1001
    AND b.sale_type  = 1

WHERE fh.company_id  = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fh.is_check_out = 0;


-- =====================================================
-- 分业务类型健康度明细
-- =====================================================

SELECT
    b.sale_type,
    CASE b.sale_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '集中整租'
        WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
        WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
        ELSE '其他'
    END                                                                           AS business_type_name,

    ROUND(SUM(CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0
        THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0
    END), 2)                                                                      AS receivable_money,

    ROUND(SUM(CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0
        THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0
    END), 2)                                                                      AS received_money,

    ROUND(SUM(CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0
        THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0
    END), 2)                                                                      AS debt_money,

    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0 THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 0)
        * 100, 2
    )                                                                             AS collection_rate_pct,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.bill_status = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0
        THEN b.id
    END)                                                                          AS paid_bill_count,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2) AND b.is_invalid = 0
        THEN b.id
    END)                                                                          AS unpaid_bill_count,

    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN b.trade_type = 1
         AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2)
         AND b.is_invalid = 0
         AND b.trade_date < NOW()
        THEN b.id
    END)                                                                          AS overdue_bill_count

FROM qft_bill b

WHERE b.company_id        = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0

GROUP BY b.sale_type
ORDER BY b.sale_type;

SELECT
    jt.id AS tenant_id,
    jt.tenants_name,
    jt.phone,
    jh.house_code,
    jh.door_number,
    jr.room_number,
    SUM(jti.debt_money) AS total_debt_money
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr

    {"text": "整租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "whole"},
    {"text": "房源", "type": "housing", "normalized": "housing"},

    {"text": "快到期", "type": "condition", "normalized": "expiring_soon"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "list",
  "business_mode": ["whole"],
  "time_range": "即将到期（近期）",
  "search_keywords": ["whole_housing", "housing", "whole_contract", "contract"]
}
```
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    fh.id AS housing_id,
    fh.house_code AS 房源编号,
    ft.hosting_create_time AS 托管开始时间,
    ft.hosting_end_time AS 托管到期时间,
    ft.contract_year AS 合同期限年,
    ft.contract_month AS 合同期限月,
    ft.contract_day AS 合同期限日,
    CONCAT(
        IFNULL(ft.contract_year, 0), '年',
        IFNULL(ft.contract_month, 0), '月',
        IFNULL(ft.contract_day, 0), '天'
    ) AS 托管期限,
    DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) AS 距到期天数,
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) < 0 THEN '已到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 60 THEN '60天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN '90天内到期'
        ELSE '未到期'
    END AS 到期状态
FROM qft_focus_housing fh
INNER JOIN qft_focus_trust ft ON ft.housing_id = fh.id
WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fh.trust_id = ft.id
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
      WHERE chr.housing_id = fh.id
        AND chr.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND chr.business_type = 2
  )
ORDER BY 距到期天数 ASC;

results.question: 集中式和合租哪个更划算？从投入和收益两方面分析。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "集中式", "type": "condition", "normalized": "focus"},
    {"text": "合租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "joint"},
    {"text": "投入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "expend"},
    {"text": "收益", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": ["focus", "joint"],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": [
    "focus_bill_expend",
    "joint_bill_expend",
    "focus_tenants_income",
    "joint_tenants_income",
results.generated_sql:
-- 集中式 vs 合租：投入与收益对比分析
-- 投入：房东应支账单（qft_focus_bill_expend）
-- 收益：财务收入记录（qft_finance，nature=1收入，type区分业务类型）

SELECT
    business_mode,
    -- 房源数量
    COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id)                          AS housing_count,
    -- 房间数量
    COUNT(DISTINCT room_id)                             AS room_count,

    -- ===== 投入分析 =====
    -- 应支总额（房东租金成本）
    ROUND(SUM(total_pay_money), 2)                      AS total_expend_money,
    -- 平均每套房源投入
    ROUND(SUM(total_pay_money) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id), 0), 2) AS avg_expend_per_housing,

    -- ===== 收益分析 =====
    -- 收入总额
    ROUND(SUM(total_income_money), 2)                   AS total_income_money,
    -- 平均每套房源收益
    ROUND(SUM(total_income_money) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id), 0), 2) AS avg_income_per_housing,

    -- ===== 利润分析 =====
    -- 毛利润 = 收入 - 投入
    ROUND(SUM(total_income_money) - SUM(total_pay_money), 2) AS gross_profit,
    -- 利润率 = 毛利润 / 投入
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            (SUM(total_income_money) - SUM(total_pay_money))
            / NULLIF(SUM(total_pay_money), 0) * 100
        , 2),
        '%'
    )                                                   AS profit_rate,
    -- 投入产出比 = 收入 / 投入
    ROUND(SUM(total_income_money) / NULLIF(SUM(total_pay_money), 0), 4) AS roi

FROM (
    -- ===== 集中式：投入 =====
    SELECT
        '集中式' AS business_mode,
        fbe.housing_id,
        NULL     AS room_id,
        fbe.pay_money AS total_pay_money,
        0             AS total_income_money
    FROM qft_focus_bill_expend fbe
    WHERE fbe.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fbe.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fbe.is_history = 0          -- 只取最新账单

    UNION ALL

    -- ===== 集中式：收益（财务收入，type=1集中整租）=====
    SELECT
        '集中式' AS business_mode,
        f.housing_id,
        f.room_id,
        0             AS total_pay_money,
        f.money       AS total_income_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1                -- 收入
      AND f.type = 1                  -- 集中整租

    UNION ALL

    -- ===== 合租：投入（财务支出，type=3合租）=====
    SELECT
        '合租'   AS business_mode,
        f.housing_id,
        f.room_id,
        f.money       AS total_pay_money,
        0             AS total_income_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 0                -- 支出
      AND f.type = 3                  -- 合租

    UNION ALL

    -- ===== 合租：收益（财务收入，type=3合租）=====
    SELECT
        '合租'   AS business_mode,
        f.housing_id,
        f.room_id,
        0             AS total_pay_money,
        f.money       AS total_income_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1                -- 收入
      AND f.type = 3                  -- 合租

) t
GROUP BY business_mode
ORDER BY profit_rate DESC;

SELECT
    r.id                                    AS 记录ID,
    r.company_id                            AS 公司ID,
    r.open_door_time                        AS 开门时间,
    DATE_FORMAT(r.open_door_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS 开门时刻,
    CASE r.type
        WHEN '0' THEN '密码开门'
        WHEN '1' THEN '外开'
        WHEN '2' THEN '内开'
        ELSE r.type
    END                                     AS 开门方式,
    r.lock_id                               AS 锁编号,
    r.open_name                             AS 开门人姓名,
    r.open_phone                            AS 开门人电话,
    r.pwd_id                                AS 密码ID,
    CASE r.business_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '集中整租'
        WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
        WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
        ELSE CONCAT(r.business_type, '')
    END                                     AS 业务类型,
    CASE r.lock_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '柚石'
        WHEN 2 THEN '蛋呗'
        WHEN 3 THEN '果加'
        WHEN 4 THEN '丁盯'
        WHEN 7 THEN '榉树'
        ELSE CONCAT('类型', r.lock_type)
    END                                     AS 门锁品牌,
    s.house_id                              AS 房源ID,
    s.room_id                               AS 房间ID,
    s.sale_type                             AS 统计业务类型,
    s.lock_status                           AS 锁状态,
    s.lock_power                            AS 门锁电量,
    '⚠️ 凌晨异常开门'                        AS 异常标记
FROM
    qft_smart_lock_open_record r
LEFT JOIN
    qft_smart_lock_statistics s
    ON r.lock_id = s.lock_id
WHERE

    AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) >= 0
    AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) < 6
ORDER BY
    r.open_door_time DESC
LIMIT 200;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    b.user_id AS employee_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS housing_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS tenant_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT hr.id) AS housing_renewal_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT tr.id) AS tenant_renewal_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) AS delivery_order_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT f.id) AS finance_count,
    (
        COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT hr.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT tr.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT d.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT f.id)
    ) AS total_task_count
FROM qft_butler b
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON b.housing_id = h.id
    AND h.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room r
    ON r.housing_id = b.housing_id
    AND r.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants t
    ON t.room_id = r.id
    AND t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal hr
    ON hr.housing_id = b.housing_id
    AND hr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(hr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal tr
    ON tr.housing_id = b.housing_id
    AND tr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(tr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_delivery_order d
    ON d.housing_id = b.housing_id
    AND d.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(d.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.housing_id = b.housing_id
    AND f.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
GROUP BY b.user_id
ORDER BY total_task_count DESC;

SELECT
    jr.id AS room_id,
    jr.room_number,
    jh.door_number AS housing_door_number,
    jh.house_code,
    AVG(jt.lease_price) AS avg_price,
    MAX(jt.lease_price) AS max_price,
    MIN(jt.lease_price) AS min_price,
    COUNT(jt.id) AS tenant_count
FROM qft_joint_room jr
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jh.company_id = 1001
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.room_id = jr.id
    AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jt.company_id = 1001
WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jt.lease_price IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY jr.id, jr.room_number, jh.door_number, jh.house_code

UNION ALL

-- 全局汇总：最贵、最便宜、整体均价
SELECT
    NULL AS room_id,
    '【汇总】全部房间' AS room_number,
    NULL AS housing_door_number,
    NULL AS house_code,
    ROUND(AVG(jt.lease_price), 2) AS avg_price,
    MAX(jt.lease_price) AS max_price,
    MIN(jt.lease_price) AS min_price,
    COUNT(jt.id) AS tenant_count
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id
    AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jr.company_id = 1001
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jt.lease_price IS NOT NULL

ORDER BY avg_price DESC;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.bill_status IN (0, 2) AND b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END) AS arrears_amount,
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END) AS total_receivable,
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            SUM(CASE WHEN b.bill_status IN (0, 2) AND b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100,
            2
        ),
        '%'
    ) AS arrears_rate
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.is_invalid = 0;

results.question: 帮我做个经营简报：房源总量、租客总量、出租率、本期收入、欠费总额。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "房源总量", "type": "metric", "normalized": "housing_count"},
    {"text": "租客总量", "type": "metric", "normalized": "tenants_count"},
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "本期收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "current_period_income"},
    {"text": "欠费总额", "type": "metric", "normalized": "overdue_amount"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "sum",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": "当前期",
  "search_keywords": [
    "whole_hou
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    -- 房源总量
    (SELECT COUNT(*) 
     FROM qft_focus_bill_expend 
     WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 
       AND is_history = 0) AS total_houses,
    
    -- 租客总量（当前在租，未退房）
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT counterparty_id) 
     FROM qft_bill 
     WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 
       AND is_invalid = 0 
       AND trade_type = 1 
       AND counterparty = 1
       AND bill_status IN (0, 1, 2)) AS total_tenants,
    
    -- 出租率（有租客账单的房间数/总房间数）
    CONCAT(
        ROUND(
            (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) 
             FROM qft_bill 
             WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 
               AND is_invalid = 0 
               AND trade_type = 1 
               AND counterparty = 1
               AND bill_status IN (0, 1, 2)) * 100.0 /
            NULLIF(
                (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) 
                 FROM qft_bill 
                 WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 
                   AND is_invalid = 0), 
            0),
        2), '%'
    ) AS rent_rate,
    
    -- 本期收入（本月已收）
    (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money), 0) 
     FROM qft_finance 
     WHERE company_id = 1001 
       AND is_delete = 0 
       AND nature = 1 
       AND DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')) AS current_income,
    
    -- 欠费总额（租客应收未收）
    (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_debt_money), 0) 
     FROM qft_bill 
     WHERE company_id = 1001 
       AND is_delete = 0 
       AND is_invalid = 0 
       AND trade_type = 1 
       AND counterparty = 1 
       AND bill_status IN (0, 2)) AS total_arrears;

results.generated_sql:
-- 1. 空置率分析：当前空置或即将到期的房源
SELECT
    chr.housing_id,
    chr.company_id,
    chr.business_type,
    chr.start_time AS housing_start,
    chr.end_time   AS housing_end,
    COUNT(ctr.id)  AS tenant_count,
    MAX(ctr.end_time) AS latest_tenant_end,
    DATEDIFF(chr.end_time, NOW()) AS housing_days_left,
    CASE
        WHEN COUNT(ctr.id) = 0 THEN '完全空置'
        WHEN MAX(ctr.end_time) < NOW() THEN '租客已到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(MAX(ctr.end_time), NOW()) <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
        ELSE '正常出租'
    END AS vacancy_status
FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    ON ctr.housing_id = chr.housing_id
    AND ctr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ctr.end_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
WHERE chr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND chr.end_time >= NOW()
GROUP BY
    chr.housing_id,
    chr.company_id,
    chr.business_type,
    chr.start_time,
    chr.end_time
ORDER BY vacancy_status, housing_days_left;

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  ft.id AS tenant_id,
  ft.name AS tenant_name,
  COALESCE(fr1.room_number, pr1.room_number, fr2.room_number, pr2.room_number) AS room_number,
  COALESCE(ctr.room_money, fr1.pricing_money, pr1.pricing_money, fr2.pricing_money, pr2.pricing_money) AS monthly_rent
FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr1
  ON ft.room_id = fr1.id
 AND fr1.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(fr1.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr1
  ON ft.room_id = pr1.id
 AND pr1.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(pr1.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room_earnest fre
  ON ft.room_id = fre.id
 AND fre.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(fre.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr2
  ON fre.room_id = fr2.id
 AND fr2.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(fr2.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr2
  ON fre.room_id = pr2.id
 AND pr2.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(pr2.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ctr1.tenant_id, ctr1.room_id, ctr1.room_money
  FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr1
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT tenant_id, room_id, MAX(log_index) AS max_log_index
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY tenant_id, room_id
  ) ctr2
    ON ctr1.tenant_id = ctr2.tenant_id
   AND ctr1.room_id = ctr2.room_id
   AND ctr1.log_index = ctr2.max_log_index
  WHERE ctr1.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ctr1.is_delete, 0) = 0
) ctr
  ON ctr.tenant_id = ft.id
 AND ctr.room_id = COALESCE(fr1.id, pr1.id, fr2.id, pr2.id)
WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ft.name = '张三';

results.question: 翡翠城2栋2-1-101租出去了没？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  x.room_type,
  x.housing_id,
  x.room_id,
  x.room_number,
  x.building,
  x.lease_status,
  x.tenant_names,
  x.tenant_phones
FROM (
  SELECT
    '子间' AS room_type,
    r.housing_id,
    r.id AS room_id,
    r.room_number,
    h.building,
    CASE
      WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN '已租'
      WHEN r.is_lease = 2 THEN '待转租'
      ELSE '未租'
    END AS lease_status,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.name SEPARATOR '，') AS tenant_names,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.phone SEPARATOR '，') AS tenant_phones
  FROM qft_focus_room r
  JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON r.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants t
    ON t.room_id = r.id
   AND t.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE r.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND r.room_number LIKE '%2-1-101%'
    AND h.building LIKE '%2栋%'
  GROUP BY r.housing_id, r.id, r.room_number, h.building, r.is_lease

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '整租主间' AS room_type,
    p.housing_id,
    p.id AS room_id,
    p.room_number,
    h.building,
    CASE
      WHEN p.is_lease = 1 THEN '已租'
      ELSE '未租'
    END AS lease_status,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.name SEPARATOR '，') AS tenant_names,
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t.phone SEPARATOR '，') AS tenant_phones
  FROM qft_focus_parent_room p
  JOIN qft_focus_housing h
    ON p.housing_id = h.id
   AND h.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants t
    ON t.room_id = p.id
   AND t.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE p.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(p.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND p.room_number LIKE '%2-1-101%'
    AND h.building LIKE '%2栋%'
  GROUP BY p.housing_id, p.id, p.room_number, h.building, p.is_lease
) x;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
  SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS total_expenditure,
  SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS profit_loss_amount,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) THEN '赚钱了'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) THEN '亏钱了'
    ELSE '不赚不亏'
  END AS profit_or_loss
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0;

results.question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  CASE x.business_type
    WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
    WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
  END AS business_mode,
  IFNULL(a.income_money, 0) AS income_money,
  IFNULL(a.expend_money, 0) AS expend_money,
  IFNULL(a.net_profit, 0) AS net_profit
FROM (
  SELECT 2 AS business_type
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3 AS business_type
) x
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    hr.business_type,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 2) AS income_money,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 2) AS expend_money,
    ROUND(
      SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0) ELSE 0 END) -
      SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0) ELSE 0 END),
      2
    ) AS net_profit
  FROM qft_finance f
  JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal hr
    ON f.housing_id = hr.id
  WHERE f.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND hr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(hr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND hr.business_type IN (2, 3)
  GROUP BY hr.business_type
) a
  ON x.business_type = a.business_type
ORDER BY IFNULL(a.net_profit, 0) DESC;

results.generated_sql:
WITH room_data AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    housing_id,
    room_number,
    pricing_money,
    AVG(pricing_money) OVER () AS avg_price,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pricing_money DESC, id ASC) AS rn_desc,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pricing_money ASC, id ASC) AS rn_asc
  FROM qft_focus_room
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND focus_joint_mode = 3
    AND COALESCE(is_main, 0) = 0
)
SELECT result_type, housing_id, room_number, price
FROM (
  SELECT 1 AS sort_no, '合租均价' AS result_type, NULL AS housing_id, NULL AS room_number, ROUND(MAX(avg_price), 2) AS price
  FROM room_data
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 2 AS sort_no, '最贵房间' AS result_type, housing_id, room_number, ROUND(pricing_money, 2) AS price
  FROM room_data
  WHERE rn_desc = 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3 AS sort_no, '最便宜房间' AS result_type, housing_id, room_number, ROUND(pricing_money, 2) AS price
  FROM room_data
  WHERE rn_asc = 1
) t
ORDER BY sort_no;

    UNION ALL

    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  ) a

  FROM qft_focus_room
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT business_type,
       tenant_name,
       property_address,
       building,
       unit_name,
       door_number,
       room_number,
       monthly_rent
FROM (
    SELECT '集中整租' AS business_type,
           t.name AS tenant_name,
           ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
           fh.building,
           fh.unit_name,
           NULL AS door_number,
           fr.room_number,
           fi.lease_price AS monthly_rent
    FROM qft_focus_tenants t
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fi
        ON fi.tenant_id = t.id
       AND fi.company_id = 1001
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room fr
        ON fr.id = t.room_id
       AND fr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fh.id = fr.housing_id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON ap.id = fh.property_adrr
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND t.name = '张三'
      AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(fi.lease_starttime) AND DATE(IFNULL(fi.lease_endtime, '9999-12-31'))

    UNION ALL

    SELECT '整租' AS business_type,
           t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
           ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
           wh.building,
           wh.unit_name,
           wh.door_number,
           NULL AS room_number,
           t.lease_price AS monthly_rent
    FROM qft_whole_tenants t
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_room wr
        ON wr.id = t.room_id
       AND wr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
      AND IFNULL(t.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
      AND CURDATE() BETWEEN DATE(t.lease_starttime) AND DATE(IFNULL(t.lease_endtime, '9999-12-31'))

    UNION ALL

    SELECT '合租' AS business_type,
           t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
           ap.property_adrr AS property_address,
           jh.building,
           jh.unit_name,
           jh.door_number,
           jr.room_number,
           t.lease_price AS monthly_rent
    FROM qft_joint_tenants t
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_room jr
        ON jr.id = t.room_id
       AND jr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON ap.id = jh.property_adrr
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
      AND IFNULL(t.transfer_status, 0) <> 1

results.question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  x.tenant_name,
  x.phone,
  x.business_type,
  x.house_code,
  x.room_number,
  CASE
    WHEN IFNULL(x.unpaid_bill_count, 0) > 0 OR IFNULL(x.total_debt, 0) > 0 THEN '没交清'
    ELSE '已交清'
  END AS rent_pay_status,
  ROUND(IFNULL(x.total_debt, 0), 2) AS debt_money,
  ROUND(IFNULL(x.total_receivable, 0), 2) AS total_receivable,
  ROUND(IFNULL(x.total_paid, 0), 2) AS total_paid,
  IFNULL(x.unpaid_bill_count, 0) AS unpaid_bill_count,
  x.latest_due_date
FROM (
  SELECT
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone AS phone,
    '集中整租' AS business_type,
    fh.house_code AS house_code,
    COALESCE(fr.room_number, '') AS room_number,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.final_money, 0)) AS total_receivable,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.real_money, 0)) AS total_paid,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.debt_money, 0)) AS total_debt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(i.pay_status, 0) IN (1, 2, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_bill_count,
    MAX(i.collection_date) AS latest_due_date
  FROM qft_focus_tenants t
  INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants_income i
    ON i.tenants_id = t.id
   AND i.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND IFNULL(i.is_deposit, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
    ON fh.id = i.housing_id
   AND fh.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr
    ON fr.id = i.room_id
   AND fr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND t.name = '张三'
  GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.phone, fh.house_code, fr.room_number

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone AS phone,
    '整租' AS business_type,
    wh.house_code AS house_code,
    COALESCE(wh.door_number, '') AS room_number,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.final_money, 0)) AS total_receivable,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.real_money, 0)) AS total_paid,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.debt_money, 0)) AS total_debt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(i.pay_status, 0) IN (1, 2, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_bill_count,
    MAX(i.collection_date) AS latest_due_date
  FROM qft_whole_tenants t
  INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income i
    ON i.tenants_id = t.id
   AND i.business_type = 2
   AND i.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND IFNULL(i.is_deposit, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
    ON wh.id = i.housing_id
   AND wh.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
  GROUP BY t.id, t.tenants_name, t.phone, wh.house_code, wh.door_number

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone AS phone,
    '合租' AS business_type,
    jh.house_code AS house_code,
    CONCAT(COALESCE(jh.door_number, ''), IF(jr.room_number IS NOT NULL AND jr.room_number <> '', CONCAT('-', jr.room_number), '')) AS room_number,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.final_money, 0)) AS total_receivable,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.real_money, 0)) AS total_paid,
    SUM(IFNULL(i.debt_money, 0)) AS total_debt,
    SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(i.pay_status, 0) IN (1, 2, 4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unpaid_bill_count,
    MAX(i.collection_date) AS latest_due_date
  FROM qft_joint_tenants t
  INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income i
    ON i.tenants_id = t.id
   AND i.business_type = 3
   AND i.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(i.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND IFNULL(i.is_deposit, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
    ON jh.id = i.housing_id
   AND jh.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr
    ON jr.id = i.room_id
   AND jr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE t.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND t.tenants_name = '张三'
  GROUP BY t.id, t.tenants_name, t.phone, jh.house_code, jh.door_number, jr.room_number
) x
ORDER BY IFNULL(x.total_debt, 0) DESC, x.latest_due_date DESC;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS stat_month,
        IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income_money,
        IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expend_money
    FROM (
        SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 5 MONTH) AS month_start
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
    ) m
    LEFT JOIN qft_finance f
        ON f.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND f.cashier = 1
       AND f.account_date >= m.month_start
       AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(m.month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    GROUP BY m.month_start

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合计' AS stat_month,
        IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income_money,
        IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expend_money
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND cashier = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 5 MONTH)
      AND account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
) t
ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.stat_month = '合计' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.stat_month;

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.area_name AS 区域,
  t.property_name AS 小区,
  t.total_rooms AS 总房间数,
  t.occupied_rooms AS 已租房间数,
  t.vacant_rooms AS 空置房间数,
  t.occupancy_rate AS 出租率,
  t.avg_vacancy_day AS 空置房平均空置天数,
  t.max_vacancy_day AS 最长空置天数,
  t.rent_level AS 租赁表现
FROM (
  SELECT
    IFNULL(a.area_name, '未分区') AS area_name,
    ap.property_adrr AS property_name,
    s.total_rooms,
    s.occupied_rooms,
    s.vacant_rooms,
    s.occupancy_rate,
    s.avg_vacancy_day,
    s.max_vacancy_day,
    CASE
      WHEN s.occupancy_rate >= 90 AND s.avg_vacancy_day <= 15 THEN '好租'
      WHEN s.occupancy_rate <= 70 OR s.avg_vacancy_day >= 45 THEN '不好租'
      ELSE '一般'
    END AS rent_level
  FROM (
    SELECT
      rp.property_id,
      COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
      SUM(rp.occupied_flag) AS occupied_rooms,
      SUM(rp.vacant_flag) AS vacant_rooms,
      ROUND(SUM(rp.occupied_flag) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate,
      ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(rp.vacancy_day), 0), 2) AS avg_vacancy_day,
      ROUND(IFNULL(MAX(rp.vacancy_day), 0), 2) AS max_vacancy_day
    FROM (
      SELECT
        h.property_adrr AS property_id,
        CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS occupied_flag,
        CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS vacant_flag,
        CASE
          WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 0 THEN GREATEST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(COALESCE(r.cumte_vacancy_start_time, r.last_time, r.create_time))), 0)
          ELSE NULL
        END AS vacancy_day
      FROM qft_focus_housing h
      JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      WHERE h.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND h.property_adrr IS NOT NULL

      UNION ALL

      SELECT
        h.property_adrr AS property_id,
        CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS occupied_flag,
        CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS vacant_flag,
        CASE
          WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 0 THEN GREATEST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(COALESCE(r.cumte_vacancy_start_time, r.last_time, r.create_time))), 0)
          ELSE NULL
        END AS vacancy_day
      FROM qft_whole_housing h
      JOIN qft_whole_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      WHERE h.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND h.property_adrr IS NOT NULL

      UNION ALL

      SELECT
        h.property_adrr AS property_id,
        CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS occupied_flag,
        CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS vacant_flag,
        CASE
          WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 0 THEN GREATEST(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(COALESCE(r.cumte_vacancy_start_time, r.last_time, r.create_time))), 0)
          ELSE NULL
        END AS vacancy_day
      FROM qft_joint_housing h
      JOIN qft_joint_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      WHERE h.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND h.property_adrr IS NOT NULL
    ) rp
    GROUP BY rp.property_id
  ) s
  JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON ap.id = s.property_id
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_area a
    ON a.id = ap.area_id
   AND a.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(a.is_delete, 0) = 0
) t
WHERE t.rent_level IN ('好租', '不好租')
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN t.rent_level = '好租' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
  CASE WHEN t.rent_level = '好租' THEN t.occupancy_rate END DESC,
  CASE WHEN t.rent_level = '好租' THEN t.avg_vacancy_day END ASC,
  CASE WHEN t.rent_level = '不好租' THEN t.occupancy_rate END ASC,
  CASE WHEN t.rent_level = '不好租' THEN t.avg_vacancy_day END DESC,
  t.total_rooms DESC;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    SUM(r.total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
    SUM(r.rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms,
    ROUND(CASE WHEN SUM(r.total_rooms) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(r.rented_rooms) / SUM(r.total_rooms) * 100 END, 2) AS rental_rate
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY fr.store_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        wh.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wr.housing_id = wh.id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY wh.store_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jr.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY jr.store_id
) r
    ON s.id = r.store_id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
HAVING SUM(r.total_rooms) > 0
ORDER BY rental_rate DESC, rented_rooms DESC, total_rooms DESC
LIMIT 3;

    ON b.bill_code = fi.bill_code

   AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.sale_type = 2
  AND b.trade_type = 1
  AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
  AND f.nature = 1
  AND f.source_type = 2
  AND f.cashier = 1
  AND COALESCE(f.cashier_time, f.account_date) >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH);

results.question: 每个门店的维修单情况怎么样？哪个最多？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    a.store_id,
    a.store_name,
    a.repair_order_count,
    a.completed_count,
    a.unfinished_count,
    a.unreceived_count,
    a.received_count,
    a.unvisited_count,
    a.visited_count,
    CASE WHEN a.repair_order_count = m.max_repair_order_count THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_max_repair_order,
    m.max_repair_order_count
FROM (
    SELECT
        s.id AS store_id,
        s.name AS store_name,
        COUNT(r.id) AS repair_order_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.repair_status IN (1, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unfinished_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.receive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unreceived_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.receive = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS received_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.return_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unvisited_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.return_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS visited_count
    FROM qft_store s
    LEFT JOIN qft_room_repair r
        ON r.store_id = s.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE s.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY s.id, s.name
) a
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(t.repair_order_count) AS max_repair_order_count
    FROM (
        SELECT
            s.id AS store_id,
            COUNT(r.id) AS repair_order_count
        FROM qft_store s
        LEFT JOIN qft_room_repair r
            ON r.store_id = s.id
           AND r.company_id = 1001
           AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE s.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY s.id
    ) t
) m
ORDER BY a.repair_order_count DESC, a.store_id ASC;

results.question: 整租的收房价和出房价差价多少？哪套赚得最多？
results.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        wh.id AS 房源ID,
        wh.house_code AS 房源编号,
        CONCAT_WS('', IFNULL(ap.property_adrr, ''), IFNULL(wh.building, ''), IFNULL(wh.unit_name, ''), IFNULL(wh.door_number, '')) AS 房源地址,
        wh.joe_price AS 收房价,
        wt.lease_price AS 出房价,
        ROUND(IFNULL(wt.lease_price, 0) - IFNULL(wh.joe_price, 0), 2) AS 差价,
        wt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
        wt.lease_starttime AS 租期开始,
        wt.lease_endtime AS 租期结束
    FROM qft_whole_housing wh
    JOIN qft_whole_room wr
        ON wr.housing_id = wh.id
       AND wr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wr.is_lease, 0) IN (1, 2)
    JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt
        ON wt.room_id = wr.id
       AND wt.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wt.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
       AND wt.id = (
            SELECT wt2.id
            FROM qft_whole_tenants wt2
            WHERE wt2.room_id = wr.id
              AND wt2.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(wt2.is_delete, 0) = 0
              AND IFNULL(wt2.transfer_status, 0) <> 1
            ORDER BY
                CASE
                    WHEN NOW() BETWEEN wt2.lease_starttime AND wt2.lease_endtime THEN 0
                    ELSE 1
                END,
                IFNULL(wt2.register_time, wt2.create_time) DESC,
                wt2.id DESC
            LIMIT 1
       )
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON ap.id = wh.property_adrr
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
)
SELECT
    房源ID,
    房源编号,
    房源地址,
    收房价,
    出房价,
    差价,
    ROUND(SUM(差价) OVER (), 2) AS 整租总差价,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY 差价 DESC, 房源ID ASC) AS 赚钱排名,
    租客姓名,
    租期开始,
    租期结束
FROM base
ORDER BY 差价 DESC, 房源ID ASC;

results.question: 智能电表的充值记录统计一下，谁充的最多？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  CASE r.sale_type
    WHEN 1 THEN '集中'
    WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
    WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
  END AS sale_type_name,
  r.tenant_id,
  COALESCE(ft.name, wt.tenants_name, jt.tenants_name, u.realname, u.account, CONCAT('对象ID:', IFNULL(r.tenant_id, r.creater_id))) AS recharge_user_name,
  COALESCE(ft.phone, wt.phone, jt.phone, u.phone) AS recharge_user_phone,
  COUNT(1) AS recharge_count,
  SUM(r.recharge_amount) AS total_recharge_amount,
  SUM(r.recharge_electricity) AS total_recharge_electricity
FROM qft_smart_electricity_meter_recharge_record r
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
  ON r.sale_type = 1
 AND r.tenant_id = ft.id
 AND ft.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt
  ON r.sale_type = 2
 AND r.tenant_id = wt.id
 AND wt.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
  ON r.sale_type = 3
 AND r.tenant_id = jt.id
 AND jt.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_user u
  ON r.creater_id = u.id
 AND u.company_id = 1001
 AND IFNULL(u.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE r.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY
  r.sale_type,
  r.tenant_id,
  COALESCE(ft.name, wt.tenants_name, jt.tenants_name, u.realname, u.account, CONCAT('对象ID:', IFNULL(r.tenant_id, r.creater_id))),
  COALESCE(ft.phone, wt.phone, jt.phone, u.phone)
ORDER BY total_recharge_amount DESC, recharge_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: 哪些合租租客有欠费？按欠费金额排个序。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    jt.id AS tenant_id,
    jt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    jt.phone AS tenant_phone,
    jh.house_code,
    jr.room_number,
    COUNT(jti.id) AS arrears_bill_count,
    MIN(jti.collection_date) AS first_collection_date,
    MAX(jti.collection_date) AS last_collection_date,
    SUM(IFNULL(jti.debt_money, 0)) AS total_debt_money
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
    ON jti.tenants_id = jt.id
   AND jt.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr
    ON jt.room_id = jr.id
   AND jr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
    ON jti.housing_id = jh.id
   AND jh.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(jti.is_history, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(jti.business_type, 0) = 3
  AND IFNULL(jti.debt_money, 0) > 0
GROUP BY
    jt.id,
    jt.tenants_name,
    jt.phone,
    jh.house_code,
    jr.room_number
ORDER BY total_debt_money DESC, arrears_bill_count DESC, jt.id DESC;

results.question: 退房的租客都是什么原因退的？有没有违约的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  x.result_type,
  x.check_out_type_name,
  x.check_out_reason,
  x.check_out_count,
  x.default_count,
  x.has_default_checkout
FROM (
  SELECT
    '汇总' AS result_type,
    '全部' AS check_out_type_name,
    '全部' AS check_out_reason,
    COUNT(*) AS check_out_count,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN tco.check_out_type = 3
          OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0
          OR IFNULL(tco.defaulting_profit, 0) > 0
        THEN 1 ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS default_count,
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN tco.check_out_type = 3
            OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0
            OR IFNULL(tco.defaulting_profit, 0) > 0
          THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END
      ) > 0 THEN '有'
      ELSE '没有'
    END AS has_default_checkout,
    0 AS result_sort,
    0 AS type_sort
  FROM qft_tenants_check_out tco
  WHERE tco.company_id = 1001
    AND tco.is_delete = 0

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '原因明细' AS result_type,
    CASE tco.check_out_type
      WHEN 1 THEN '正常退房'
      WHEN 2 THEN '没有签成'
      WHEN 3 THEN '违约退房'
      WHEN 4 THEN '提前退房'
      WHEN 5 THEN '换房'
      ELSE '其他'
    END AS check_out_type_name,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(tco.check_out_reason, '')), ''), '未填写') AS check_out_reason,
    COUNT(*) AS check_out_count,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN tco.check_out_type = 3
          OR IFNULL(tco.liquidated_damages, 0) > 0
          OR IFNULL(tco.defaulting_profit, 0) > 0
        THEN 1 ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS default_count,
    '' AS has_default_checkout,
    1 AS result_sort,
    tco.check_out_type AS type_sort
  FROM qft_tenants_check_out tco
  WHERE tco.company_id = 1001
    AND tco.is_delete = 0
  GROUP BY
    tco.check_out_type,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(tco.check_out_reason, '')), ''), '未填写')
) AS x
ORDER BY
  x.result_sort ASC,
  x.check_out_count DESC,
  x.type_sort ASC;

    WHEN whole_actual_profit < joint_actual_profit THEN '合租'
    ELSE '持平'
  END AS actual_more_profitable,
  CASE
    WHEN whole_expected_profit > joint_expected_profit THEN '整租'
    WHEN whole_expected_profit < joint_expected_profit THEN '合租'
    ELSE '持平'
  END AS expected_more_profitable,
  whole_expected_income,
  whole_expected_expend,
  whole_expected_profit,
  whole_actual_income,
  whole_actual_expend,
  whole_actual_profit,
  joint_expected_income,
  joint_expected_expend,
  joint_expected_profit,
  joint_actual_income,
  joint_actual_expend,
  joint_actual_profit,
  ABS(whole_actual_profit - joint_actual_profit) AS actual_profit_gap,
  ABS(whole_expected_profit - joint_expected_profit) AS expected_profit_gap
FROM (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((
      SELECT SUM(final_money)
      FROM qft_joint_tenants_income

      WHERE company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0

    ), 0) AS whole_actual_profit,

        AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0

results.question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH store_base AS (
    SELECT
        id AS store_id,
        name AS store_name
    FROM qft_store
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
),
housing_stats AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms
    FROM (
        SELECT
            store_id,
            IFNULL(room_count, 0) AS total_rooms,
            GREATEST(IFNULL(room_count, 0) - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0), 0) AS rented_rooms
        FROM qft_focus_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(is_check_out, 0) = 0

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            store_id,
            IFNULL(room_count, 0) AS total_rooms,
            GREATEST(IFNULL(room_count, 0) - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0), 0) AS rented_rooms
        FROM qft_whole_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(is_check_out, 0) = 0

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            store_id,
            IFNULL(room_count, 0) AS total_rooms,
            GREATEST(IFNULL(room_count, 0) - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0), 0) AS rented_rooms
        FROM qft_joint_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(is_check_out, 0) = 0
    ) t
    GROUP BY store_id
),
income_12m AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(money, 0)), 2) AS income_12m
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND nature = 1
      AND cashier = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    GROUP BY store_id
),
arrears_12m AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(final_money, 0)), 2) AS receivable_12m,
        ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(debt_money, 0)), 2) AS arrears_amount_12m,
        SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(debt_money, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS arrears_bill_count_12m
    FROM (
        SELECT
            store_id,
            final_money,
            debt_money
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
          AND collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            store_id,
            final_money,
            debt_money
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(is_history, 0) = 0
          AND collection_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    ) b
    GROUP BY store_id
),
store_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        sb.store_id,
        sb.store_name,
        IFNULL(hs.total_rooms, 0) AS total_rooms,
        IFNULL(hs.rented_rooms, 0) AS rented_rooms,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(hs.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE IFNULL(hs.rented_rooms, 0) / IFNULL(hs.total_rooms, 0)
            END,
            4
        ) AS rental_rate,
        IFNULL(i.income_12m, 0) AS income_12m,
        IFNULL(a.receivable_12m, 0) AS receivable_12m,
        IFNULL(a.arrears_amount_12m, 0) AS arrears_amount_12m,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(a.receivable_12m, 0) = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE IFNULL(a.arrears_amount_12m, 0) / IFNULL(a.receivable_12m, 0)
            END,
            4
        ) AS arrears_rate_12m,
        IFNULL(a.arrears_bill_count_12m, 0) AS arrears_bill_count_12m
    FROM store_base sb
    LEFT JOIN housing_stats hs
        ON hs.store_id = sb.store_id
    LEFT JOIN income_12m i
        ON i.store_id = sb.store_id
    LEFT JOIN arrears_12m a
        ON a.store_id = sb.store_id
),
scored AS (
    SELECT
        sm.*,
        ROUND(
            (1 - sm.rental_rate) * 40
            + CASE
                WHEN MAX(sm.income_12m) OVER () = MIN(sm.income_12m) OVER () THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    1 - (sm.income_12m - MIN(sm.income_12m) OVER ())
                    / NULLIF(MAX(sm.income_12m) OVER () - MIN(sm.income_12m) OVER (), 0)
                ) * 30
              END
            + CASE
                WHEN MAX(sm.arrears_amount_12m) OVER () = MIN(sm.arrears_amount_12m) OVER () THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    (sm.arrears_amount_12m - MIN(sm.arrears_amount_12m) OVER ())
                    / NULLIF(MAX(sm.arrears_amount_12m) OVER () - MIN(sm.arrears_amount_12m) OVER (), 0)
                ) * 20
              END
            + sm.arrears_rate_12m * 10,
            2
        ) AS worst_score
    FROM store_metrics sm
    WHERE sm.total_rooms > 0
       OR sm.income_12m > 0
       OR sm.receivable_12m > 0
       OR sm.arrears_amount_12m > 0
)
SELECT
    store_id,
    store_name,
    total_rooms,
    rented_rooms,
    CONCAT(ROUND(rental_rate * 100, 2), '%') AS rental_rate,
    income_12m,
    receivable_12m,
    arrears_amount_12m,
    CONCAT(ROUND(arrears_rate_12m * 100, 2), '%') AS arrears_rate_12m,
    arrears_bill_count_12m,
    worst_score,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
        ORDER BY worst_score DESC, rental_rate ASC, income_12m ASC, arrears_amount_12m DESC
    ) AS worst_rank
FROM scored
ORDER BY worst_rank ASC, worst_score DESC, rental_rate ASC, income_12m ASC, arrears_amount_12m DESC;

        h.house_code,
        CONCAT_WS(' ', ap.property_adrr, h.building, h.unit_name, h.door_number) AS full_address,

    LEFT JOIN qft_whole_tenants t

       AND IFNULL(t.is_delete,0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_whole_housing h
        ON i.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete,0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE i.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(i.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND i.business_type = 2
      AND i.collection_date IS NOT NULL
      AND i.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
      AND i.real_pay_date > i.collection_date
      AND IFNULL(i.real_money,0) > 0
      AND i.pay_status IN (2,3)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_type,
        i.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
        t.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
        t.phone AS tenant_phone,
        h.house_code,
        CONCAT_WS(' ', ap.property_adrr, h.building, h.unit_name, h.door_number, r.room_number) AS full_address,
        i.id AS bill_id,
        i.collection_date,
        i.real_pay_date AS actual_pay_date,
        i.final_money,
        i.real_money,
        i.debt_money,
        i.pay_status
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
    LEFT JOIN qft_joint_tenants t
        ON i.tenants_id = t.id
       AND t.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(t.is_delete,0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing h
        ON i.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete,0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room r
        ON i.room_id = r.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(r.is_delete,0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE i.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(i.is_delete,0) = 0
      AND i.business_type = 3
      AND i.collection_date IS NOT NULL
      AND i.real_pay_date IS NOT NULL
      AND i.real_pay_date > i.collection_date
      AND IFNULL(i.real_money,0) > 0
      AND i.pay_status IN (2,3)
) x
ORDER BY overdue_days DESC, x.actual_pay_date DESC;

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.generated_sql:
WITH target_stores AS (
    SELECT
        s.id,
        s.name
    FROM qft_store s
    WHERE s.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ORDER BY IFNULL(s.store_sort, 999999), s.id
    LIMIT 3
),
rent_source AS (
    SELECT
        fh.store_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(fh.room_count, 0)) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(GREATEST(IFNULL(fh.room_count, 0) - IFNULL(fh.rest_room_count, 0), 0)) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_housing fh
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts ON ts.id = fh.store_id
    WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY fh.store_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        wh.store_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(wh.room_count, 0)) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(GREATEST(IFNULL(wh.room_count, 0) - IFNULL(wh.rest_room_count, 0), 0)) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_whole_housing wh
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts ON ts.id = wh.store_id
    WHERE wh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY wh.store_id

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jh.store_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(jh.room_count, 0)) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(GREATEST(IFNULL(jh.room_count, 0) - IFNULL(jh.rest_room_count, 0), 0)) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_joint_housing jh
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts ON ts.id = jh.store_id
    WHERE jh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY jh.store_id
),
rent_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(total_rooms) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(SUM(rented_rooms) / SUM(total_rooms), 4)
        END AS rental_rate
    FROM rent_source
    GROUP BY store_id
),
income_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        f.store_id,
        ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(f.money, 0)), 2) AS income_30d
    FROM qft_finance f
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts ON ts.id = f.store_id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND IFNULL(f.cashier, 0) = 1
      AND f.account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    GROUP BY f.store_id
),
arrears_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(b.total_trade_money, 0)), 2) AS receivable_total,
        ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0)), 2) AS debt_total,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(IFNULL(b.total_trade_money, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(b.total_trade_money, 0)), 4)
        END AS arrears_rate
    FROM qft_bill b
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts ON ts.id = b.store_id
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND b.trade_date <= NOW()
    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
repair_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        rr.store_id,
        COUNT(1) AS repair_count_30d,
        ROUND(AVG(
            CASE
                WHEN rr.receive_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, rr.create_time, rr.receive_time)
                ELSE TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, rr.create_time, NOW())
            END
        ), 2) AS avg_response_hours
    FROM qft_room_repair rr
    INNER JOIN target_stores ts ON ts.id = rr.store_id
    WHERE rr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(rr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND rr.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND rr.create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    GROUP BY rr.store_id
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        ts.id AS store_id,
        ts.name AS store_name,
        COALESCE(rm.total_rooms, 0) AS total_rooms,
        COALESCE(rm.rented_rooms, 0) AS rented_rooms,
        COALESCE(rm.rental_rate, 0) AS rental_rate,
        COALESCE(im.income_30d, 0) AS income_30d,
        COALESCE(am.receivable_total, 0) AS receivable_total,
        COALESCE(am.debt_total, 0) AS debt_total,
        COALESCE(am.arrears_rate, 0) AS arrears_rate,
        COALESCE(repm.repair_count_30d, 0) AS repair_count_30d,
        repm.avg_response_hours
    FROM target_stores ts
    LEFT JOIN rent_metrics rm ON rm.store_id = ts.id
    LEFT JOIN income_metrics im ON im.store_id = ts.id
    LEFT JOIN arrears_metrics am ON am.store_id = ts.id
    LEFT JOIN repair_metrics repm ON repm.store_id = ts.id
),
score_base AS (
    SELECT
        b.*,
        ROUND(LEAST(30, GREATEST(0, b.rental_rate * 30)), 2) AS rental_score,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN MAX(b.income_30d) OVER () = 0 THEN 0
                ELSE LEAST(25, GREATEST(0, b.income_30d / MAX(b.income_30d) OVER () * 25))
            END,
            2
        ) AS income_score,
        ROUND(LEAST(25, GREATEST(0, (1 - b.arrears_rate) * 25)), 2) AS arrears_score,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN b.repair_count_30d = 0 THEN 20
                ELSE LEAST(20, GREATEST(0, 20 * (1 - IFNULL(b.avg_response_hours, 48) / 48)))
            END,
            2
        ) AS repair_score
    FROM base b
)
SELECT
    store_id,
    store_name,
    total_rooms,
    rented_rooms,
    ROUND(rental_rate * 100, 2) AS rental_rate_pct,
    income_30d,
    receivable_total,
    debt_total,
    ROUND(arrears_rate * 100, 2) AS arrears_rate_pct,
    repair_count_30d,
    avg_response_hours,
    rental_score,
    income_score,
    arrears_score,
    repair_score,
    ROUND(rental_score + income_score + arrears_score + repair_score, 2) AS health_score
FROM score_base
ORDER BY health_score DESC, store_id ASC;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？

SELECT

    ROUND(IFNULL(rt.rent_received, 0) - IFNULL(r.renovation_cost, 0), 2) AS net_return,

        CASE

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。
results.generated_sql:
WITH month_range AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY) AS month_start,
        DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS next_month
),
new_sign_base AS (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,
        CONCAT('focus_', fti.tenant_id) AS tenant_key
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_info fti
    JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
        ON ft.id = fti.tenant_id
       AND ft.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_room fr
        ON fr.id = ft.room_id
       AND fr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    CROSS JOIN month_range mr
    WHERE fti.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fti.tenants_contract_nature, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(ft.register_time, fti.create_time) >= mr.month_start
      AND COALESCE(ft.register_time, fti.create_time) < mr.next_month

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        wh.store_id,
        CONCAT('whole_', wt.id) AS tenant_key
    FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
    JOIN qft_whole_room wr
        ON wr.id = wt.room_id
       AND wr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    CROSS JOIN month_range mr
    WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(wt.tenants_contract_nature, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(wt.register_time, wt.create_time) >= mr.month_start
      AND COALESCE(wt.register_time, wt.create_time) < mr.next_month

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jh.store_id,
        CONCAT('joint_', jt.id) AS tenant_key
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    JOIN qft_joint_room jr
        ON jr.id = jt.room_id
       AND jr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    CROSS JOIN month_range mr
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jt.tenants_contract_nature, 0) = 1
      AND COALESCE(jt.register_time, jt.create_time) >= mr.month_start
      AND COALESCE(jt.register_time, jt.create_time) < mr.next_month
),
new_sign AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_key) AS current_month_new_sign_tenants
    FROM new_sign_base
    GROUP BY store_id
),
old_active_base AS (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,
        CONCAT('focus_', fti.tenant_id) AS tenant_key
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_info fti
    JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
        ON ft.id = fti.tenant_id
       AND ft.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_room fr
        ON fr.id = ft.room_id
       AND fr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    CROSS JOIN month_range mr
    WHERE fti.company_id = 1001
      AND COALESCE(ft.register_time, fti.create_time) < mr.month_start
      AND COALESCE(fti.lease_endtime, fti.virtual_endtime, '9999-12-31 23:59:59') >= CURDATE()

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        wh.store_id,
        CONCAT('whole_', wt.id) AS tenant_key
    FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
    JOIN qft_whole_room wr
        ON wr.id = wt.room_id
       AND wr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    CROSS JOIN month_range mr
    WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND COALESCE(wt.register_time, wt.create_time) < mr.month_start
      AND COALESCE(wt.lease_endtime, wt.virtual_endtime, '9999-12-31 23:59:59') >= CURDATE()

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        jh.store_id,
        CONCAT('joint_', jt.id) AS tenant_key
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    JOIN qft_joint_room jr
        ON jr.id = jt.room_id
       AND jr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    CROSS JOIN month_range mr
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND COALESCE(jt.register_time, jt.create_time) < mr.month_start
      AND COALESCE(jt.lease_endtime, jt.virtual_endtime, '9999-12-31 23:59:59') >= CURDATE()
),
old_active AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_key) AS old_active_tenants
    FROM old_active_base
    GROUP BY store_id
),
store_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        s.id AS store_id,
        s.name AS store_name,
        COALESCE(n.current_month_new_sign_tenants, 0) AS current_month_new_sign_tenants,
        COALESCE(o.old_active_tenants, 0) AS old_active_tenants
    FROM qft_store s
    LEFT JOIN new_sign n
        ON n.store_id = s.id
    LEFT JOIN old_active o
        ON o.store_id = s.id
    WHERE s.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
)
SELECT
    store_id,
    store_name,
    current_month_new_sign_tenants,
    old_active_tenants,
    old_active_tenants - current_month_new_sign_tenants AS old_active_minus_new_sign,
    ROUND(old_active_tenants / NULLIF(current_month_new_sign_tenants, 0), 2) AS old_to_new_ratio
FROM store_metrics
WHERE old_active_tenants > 0
  AND old_active_tenants > current_month_new_sign_tenants
ORDER BY current_month_new_sign_tenants ASC, old_active_tenants DESC, store_id;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_stats AS (
    SELECT
        1 AS business_type,
        '集中' AS business_name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_units,
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_units
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fh.id = fr.housing_id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS business_type,
        '整租' AS business_name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_units,
        SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_units
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh
        ON wh.id = wr.housing_id
       AND wh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(wh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        3 AS business_type,
        '合租' AS business_name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_units,
        SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_units
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.id = jr.housing_id
       AND jh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND IFNULL(jh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
),
bill_stats AS (
    SELECT
        b.sale_type AS business_type,
        SUM(IFNULL(b.total_trade_money, 0)) AS due_receivable_amount,
        SUM(IFNULL(b.total_real_money, 0)) AS collected_amount,
        SUM(IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0)) AS outstanding_amount
    FROM qft_bill b
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
      AND b.trade_date <= NOW()
    GROUP BY b.sale_type
),
combined AS (
    SELECT
        rs.business_type,
        rs.business_name,
        rs.total_units,
        rs.rented_units,
        rs.total_units - rs.rented_units AS vacant_units,
        IFNULL(bs.due_receivable_amount, 0) AS due_receivable_amount,
        IFNULL(bs.collected_amount, 0) AS collected_amount,
        IFNULL(bs.outstanding_amount, 0) AS outstanding_amount
    FROM room_stats rs
    LEFT JOIN bill_stats bs
        ON bs.business_type = rs.business_type
),
all_stats AS (
    SELECT
        0 AS business_type,
        '整体' AS business_name,
        SUM(total_units) AS total_units,
        SUM(rented_units) AS rented_units,
        SUM(vacant_units) AS vacant_units,
        SUM(due_receivable_amount) AS due_receivable_amount,
        SUM(collected_amount) AS collected_amount,
        SUM(outstanding_amount) AS outstanding_amount
    FROM combined

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        business_type,
        business_name,
        total_units,
        rented_units,
        vacant_units,
        due_receivable_amount,
        collected_amount,
        outstanding_amount
    FROM combined
),
metrics AS (
    SELECT
        business_type,
        business_name,
        total_units,
        rented_units,
        vacant_units,
        ROUND(CASE WHEN total_units = 0 THEN 0 ELSE rented_units / total_units * 100 END, 2) AS rental_rate,
        ROUND(CASE WHEN total_units = 0 THEN 0 ELSE vacant_units / total_units * 100 END, 2) AS vacancy_rate,
        due_receivable_amount,
        collected_amount,
        outstanding_amount,
        ROUND(CASE WHEN due_receivable_amount = 0 THEN 100 ELSE collected_amount / due_receivable_amount * 100 END, 2) AS collection_rate,
        CASE
            WHEN total_units = 0 AND due_receivable_amount = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE ROUND((
                (CASE WHEN total_units = 0 THEN 0 ELSE rented_units / total_units END) * 0.6 +
                (CASE WHEN due_receivable_amount = 0 THEN 1 ELSE collected_amount / due_receivable_amount END) * 0.4
            ) * 100, 2)
        END AS health_score
    FROM all_stats
)
SELECT
    business_name,
    total_units,
    rented_units,
    vacant_units,
    rental_rate,
    vacancy_rate,
    due_receivable_amount,
    collected_amount,
    outstanding_amount,
    collection_rate,
    health_score,
    CASE
        WHEN total_units = 0 AND due_receivable_amount = 0 THEN '无有效经营数据'
        WHEN rental_rate >= 90 AND collection_rate >= 90 AND vacancy_rate <= 10 THEN '优秀'
        WHEN rental_rate >= 80 AND collection_rate >= 85 AND vacancy_rate <= 20 THEN '良好'
        WHEN rental_rate >= 70 AND collection_rate >= 75 AND vacancy_rate <= 30 THEN '一般'
        ELSE '待改善'
    END AS health_level,
    CASE
        WHEN total_units = 0 AND due_receivable_amount = 0 THEN '当前无可评估的经营数据'
        WHEN rental_rate >= 90 AND collection_rate >= 90 AND vacancy_rate <= 10 THEN '出租高、空置低、回款强，整体经营健康'
        WHEN collection_rate < 75 THEN '回款压力较大，需优先加强逾期催收与账单管理'
        WHEN vacancy_rate > 20 THEN '空置压力较大，需优先提升招租与去化效率'
        ELSE '经营表现较稳定，建议持续优化出租与回款节奏'
    END AS evaluation
FROM metrics
ORDER BY business_type;

results.question: 城东门店合租的欠费租客有谁？欠的是哪间房？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
  jt.phone AS 联系电话,
  jh.house_code AS 房源编号,
  jr.room_number AS 房间号,
  CONCAT(
    IFNULL(ap.property_adrr, ''),
    IFNULL(jh.building, ''),
    IFNULL(jh.unit_name, ''),
    IFNULL(jh.door_number, ''),
    CASE
      WHEN IFNULL(jr.room_number, '') <> '' THEN CONCAT('-', jr.room_number)
      ELSE ''
    END
  ) AS 欠费房间,
  SUM(IFNULL(jti.debt_money, 0)) AS 欠费金额
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
INNER JOIN qft_store s
  ON s.id = jti.store_id
  AND s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
  ON jt.id = jti.tenants_id
  AND jt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_room jr
  ON jr.id = jti.room_id
  AND jr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
  ON jh.id = jti.housing_id
  AND jh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
  ON ap.id = jh.property_adrr
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE jti.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND s.name = '城东门店'
  AND jti.business_type = 3
  AND IFNULL(jti.is_history, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(jti.debt_money, 0) > 0
GROUP BY
  jt.id,
  jt.tenants_name,
  jt.phone,
  jh.house_code,
  jr.room_number,
  ap.property_adrr,
  jh.building,
  jh.unit_name,
  jh.door_number
ORDER BY
  SUM(IFNULL(jti.debt_money, 0)) DESC,
  jt.tenants_name ASC;

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.result_type,
  t.contract_term,
  t.housing_count,
  t.avg_actual_term_days,
  t.housing_id,
  t.house_code,
  t.property_address,
  t.building,
  t.unit_name,
  t.door_number,
  t.hosting_create_time,
  t.hosting_end_time,
  t.actual_term_days,
  t.remaining_days,
  t.store_name
FROM (
  SELECT
    '托管期限统计' AS result_type,
    CONCAT(g.contract_year, '年', g.contract_month, '月', g.contract_day, '天') AS contract_term,
    g.housing_count,
    g.avg_actual_term_days,
    NULL AS housing_id,
    NULL AS house_code,
    NULL AS property_address,
    NULL AS building,
    NULL AS unit_name,
    NULL AS door_number,
    NULL AS hosting_create_time,
    NULL AS hosting_end_time,
    NULL AS actual_term_days,
    NULL AS remaining_days,
    NULL AS store_name,
    1 AS sort_flag,
    g.contract_year AS sort_year,
    g.contract_month AS sort_month,
    g.contract_day AS sort_day,
    NULL AS sort_end_time,
    NULL AS sort_id
  FROM (
    SELECT
      IFNULL(h.contract_year, 0) AS contract_year,
      IFNULL(h.contract_month, 0) AS contract_month,
      IFNULL(h.contract_day, 0) AS contract_day,
      COUNT(*) AS housing_count,
      ROUND(
        AVG(
          CASE
            WHEN h.hosting_create_time IS NOT NULL
             AND h.hosting_end_time IS NOT NULL
            THEN DATEDIFF(DATE(h.hosting_end_time), DATE(h.hosting_create_time))
            ELSE NULL
          END
        ),
        2
      ) AS avg_actual_term_days
    FROM qft_whole_housing h
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY
      IFNULL(h.contract_year, 0),
      IFNULL(h.contract_month, 0),
      IFNULL(h.contract_day, 0)
  ) g

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '30天内快到期房源' AS result_type,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(h.contract_year, 0), '年', IFNULL(h.contract_month, 0), '月', IFNULL(h.contract_day, 0), '天') AS contract_term,
    NULL AS housing_count,
    NULL AS avg_actual_term_days,
    h.id AS housing_id,
    h.house_code,
    CONCAT_WS('-', NULLIF(ap.property_adrr, ''), NULLIF(ap.detail_address, '')) AS property_address,
    h.building,
    h.unit_name,
    h.door_number,
    h.hosting_create_time,
    h.hosting_end_time,
    CASE
      WHEN h.hosting_create_time IS NOT NULL
       AND h.hosting_end_time IS NOT NULL
      THEN DATEDIFF(DATE(h.hosting_end_time), DATE(h.hosting_create_time))
      ELSE NULL
    END AS actual_term_days,
    DATEDIFF(DATE(h.hosting_end_time), CURDATE()) AS remaining_days,
    s.name AS store_name,
    2 AS sort_flag,
    NULL AS sort_year,
    NULL AS sort_month,
    NULL AS sort_day,
    h.hosting_end_time AS sort_end_time,
    h.id AS sort_id
  FROM qft_whole_housing h
  LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
    ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
   AND ap.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  LEFT JOIN qft_store s
    ON h.store_id = s.id
   AND s.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
  WHERE h.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND h.hosting_end_time IS NOT NULL
    AND DATEDIFF(DATE(h.hosting_end_time), CURDATE()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30
) t
ORDER BY
  t.sort_flag,
  t.sort_year,
  t.sort_month,
  t.sort_day,
  t.remaining_days,
  t.sort_end_time,
  t.sort_id;
