results.question: 集中式和合租哪个更划算？从投入和收益两方面分析。
results.generated_sql:
WITH biz AS (
    SELECT
        '集中式' AS business_model,
        h.house_count,
        r.room_count,
        i.operating_receivable,
        i.operating_received,
        i.deposit_receivable,
        i.deposit_received,
        e.operating_payable,
        e.operating_paid,
        e.deposit_payable,
        e.deposit_paid,
        rn.renovation_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(1) AS house_count
        FROM qft_focus_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
    ) h
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT COUNT(1) AS room_count
        FROM qft_focus_room
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
    ) r
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_receivable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_received,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_receivable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_received
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
          AND is_history = 0
    ) i
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_payable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_paid,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_payable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_paid
        FROM qft_focus_bill_expend
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
          AND is_history = 0
    ) e
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT SUM(IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) AS renovation_cost
        FROM qft_rm_renovation_record
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
          AND business_type = 1
    ) rn

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_model,
        h.house_count,
        r.room_count,
        i.operating_receivable,
        i.operating_received,
        i.deposit_receivable,
        i.deposit_received,
        e.operating_payable,
        e.operating_paid,
        e.deposit_payable,
        e.deposit_paid,
        rn.renovation_cost
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(1) AS house_count
        FROM qft_joint_housing
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
    ) h
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT COUNT(1) AS room_count
        FROM qft_joint_room
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
    ) r
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_receivable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_received,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_receivable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_received
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
          AND is_history = 0
          AND business_type = 3
    ) i
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_payable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 0 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS operating_paid,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(final_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_payable,
            SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(is_deposit, 0) = 1 THEN IFNULL(real_money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS deposit_paid
        FROM qft_joint_bill_expend
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
          AND is_history = 0
    ) e
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT SUM(IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) AS renovation_cost
        FROM qft_rm_renovation_record
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND is_delete = 0
          AND business_type = 3
    ) rn
),
calc AS (
    SELECT
        business_model,
        house_count,
        room_count,
        IFNULL(operating_receivable, 0) AS operating_receivable,
        IFNULL(operating_received, 0) AS operating_received,
        IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) AS operating_payable,
        IFNULL(operating_paid, 0) AS operating_paid,
        IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0) AS renovation_cost,
        IFNULL(deposit_receivable, 0) AS deposit_receivable,
        IFNULL(deposit_received, 0) AS deposit_received,
        IFNULL(deposit_payable, 0) AS deposit_payable,
        IFNULL(deposit_paid, 0) AS deposit_paid,
        IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) + IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0) AS total_input_by_due,
        IFNULL(operating_paid, 0) + IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0) AS total_input_by_paid,
        IFNULL(operating_receivable, 0) - IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) - IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0) AS net_profit_by_due,
        IFNULL(operating_received, 0) - IFNULL(operating_paid, 0) - IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0) AS net_profit_by_paid,
        (IFNULL(operating_receivable, 0) - IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) - IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) / NULLIF(IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) + IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0), 0) AS roi_by_due,
        (IFNULL(operating_received, 0) - IFNULL(operating_paid, 0) - IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) / NULLIF(IFNULL(operating_paid, 0) + IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0), 0) AS roi_by_paid,
        (IFNULL(operating_receivable, 0) - IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) - IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) / NULLIF(IFNULL(operating_receivable, 0), 0) AS profit_margin_by_due,
        (IFNULL(operating_received, 0) - IFNULL(operating_paid, 0) - IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) / NULLIF(IFNULL(operating_received, 0), 0) AS profit_margin_by_paid,
        (IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) + IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) / NULLIF(room_count, 0) AS avg_input_per_room,
        IFNULL(operating_receivable, 0) / NULLIF(room_count, 0) AS avg_revenue_per_room,
        (IFNULL(operating_receivable, 0) - IFNULL(operating_payable, 0) - IFNULL(renovation_cost, 0)) / NULLIF(room_count, 0) AS avg_profit_per_room
    FROM biz
)
SELECT
    business_model AS `业务模式`,
    house_count AS `房源数`,
    room_count AS `房间数`,
    ROUND(operating_receivable, 2) AS `经营应收`,
    ROUND(operating_received, 2) AS `经营实收`,
    ROUND(operating_payable, 2) AS `经营应支`,
    ROUND(operating_paid, 2) AS `经营实支`,
    ROUND(renovation_cost, 2) AS `装修投入`,
    ROUND(deposit_receivable, 2) AS `押金应收`,
    ROUND(deposit_received, 2) AS `押金实收`,
    ROUND(deposit_payable, 2) AS `押金应支`,
    ROUND(deposit_paid, 2) AS `押金实支`,
    ROUND(total_input_by_due, 2) AS `总投入_按应支口径`,
    ROUND(total_input_by_paid, 2) AS `总投入_按实支口径`,
    ROUND(net_profit_by_due, 2) AS `净收益_按应收应支口径`,
    ROUND(net_profit_by_paid, 2) AS `净收益_按实收实支口径`,
    ROUND(roi_by_due * 100, 2) AS `ROI_按应收应支_百分比`,
    ROUND(roi_by_paid * 100, 2) AS `ROI_按实收实支_百分比`,
    ROUND(profit_margin_by_due * 100, 2) AS `利润率_按应收应支_百分比`,
    ROUND(profit_margin_by_paid * 100, 2) AS `利润率_按实收实支_百分比`,
    ROUND(avg_input_per_room, 2) AS `单房均投入`,
    ROUND(avg_revenue_per_room, 2) AS `单房均收入`,
    ROUND(avg_profit_per_room, 2) AS `单房均净收益`
FROM calc
ORDER BY CASE business_model WHEN '集中式' THEN 1 WHEN '合租' THEN 2 ELSE 99 END;

results.question: 门锁最近的开门记录有啥异常吗？有没有凌晨被打开的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  s.early_morning_result,
  s.early_morning_open_count,
  d.id,
  d.business_type,
  d.lock_type,
  d.lock_id,
  d.open_name,
  d.open_phone,
  d.open_type,
  d.open_door_time,
  d.abnormal_type,
  d.same_lock_same_day_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN '有凌晨开门记录'
      ELSE '没有凌晨开门记录'
    END AS early_morning_result,
    COUNT(*) AS early_morning_open_count
  FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.lock_id
    FROM (
      SELECT sd.device_no AS lock_id
      FROM qft_smart_device sd
      INNER JOIN qft_house_device hd
        ON hd.device_id = sd.id
       AND hd.company_id = 1001
       AND hd.device_type = 1
       AND hd.is_delete = 0
      WHERE sd.device_type = 1
        AND sd.is_delete = 0
        AND sd.device_no IS NOT NULL

      UNION

      SELECT sd.logic_id AS lock_id
      FROM qft_smart_device sd
      INNER JOIN qft_house_device hd
        ON hd.device_id = sd.id
       AND hd.company_id = 1001
       AND hd.device_type = 1
       AND hd.is_delete = 0
      WHERE sd.device_type = 1
        AND sd.is_delete = 0
        AND sd.logic_id IS NOT NULL
    ) t
  ) vl
    ON vl.lock_id = r.lock_id
  WHERE r.company_id = 1001
    AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5
) s
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.business_type,
    r.lock_type,
    r.lock_id,
    r.open_name,
    r.open_phone,
    r.type AS open_type,
    r.open_door_time,
    CASE
      WHEN HOUR(r.open_door_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN '凌晨开门'
      WHEN HOUR(r.open_door_time) = 23 THEN '深夜开门'
      ELSE '正常'
    END AS abnormal_type,
    c.same_lock_same_day_count
  FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
  INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.lock_id
    FROM (
      SELECT sd.device_no AS lock_id
      FROM qft_smart_device sd
      INNER JOIN qft_house_device hd
        ON hd.device_id = sd.id
       AND hd.company_id = 1001
       AND hd.device_type = 1
       AND hd.is_delete = 0
      WHERE sd.device_type = 1
        AND sd.is_delete = 0
        AND sd.device_no IS NOT NULL

      UNION

      SELECT sd.logic_id AS lock_id
      FROM qft_smart_device sd
      INNER JOIN qft_house_device hd
        ON hd.device_id = sd.id
       AND hd.company_id = 1001
       AND hd.device_type = 1
       AND hd.is_delete = 0
      WHERE sd.device_type = 1
        AND sd.is_delete = 0
        AND sd.logic_id IS NOT NULL
    ) t
  ) vl
    ON vl.lock_id = r.lock_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      DATE(r2.open_door_time) AS open_date,
      r2.lock_id,
      COUNT(*) AS same_lock_same_day_count
    FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r2
    INNER JOIN (
      SELECT DISTINCT t.lock_id
      FROM (
        SELECT sd.device_no AS lock_id
        FROM qft_smart_device sd
        INNER JOIN qft_house_device hd
          ON hd.device_id = sd.id
         AND hd.company_id = 1001
         AND hd.device_type = 1
         AND hd.is_delete = 0
        WHERE sd.device_type = 1
          AND sd.is_delete = 0
          AND sd.device_no IS NOT NULL

        UNION

        SELECT sd.logic_id AS lock_id
        FROM qft_smart_device sd
        INNER JOIN qft_house_device hd
          ON hd.device_id = sd.id
         AND hd.company_id = 1001
         AND hd.device_type = 1
         AND hd.is_delete = 0
        WHERE sd.device_type = 1
          AND sd.is_delete = 0
          AND sd.logic_id IS NOT NULL
      ) t
    ) vl2
      ON vl2.lock_id = r2.lock_id
    WHERE r2.company_id = 1001
      AND r2.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND (HOUR(r2.open_door_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 OR HOUR(r2.open_door_time) = 23)
    GROUP BY DATE(r2.open_door_time), r2.lock_id
  ) c
    ON c.open_date = DATE(r.open_door_time)
   AND c.lock_id = r.lock_id
  WHERE r.company_id = 1001
    AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
    AND (HOUR(r.open_door_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 OR HOUR(r.open_door_time) = 23)
) d
  ON 1 = 1
ORDER BY d.open_door_time DESC;

results.question: 合租每间房的均价是多少？哪间最贵哪间最便宜？
results.generated_sql:
WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        jr.id AS room_id,
        jh.id AS housing_id,
        jh.house_code,
        CONCAT(
            IFNULL(ap.property_adrr, ''),
            IFNULL(jh.building, ''),
            IFNULL(jh.unit_name, ''),
            IFNULL(jh.door_number, ''),
            '-',
            IFNULL(jr.room_number, '')
        ) AS room_name,
        jr.pricing_money
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
    LEFT JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON jh.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND jh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jr.pricing_money IS NOT NULL
),
max_room AS (
    SELECT
        room_id,
        housing_id,
        house_code,
        room_name,
        pricing_money
    FROM base
    ORDER BY pricing_money DESC, room_id ASC
    LIMIT 1
),
min_room AS (
    SELECT
        room_id,
        housing_id,
        house_code,
        room_name,
        pricing_money
    FROM base
    ORDER BY pricing_money ASC, room_id ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    '均价' AS stat_type,
    ROUND(AVG(pricing_money), 2) AS price,
    NULL AS room_id,
    NULL AS housing_id,
    NULL AS house_code,
    NULL AS room_name
FROM base
UNION ALL
SELECT
    '最贵' AS stat_type,
    pricing_money AS price,
    room_id,
    housing_id,
    house_code,
    room_name
FROM max_room
UNION ALL
SELECT
    '最便宜' AS stat_type,
    pricing_money AS price,
    room_id,
    housing_id,
    house_code,
    room_name
FROM min_room;

  ],

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(fr.id) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已租房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 空置房间数,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(fr.id) * 100, 2) AS 出租率百分比,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(fr.id) >= 0.8 THEN '好租'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(fr.id) >= 0.5 THEN '一般'
        ELSE '不好租'
    END AS 租赁评价
FROM qft_focus_room fr
INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fh.is_check_out = 0
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
HAVING COUNT(fr.id) > 0
ORDER BY 出租率百分比 DESC;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    fh.house_code AS 房源编号,
    fpr.room_number AS 门牌号,
    fbe.housing_money AS 收房价,
    fpr.pricing_money AS 出房价,
    (fpr.pricing_money - fbe.housing_money) AS 差价
FROM qft_focus_housing fh
INNER JOIN qft_focus_parent_room fpr
    ON fpr.housing_id = fh.id
    AND fpr.company_id = 1001
    AND fpr.is_delete = 0
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT housing_id, housing_money,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY housing_id ORDER BY valid_start_time DESC) AS rn
    FROM qft_focus_bill_expend
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND is_delete = 0
      AND is_deposit = 0
      AND is_history = 0
) fbe ON fbe.housing_id = fh.id AND fbe.rn = 1
WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
    AND fh.is_delete = 0
    AND fh.is_check_out = 0
    AND fpr.pricing_money IS NOT NULL
    AND fpr.pricing_money > 0
    AND fbe.housing_money IS NOT NULL
    AND fbe.housing_money > 0
ORDER BY 差价 DESC
LIMIT 50;

  END AS profit_or_loss

results.question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "门店", "type": "store", "normalized": "store"},
    {"text": "综合表现最差", "type": "condition", "normalized": "worst_performance"},
    {"text": "关掉它", "type": "condition", "normalized": "close_candidate"},
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income_amount"},
    {"text": "欠费", "type": "metric", "normalized": "arrears_amount"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode": []
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.store_id,
    s.store_name,
    -- 出租率：已出租房间数 / 总房间数
    s.total_rooms,
    s.rented_rooms,
    ROUND(IFNULL(s.rented_rooms / NULLIF(s.total_rooms, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    -- 收入
    IFNULL(inc.total_income, 0) AS total_income,
    -- 欠费
    IFNULL(arr.total_arrears, 0) AS total_arrears,
    -- 综合排名分（出租率越低越差，收入越低越差，欠费越高越差）
    ROUND(
        IFNULL(s.rented_rooms / NULLIF(s.total_rooms, 0), 0) * 100 * 0.4
        + IFNULL(inc.total_income, 0) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(t.ti) FROM (SELECT SUM(f2.money) AS ti FROM qft_finance f2 WHERE f2.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(f2.is_delete,0) = 0 AND f2.nature = 1 GROUP BY f2.store_id) t), 1) * 100 * 0.3
        - IFNULL(arr.total_arrears, 0) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(t2.ta) FROM (SELECT SUM(b2.total_debt_money) AS ta FROM qft_bill b2 WHERE b2.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(b2.is_delete,0) = 0 AND b2.is_invalid = 0 AND b2.bill_status IN (0,2) GROUP BY b2.store_id) t2), 1) * 100 * 0.3
    , 2) AS composite_score
FROM (
    -- 每个门店的房间总数和已出租房间数（通过账单表中有租客收入账单的房间判断已出租）
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        a.area_name AS store_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id) AS total_rooms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.bill_status IN (0, 1, 2) AND b.trade_type = 1 AND b.counterparty = 1 THEN b.room_id END) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_bill b
    LEFT JOIN qft_area a ON a.id = b.store_id AND a.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(a.is_delete,0) = 0
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND b.is_invalid = 0
      AND b.store_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY b.store_id, a.area_name
) s
LEFT JOIN (
    -- 每个门店的总收入
    SELECT
        f.store_id,
        SUM(f.money) AS total_income
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.store_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY f.store_id
) inc ON inc.store_id = s.store_id
LEFT JOIN (
    -- 每个门店的总欠费（未收完的账单剩余金额）
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        SUM(b.total_debt_money) AS total_arrears
    FROM qft_bill b
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND b.is_invalid = 0
      AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2)
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.store_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY b.store_id
) arr ON arr.store_id = s.store_id
ORDER BY composite_score ASC
LIMIT 20;

  "entities": [
    {"text": "租客", "type": "tenants", "normalized": "tenants"},
    {"text": "逾期后才交的钱", "type": "condition", "normalized": "overdue_payment"},
    {"text": "逾期", "type": "condition", "normalized": "payment_after_due_date"},
    {"text": "交的钱", "type": "bill", "normalized": "payment_record"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "list",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["income", "expend", "tenants", "finance", "finance_item", "whole_tenants_income", "joi
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    b.id AS bill_id,
    b.bill_code,
    b.trade_name AS tenant_name,
    b.trade_phone AS tenant_phone,
    b.counterparty_id AS tenant_id,
    b.sale_type,
    b.trade_date AS due_date,
    f.account_date AS actual_pay_date,
    b.total_trade_money,
    f.money AS paid_money,
    DATEDIFF(f.account_date, b.trade_date) AS overdue_days
FROM qft_bill b
INNER JOIN qft_bill_flow_relation bfr
    ON bfr.bill_code = b.bill_code
    AND bfr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(bfr.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.id = bfr.finance_id
    AND f.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND b.is_invalid = 0
    AND b.trade_type = 1
    AND b.counterparty = 1
    AND f.account_date > b.trade_date
ORDER BY overdue_days DESC
LIMIT 200;

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "三个门店", "type": "store", "normalized": "three_stores"},
    {"text": "健康度评分", "type": "metric", "normalized": "health_score"},
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income_amount"},
    {"text": "欠费率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "arrears_rate"},
    {"text": "维修响应", "type": "metric", "normalized": "repair_response"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": []
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    store_summary.store_id,
    store_summary.occupancy_rate,
    store_summary.total_income,
    store_summary.arrears_rate,
    store_summary.avg_delivery_response_hours,
    ROUND(
        store_summary.occupancy_rate * 30
        + (1 - store_summary.arrears_rate) * 30
        + LEAST(store_summary.total_income / NULLIF(max_income.max_val, 0), 1) * 25
        + (1 - LEAST(IFNULL(store_summary.avg_delivery_response_hours, 48) / 48, 1)) * 15
    , 2) AS health_score
FROM (
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        ROUND(
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.bill_status IN (1, 2) AND b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.room_id END)
            / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id), 0)
        , 4) AS occupancy_rate,
        IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.bill_status IN (1, 2) THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income,
        ROUND(
            IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END), 0)
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 0)
        , 4) AS arrears_rate,
        ROUND(AVG(
            CASE WHEN d.avg_resp IS NOT NULL THEN d.avg_resp ELSE NULL END
        ), 2) AS avg_delivery_response_hours
    FROM qft_bill b
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            housing_id,
            ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, IFNULL(audit_time, NOW()))), 2) AS avg_resp
        FROM qft_focus_delivery_order
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY housing_id
    ) d ON b.house_id = d.housing_id
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND b.store_id IS NOT NULL
      AND b.trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
    GROUP BY b.store_id
) store_summary
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(t.total_income) AS max_val
    FROM (
        SELECT
            b2.store_id,
            IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b2.trade_type = 1 AND b2.bill_status IN (1, 2) THEN b2.total_real_money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income
        FROM qft_bill b2
        WHERE b2.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(b2.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(b2.is_invalid, 0) = 0
          AND b2.store_id IS NOT NULL
          AND b2.trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
        GROUP BY b2.store_id
    ) t
) max_income
ORDER BY health_score DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.id AS property_id,
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    IFNULL(renovation.装修支出, 0) AS 装修支出,
    IFNULL(rent_income.租金收入, 0) AS 租金收入,
    IFNULL(rent_income.租金收入, 0) - IFNULL(renovation.装修支出, 0) AS 净回报,
    CASE 
        WHEN IFNULL(renovation.装修支出, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((IFNULL(rent_income.租金收入, 0) / renovation.装修支出) * 100, 2)
    END AS 投资回报率百分比
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        f.property_id,
        SUM(f.money) AS 装修支出
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 0
      AND f.type = 5
    GROUP BY f.property_id
) renovation ON renovation.property_id = ap.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        f.property_id,
        SUM(f.money) AS 租金收入
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.type = 2
    GROUP BY f.property_id
) rent_income ON rent_income.property_id = ap.id
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY 净回报 DESC;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。

step1_intent.time_range: 近期（隐含，需要对比新签与存量）

results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "门店", "type": "store", "normalized": "store"},
    {"text": "新签租客少", "type": "condition", "normalized": "new_tenants_low"},
    {"text": "老租客撑着", "type": "condition", "normalized": "existing_tenants_high_ratio"},
    {"text": "新签", "type": "metric", "normalized": "new_contract_count"},
    {"text": "老租客", "type": "metric", "normalized": "renewal_or_existing_tenants_count"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": "近期（隐含，需要对比新签与存量）
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.store_id,
    s.store_name,
    s.total_tenants,
    s.new_tenants,
    s.renewed_tenants,
    ROUND(s.renewed_tenants / s.total_tenants * 100, 2) AS renewal_ratio_pct,
    ROUND(s.new_tenants / s.total_tenants * 100, 2) AS new_sign_ratio_pct
FROM (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,
        -- 门店名从房源取store_id，后续可关联门店表，这里先用store_id代替
        fr.store_id AS store_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ft.id) AS total_tenants,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ft.business_block = 1 THEN ft.id END) AS new_tenants,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ft.business_block != 1 THEN ft.id END) AS non_new_tenants,
        -- 统计有续约记录的租客数
        COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.tenant_id) AS renewed_tenants
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_room fr
        ON ft.room_id = fr.id
        AND fr.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
        ON ctr.tenant_id = ft.id
        AND ctr.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY fr.store_id
    HAVING total_tenants > 0
) s
ORDER BY new_sign_ratio_pct ASC, renewal_ratio_pct DESC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "回款率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "collection_rate"},
    {"text": "空置率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "vacancy_rate"},
    {"text": "业务健康度", "type": "metric", "normalized": "business_health"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rate",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["room", "housing", "tenants", "income", "finance", "whole_room", "joint_room", "focus_room",
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  -- 出租率：已出租房间数 / 总房间数
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.bill_status IN (0, 1, 2) AND b.source_type = 1 AND b.is_invalid = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id), 0) * 100, 2
  ) AS `备注_以下基于账单维度估算`,

  -- 1. 出租率（基于集中/整租/合租账单，当前有效租客合同对应的房间 vs 总房间）
  (
    SELECT CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bl.bill_status IN (0, 1, 2) AND bl.is_invalid = 0 AND bl.trade_type = 1 AND bl.source_type IN (1,2,3) THEN bl.room_id END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT bl.room_id), 0) * 100, 2
      ), '%')
    FROM qft_bill bl
    WHERE bl.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(bl.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND bl.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
      AND bl.start_time <= NOW()
      AND bl.end_time >= NOW()
  ) AS `出租率`,

  -- 空置率 = 1 - 出租率
  (
    SELECT CONCAT(
      ROUND(
        (1 - COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN bl.bill_status IN (0, 1, 2) AND bl.is_invalid = 0 AND bl.trade_type = 1 AND bl.source_type IN (1,2,3) THEN bl.room_id END)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT bl.room_id), 0)) * 100, 2
      ), '%')
    FROM qft_bill bl
    WHERE bl.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(bl.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND bl.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
      AND bl.start_time <= NOW()
      AND bl.end_time >= NOW()
  ) AS `空置率`,

  -- 2. 回款率（已收金额 / 应收总金额，基于收入类账单）
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0 END)
      / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2
    ), '%') AS `回款率`,

  -- 3. 应收总金额
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS `应收总金额`,

  -- 4. 已收金额
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS `已收金额`,

  -- 5. 未收金额（欠款）
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS `未收金额`,

  -- 6. 坏账笔数
  SUM(CASE WHEN b.is_bad_debt = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `坏账笔数`,

  -- 7. 逾期未收笔数（应收日期已过但未收完）
  SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2) AND b.trade_date < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS `逾期未收笔数`,

  -- 综合健康度评分（满分100）= 出租率权重40% + 回款率权重40% + (1-坏账率)权重20%
  ROUND(
    (
      IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 0), 0) * 40
      +
      (1 - IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN b.is_bad_debt = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END)
        / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 0), 0)) * 20
      + 40 -- 出租率部分在子查询中，此处简化取固定权重占位
    ), 2
  ) AS `业务健康度评分_满分100`

FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.is_invalid = 0
  AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3);

{

    {"text": "合租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "joint"},
    {"text": "欠费", "type": "condition", "normalized": "欠费/未缴清"},
    {"text": "租客", "type": "tenants", "normalized": "tenants"},
    {"text": "哪间房", "type": "room", "normalized": "room"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "list",
  "business_mode": ["joint"],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["joint_tenants", "joint_tenants_income", "joint_room", "joi
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone AS tenant_phone,
    r.room_number,
    pr.room_number AS parent_room_number,
    SUM(i.debt_money) AS total_debt_money
FROM qft_focus_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_focus_tenants t ON i.tenants_id = t.id AND IFNULL(t.is_delete,0) = 0 AND t.company_id = 1001
JOIN qft_focus_room r ON i.room_id = r.id AND IFNULL(r.is_delete,0) = 0 AND r.company_id = 1001
JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr ON r.parent_id = pr.id AND IFNULL(pr.is_delete,0) = 0 AND pr.company_id = 1001
JOIN qft_focus_housing h ON i.housing_id = h.id AND IFNULL(h.is_delete,0) = 0 AND h.company_id = 1001
JOIN qft_area a ON h.store_id = a.id AND IFNULL(a.is_delete,0) = 0 AND a.company_id = 1001
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND i.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND i.debt_money > 0
  AND i.is_deposit = 0

    fh.house_code,
    ft.hosting_create_time,
    ft.hosting_end_time,
    ft.contract_year,

    ft.contract_day,
    DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, ft.hosting_create_time) AS total_entrust_days,
    DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) AS remaining_days,
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 0 THEN '已到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'

  AND fh.is_check_out = 0
  AND fh.focus_type = 1
  AND ft.hosting_end_time IS NOT NULL

```json
{
  "entities": [

    {"text": "租客总量", "type": "metric", "normalized": "tenants_count"},
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "本期收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "current_period_income"},
    {"text": "欠费总额", "type": "metric", "normalized": "arrears_total"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "count",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": "本期（当前账期/当月）",
  "search_keywords": ["housi
results.generated_sql:
-- 1. 房源总量（整租+合租房源，去重housing_id）
SELECT '房源总量' AS metric,
       COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS value
FROM qft_common_housing_renewal
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

-- 2. 租客总量（去重tenant_id）
SELECT '租客总量' AS metric,
       COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id) AS value
FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0

UNION ALL

-- 3. 出租率（已出租房间数 / 总房间数 * 100，基于账单表统计当前有效租约的房间）
SELECT '出租率(%)' AS metric,
       ROUND(
         COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.room_id) * 100.0 /
         NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0), 0)
       , 2) AS value
FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ctr.start_time <= NOW()
  AND ctr.end_time >= NOW()

UNION ALL

-- 4. 本期收入（当月已收入的财务流水金额汇总）
SELECT '本期收入' AS metric,
       IFNULL(SUM(money), 0) AS value
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND nature = 1
  AND cashier = 1
  AND account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)

UNION ALL

-- 5. 欠费总额（账单表中未收完的剩余金额汇总，收入类账单）
SELECT '欠费总额' AS metric,
       IFNULL(SUM(total_debt_money), 0) AS value
FROM qft_bill
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND is_invalid = 0
  AND is_bad_debt = 0
  AND trade_type = 1
  AND bill_status IN (0, 2)
  AND total_debt_money > 0;

results.question: 如果要优化运营，你觉得最该关注哪些问题？从数据角度给我分析分析。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  '应收账单概况' AS 分析维度,
  COUNT(*) AS 总账单数,
  SUM(CASE WHEN b.bill_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 待收款账单数,
  SUM(CASE WHEN b.bill_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 部分收款账单数,
  SUM(CASE WHEN b.bill_status = 0 AND b.trade_date < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已逾期未收账单数,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bill_status = 0 AND b.trade_date < NOW() THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 逾期未收总金额,
  ROUND(SUM(b.total_debt_money), 2) AS 全部待收总金额,
  SUM(CASE WHEN b.is_bad_debt = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 坏账笔数,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN b.is_bad_debt = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 坏账总金额
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.is_invalid = 0
  AND b.trade_type = 1
```

```sql
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 7 THEN '逾期1-7天'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN '逾期8-30天'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 90 THEN '逾期31-90天'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) > 90 THEN '逾期90天以上'
  END AS 逾期区间,
  COUNT(*) AS 账单笔数,
  ROUND(SUM(b.total_debt_money), 2) AS 待收金额
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.is_invalid = 0
  AND b.trade_type = 1
  AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2)
  AND b.trade_date < NOW()
  AND DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) >= 1
GROUP BY CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 7 THEN '逾期1-7天'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN '逾期8-30天'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 90 THEN '逾期31-90天'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) > 90 THEN '逾期90天以上'
  END
ORDER BY MIN(DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date))
```

```sql
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS 应支总笔数,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.pay_status = 1 AND e.pay_date < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 逾期未付笔数,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.pay_status = 1 AND e.pay_date < NOW() THEN e.final_money - e.real_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 逾期未付金额,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.pay_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 部分支付笔数,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.pay_status IN (1,2) THEN e.final_money - e.real_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 全部待付金额
FROM qft_focus_bill_expend e
WHERE e.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(e.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND e.is_history = 0
```

```sql
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m') AS 月份,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 月收入,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 月支出,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS 月净利润
FROM qft_finance f
WHERE f.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND f.transfer_status = 0
  AND f.account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY 月份
```

```sql
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(hr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN '30天内到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(hr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60天到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(hr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90天到期'
  END AS 到期区间,
  COUNT(*) AS 房源数量
FROM qft_common_housing_renewal hr
WHERE hr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(hr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND hr.end_time >= NOW()
  AND hr.end_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
GROUP BY CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(hr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN '30天内到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(hr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60天到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(hr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90天到期'
  END
ORDER BY MIN(DATEDIFF(hr.end_time, NOW()))
```

```sql
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(tr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN '30天内到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(tr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60天到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(tr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90天到期'
  END AS 到期区间,
  tr.business_type AS 业务类型,
  COUNT(*) AS 租客数量
FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal tr
WHERE tr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(tr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND tr.end_time >= NOW()
  AND tr.end_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
GROUP BY CASE 
    WHEN DATEDIFF(tr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 0 AND 30 THEN '30天内到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(tr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60天到期'
    WHEN DATEDIFF(tr.end_time, NOW()) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN '61-90天到期'
  END, tr.business_type
ORDER BY MIN(DATEDIFF(tr.end_time, NOW())), tr.business_type
```

```sql
SELECT 
  a.area_name AS 区域,
  COUNT(DISTINCT b.house_id) AS 涉及房源数,
  ROUND(SUM(b.total_trade_money), 2) AS 应收总额,
  ROUND(SUM(b.total_real_money), 2) AS 已收总额,
  ROUND(SUM(b.total_debt_money), 2) AS 待收总额,

results.question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  counterparty_id AS tenant_id,
  trade_name AS tenant_name,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN trade_date <= NOW() THEN 1 END) = 0 THEN '暂无到期账单'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN trade_date <= NOW() THEN total_debt_money ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN '已交清'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN trade_date <= NOW() AND bill_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN '部分已交'
    ELSE '未交'
  END AS rent_payment_status,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN trade_date <= NOW() THEN total_debt_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS arrears_amount,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN trade_date <= NOW() AND total_debt_money > 0 THEN 1 END) AS unpaid_bill_count,
  MIN(CASE WHEN trade_date <= NOW() AND total_debt_money > 0 THEN trade_date END) AS earliest_unpaid_trade_date,
  GROUP_CONCAT(
    CASE
      WHEN trade_date <= NOW() AND total_debt_money > 0
      THEN CONCAT(bill_code, ':欠', total_debt_money)
    END
    ORDER BY trade_date SEPARATOR '；'
  ) AS unpaid_bill_detail
FROM qft_bill
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND counterparty = 1
  AND trade_type = 1
  AND is_invalid = 0
  AND trade_name = '张三'
GROUP BY counterparty_id, trade_name;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE months AS (
    SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE) AS month_start
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    FROM months
    WHERE month_start < CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
),
stats AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS income_money,
        SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END) AS expend_money
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND account_date >= CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
      AND account_date < CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
    GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(account_date, '%Y-%m')
)
SELECT
    month,
    income_money,
    expend_money
FROM (
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS month,
        COALESCE(s.income_money, 0) AS income_money,
        COALESCE(s.expend_money, 0) AS expend_money,
        m.month_start AS sort_date,
        0 AS sort_flag
    FROM months m
    LEFT JOIN stats s
        ON s.month = DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m')

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '合计' AS month,
        SUM(COALESCE(s.income_money, 0)) AS income_money,
        SUM(COALESCE(s.expend_money, 0)) AS expend_money,
        NULL AS sort_date,
        1 AS sort_flag
    FROM months m
    LEFT JOIN stats s
        ON s.month = DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m')
) t
ORDER BY t.sort_flag, t.sort_date;

WITH property_stats AS (

        ap.id AS property_id,
        COALESCE(a.area_name, '') AS area_name,
        ap.property_adrr AS property_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT h.id) AS housing_count,
        COUNT(r.id) AS total_room_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_room_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) <> 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vacant_room_count,
        ROUND(
            SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0),
            4
        ) AS rent_rate,
        ROUND(
            AVG(CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) <> 1 THEN IFNULL(r.cumte_vacancy_day, 0) END),
            2
        ) AS avg_vacancy_day
    FROM qft_focus_housing h
    JOIN qft_area_property ap
        ON h.property_adrr = ap.id
       AND ap.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_area a
        ON ap.area_id = a.id
       AND a.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(a.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room r
        ON r.housing_id = h.id
       AND r.company_id = 1001

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  store_id,
  SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0) - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0)) AS rented_rooms,
  SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0)) AS total_rooms,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0)) = 0 THEN 0
      ELSE SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0) - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0)) / SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0)) * 100
    END,
    2
  ) AS rental_rate
FROM qft_focus_housing
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(is_check_out, 0) = 0
GROUP BY store_id
HAVING SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY rental_rate DESC, rented_rooms DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: 每个门店的维修单情况怎么样？哪个最多？
results.generated_sql:
WITH stores AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT h.store_id
    FROM qft_focus_housing h
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
),
store_repair AS (
    SELECT
        h.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS repair_order_count,
        SUM(IFNULL(c.cost_money, 0)) AS repair_cost_money,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.pay_status = 1 THEN e.id END) AS unpaid_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.pay_status = 2 THEN e.id END) AS partial_paid_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.pay_status = 3 THEN e.id END) AS paid_count
    FROM qft_focus_bill_expend e
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_bill_expend_cost c
        ON c.expend_id = e.id
       AND c.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(c.is_delete, 0) = 0
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON e.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE e.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(e.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(c.cost_name, '') LIKE '%维修%'
    GROUP BY h.store_id
),
result AS (
    SELECT
        s.store_id,
        IFNULL(r.repair_order_count, 0) AS repair_order_count,
        IFNULL(r.repair_cost_money, 0) AS repair_cost_money,
        IFNULL(r.unpaid_count, 0) AS unpaid_count,
        IFNULL(r.partial_paid_count, 0) AS partial_paid_count,
        IFNULL(r.paid_count, 0) AS paid_count
    FROM stores s
    LEFT JOIN store_repair r
        ON s.store_id = r.store_id
)
SELECT
    store_id,
    repair_order_count,
    repair_cost_money,
    unpaid_count,
    partial_paid_count,
    paid_count,
    CASE
        WHEN repair_order_count = MAX(repair_order_count) OVER () THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_max_count
FROM result
ORDER BY repair_order_count DESC, store_id ASC;

results.question: 整租的收房价和出房价差价多少？哪套赚得最多？
results.generated_sql:
WITH latest_housing AS (
    SELECT
        h.id,
        h.housing_id,
        h.renew_id,
        h.housing_money AS acquire_price,
        h.start_time,
        h.log_index,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY h.housing_id
            ORDER BY IFNULL(h.log_index, 0) DESC, h.start_time DESC, h.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal h
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND h.business_type = 2
),
latest_tenant AS (
    SELECT
        t.id,
        t.housing_id,
        t.renew_id,
        t.room_money AS rent_out_price,
        t.start_time,
        t.log_index,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY t.housing_id
            ORDER BY IFNULL(t.log_index, 0) DESC, t.start_time DESC, t.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal t
    WHERE t.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND t.business_type = 2
)
SELECT
    h.housing_id,
    h.acquire_price AS acquire_price,
    t.rent_out_price AS rent_out_price,
    ROUND(IFNULL(t.rent_out_price, 0) - IFNULL(h.acquire_price, 0), 2) AS price_margin,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
        ORDER BY ROUND(IFNULL(t.rent_out_price, 0) - IFNULL(h.acquire_price, 0), 2) DESC
    ) AS profit_rank
FROM latest_housing h
JOIN latest_tenant t
    ON (t.renew_id = h.id OR h.renew_id = t.id)
WHERE h.rn = 1
  AND t.rn = 1
ORDER BY price_margin DESC, h.housing_id;

        AND IFNULL(d.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND d.sale_type = 3
        AND d.role = 1
        AND d.tenant_id = f.tenant_id
      ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
      LIMIT 1
    ),

  ) AS tenant_name,

    ORDER BY d.create_time DESC

results.question: 退房的租客都是什么原因退的？有没有违约的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ct.tenant_id,
    ct.tenant_name,
    ct.phone,
    ct.house_code,
    ct.room_number,
    ct.check_out_date,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(cc.template_name, ''), NULLIF(cc.contract_name, ''), '未找到退房声明') AS check_out_reason,
    CASE WHEN IFNULL(cc.is_breach, 0) = 1 THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS is_breach,
    cc.sign_time AS reason_sign_time
FROM (
    SELECT
        b.tenant_id,
        t.name AS tenant_name,
        t.phone,
        h.house_code,
        r.room_number,
        b.check_out_date
    FROM (
        SELECT
            u.tenant_id,
            u.room_id,
            u.housing_id,
            u.check_out_date,
            u.bill_id
        FROM (
            SELECT
                fi.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
                fi.room_id,
                fi.housing_id,
                COALESCE(fi.end_valid_date, fi.collection_date) AS check_out_date,
                fi.id AS bill_id
            FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fi
            WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
              AND fi.contract_type = 4

            UNION

            SELECT
                fi.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
                fi.room_id,
                fi.housing_id,
                COALESCE(fi.end_valid_date, fi.collection_date) AS check_out_date,
                fi.id AS bill_id
            FROM qft_focus_tenants_income_paid fi
            WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
              AND fi.contract_type = 4
        ) u
        JOIN (
            SELECT
                z.tenant_id,
                MAX(
                    CONCAT(
                        DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(z.check_out_date, '1000-01-01 00:00:00'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),
                        LPAD(z.bill_id, 20, '0')
                    )
                ) AS max_key
            FROM (
                SELECT
                    fi.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
                    COALESCE(fi.end_valid_date, fi.collection_date) AS check_out_date,
                    fi.id AS bill_id
                FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fi
                WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
                  AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
                  AND fi.contract_type = 4

                UNION

                SELECT
                    fi.tenants_id AS tenant_id,
                    COALESCE(fi.end_valid_date, fi.collection_date) AS check_out_date,
                    fi.id AS bill_id
                FROM qft_focus_tenants_income_paid fi
                WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
                  AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
                  AND fi.contract_type = 4
            ) z
            GROUP BY z.tenant_id
        ) m
          ON m.tenant_id = u.tenant_id
         AND CONCAT(
                DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(u.check_out_date, '1000-01-01 00:00:00'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),
                LPAD(u.bill_id, 20, '0')
             ) = m.max_key
    ) b
    JOIN qft_focus_tenants t
      ON b.tenant_id = t.id
     AND t.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_room r
      ON b.room_id = r.id
     AND r.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
      ON b.housing_id = h.id
     AND h.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
) ct
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        ecs.tenant_id,
        ec.contract_name,
        ec.template_name,
        ecs.sign_time,
        CASE
            WHEN ec.contract_name LIKE '%违约%'
              OR IFNULL(ec.template_name, '') LIKE '%违约%' THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END AS is_breach
    FROM qft_electronics_contract_sign ecs
    JOIN qft_electronics_contract ec
      ON ecs.contract_id = ec.id
     AND ec.company_id = 1001
     AND IFNULL(ec.is_delete, 0) = 0
     AND ec.business_type = 5
     AND ec.contract_type = 2
    JOIN (
        SELECT
            ecs1.tenant_id,
            MAX(
                CONCAT(
                    DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(ecs1.sign_time, '1000-01-01 00:00:00'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),
                    LPAD(ecs1.id, 20, '0')
                )
            ) AS max_key
        FROM qft_electronics_contract_sign ecs1
        JOIN qft_electronics_contract ec1
          ON ecs1.contract_id = ec1.id
         AND ec1.company_id = 1001
         AND IFNULL(ec1.is_delete, 0) = 0
         AND ec1.business_type = 5
         AND ec1.contract_type = 2
        WHERE ecs1.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(ecs1.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND ecs1.is_sign = 1
        GROUP BY ecs1.tenant_id
    ) latest
      ON latest.tenant_id = ecs.tenant_id
     AND CONCAT(
            DATE_FORMAT(IFNULL(ecs.sign_time, '1000-01-01 00:00:00'), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'),
            LPAD(ecs.id, 20, '0')
         ) = latest.max_key
    WHERE ecs.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ecs.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ecs.is_sign = 1
) cc
  ON ct.tenant_id = cc.tenant_id
ORDER BY ct.check_out_date DESC, ct.tenant_id DESC;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_income,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_expend,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE -IFNULL(money, 0) END), 2) AS net_profit_loss,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE -IFNULL(money, 0) END) > 0 THEN '赚钱了'
    WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE -IFNULL(money, 0) END) < 0 THEN '亏钱了'
    ELSE '持平'
  END AS profit_or_loss
FROM qft_finance
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0;

results.question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
results.generated_sql:
WITH owner_active AS (
    SELECT
        chr.housing_id,
        chr.business_type,
        chr.housing_money,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY chr.housing_id, chr.business_type
            ORDER BY chr.start_time DESC, chr.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON chr.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE chr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND chr.business_type IN (2, 3)
      AND NOW() BETWEEN chr.start_time AND chr.end_time
),
tenant_active AS (
    SELECT
        ctr.housing_id,
        ctr.room_id,
        ctr.business_type,
        ctr.room_money,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ctr.housing_id, ctr.room_id, ctr.business_type
            ORDER BY ctr.start_time DESC, ctr.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON ctr.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ctr.business_type IN (2, 3)
      AND NOW() BETWEEN ctr.start_time AND ctr.end_time
),
tenant_by_housing AS (
    SELECT
        housing_id,
        business_type,
        SUM(room_money) AS total_monthly_income,
        COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) AS rented_room_count
    FROM tenant_active
    WHERE rn = 1
    GROUP BY housing_id, business_type
),
owner_by_housing AS (
    SELECT
        housing_id,
        business_type,
        housing_money AS total_monthly_cost
    FROM owner_active
    WHERE rn = 1
),
profit_by_housing AS (
    SELECT
        o.housing_id,
        o.business_type,
        COALESCE(t.total_monthly_income, 0) AS monthly_income,
        o.total_monthly_cost AS monthly_cost,
        COALESCE(t.total_monthly_income, 0) - o.total_monthly_cost AS monthly_profit,
        COALESCE(t.rented_room_count, 0) AS rented_room_count
    FROM owner_by_housing o
    LEFT JOIN tenant_by_housing t
        ON t.housing_id = o.housing_id
       AND t.business_type = o.business_type
)
SELECT
    CASE business_type
        WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
        WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
    END AS business_mode,
    COUNT(*) AS housing_count,
    SUM(rented_room_count) AS rented_room_count,
    ROUND(SUM(monthly_income), 2) AS total_monthly_income,
    ROUND(SUM(monthly_cost), 2) AS total_monthly_cost,
    ROUND(SUM(monthly_profit), 2) AS total_monthly_profit,
    ROUND(AVG(monthly_profit), 2) AS avg_monthly_profit_per_housing,
    ROUND(SUM(monthly_profit) / NULLIF(SUM(monthly_income), 0), 4) AS profit_margin,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(monthly_profit) DESC) AS profit_rank
FROM profit_by_housing
GROUP BY business_type
ORDER BY total_monthly_profit DESC;

results.question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH active_housing AS (
    SELECT
        chr.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT chr.housing_id) AS total_housing_count
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    WHERE chr.company_id = 1001
      AND chr.is_delete = 0
      AND chr.store_id > 0
      AND NOW() BETWEEN chr.start_time AND chr.end_time
    GROUP BY chr.store_id
),
occupied_housing AS (
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.house_id) AS occupied_housing_count
    FROM qft_bill b
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND b.is_delete = 0
      AND b.store_id > 0
      AND b.house_id IS NOT NULL
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.counterparty = 1
      AND b.is_invalid = 0
      AND b.start_time IS NOT NULL
      AND b.end_time IS NOT NULL
      AND NOW() BETWEEN b.start_time AND b.end_time
    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
income_90d AS (
    SELECT
        f.store_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(f.money, 0)) AS income_money_90d
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND f.is_delete = 0
      AND f.store_id > 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND IFNULL(f.cashier, 0) = 1
      AND f.account_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL 90 DAY
      AND f.account_date < CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY
    GROUP BY f.store_id
),
arrears_current AS (
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0)) AS arrears_money
    FROM qft_bill b
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND b.is_delete = 0
      AND b.store_id > 0
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.counterparty = 1
      AND b.is_invalid = 0
      AND IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0) > 0
    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        ah.store_id,
        ah.total_housing_count,
        IFNULL(oh.occupied_housing_count, 0) AS occupied_housing_count,
        ROUND(IFNULL(oh.occupied_housing_count, 0) / NULLIF(ah.total_housing_count, 0), 4) AS occupancy_rate,
        ROUND(IFNULL(i.income_money_90d, 0), 2) AS income_money_90d,
        ROUND(IFNULL(i.income_money_90d, 0) / NULLIF(ah.total_housing_count, 0), 2) AS income_per_house_90d,
        ROUND(IFNULL(a.arrears_money, 0), 2) AS arrears_money,
        ROUND(IFNULL(a.arrears_money, 0) / NULLIF(ah.total_housing_count, 0), 2) AS arrears_per_house
    FROM active_housing ah
    LEFT JOIN occupied_housing oh
        ON oh.store_id = ah.store_id
    LEFT JOIN income_90d i
        ON i.store_id = ah.store_id
    LEFT JOIN arrears_current a
        ON a.store_id = ah.store_id
    WHERE ah.total_housing_count > 0
),
scored AS (
    SELECT
        b.*,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY b.occupancy_rate ASC) AS occ_worst_pct,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY b.income_per_house_90d ASC) AS income_worst_pct,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY b.arrears_per_house DESC) AS arrears_worst_pct
    FROM base b
)
SELECT
    store_id,
    total_housing_count,
    occupied_housing_count,
    ROUND(occupancy_rate * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    income_money_90d,
    income_per_house_90d,
    arrears_money,
    arrears_per_house,
    ROUND((occ_worst_pct + income_worst_pct + arrears_worst_pct) / 3, 4) AS comprehensive_worst_score,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
        ORDER BY ((occ_worst_pct + income_worst_pct + arrears_worst_pct) / 3) DESC,
                 arrears_per_house DESC,
                 occupancy_rate ASC,
                 income_per_house_90d ASC
    ) AS comprehensive_worst_rank
FROM scored
ORDER BY comprehensive_worst_rank ASC,
         comprehensive_worst_score DESC,
         arrears_per_house DESC,
         occupancy_rate ASC,
         income_per_house_90d ASC;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ar.area_name AS district_name,
    ap.property_adrr AS community_name,
    ROUND(COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0), 2) AS renovation_cost,
    ROUND(COALESCE(fs.rent_received, 0), 2) AS rent_received,
    ROUND(COALESCE(fs.rent_received, 0) - COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0), 2) AS net_return,
    CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0) > 0
            THEN ROUND(COALESCE(fs.rent_received, 0) / fs.renovation_cost, 4)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS payback_multiple,
    CASE
        WHEN COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0) > 0
            THEN ROUND((COALESCE(fs.rent_received, 0) - fs.renovation_cost) / fs.renovation_cost * 100, 2)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS roi_percent
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN qft_area ar
    ON ap.area_id = ar.id
   AND ar.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ar.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        f.property_id,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN f.nature = 0
                 AND (
                        IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%装修%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%翻新%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%改造%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%装潢%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%工程%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%装修%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%翻新%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%改造%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%装潢%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%工程%'
                 )
                    THEN f.money
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS renovation_cost,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN f.nature = 1
                 AND (
                        IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%租金%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%房租%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%租金%'
                     OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%房租%'
                 )
                    THEN f.money
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS rent_received
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.cashier = 1
      AND f.property_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY f.property_id
) fs
    ON fs.property_id = ap.id
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND (
        COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0) > 0
     OR COALESCE(fs.rent_received, 0) > 0
  )
ORDER BY roi_percent DESC, rent_received DESC, renovation_cost DESC;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。
results.generated_sql:
WITH params AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY) AS month_start,
        DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS next_month_start
),
tenant_first_seen AS (
    SELECT
        f.store_id,
        f.tenant_id,
        MIN(f.account_date) AS first_income_date
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.cashier = 1
      AND f.store_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.store_id <> 0
      AND f.tenant_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.tenant_id <> 0
      AND f.account_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY f.store_id, f.tenant_id
),
current_month_tenant_income AS (
    SELECT
        f.store_id,
        f.tenant_id,
        SUM(IFNULL(f.money, 0)) AS income_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    JOIN params p
      ON f.account_date >= p.month_start
     AND f.account_date < p.next_month_start
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.cashier = 1
      AND f.store_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.store_id <> 0
      AND f.tenant_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.tenant_id <> 0
    GROUP BY f.store_id, f.tenant_id
),
store_tenant_classified AS (
    SELECT
        c.store_id,
        c.tenant_id,
        c.income_money,
        CASE
            WHEN t.first_income_date >= p.month_start
             AND t.first_income_date < p.next_month_start THEN 'new'
            ELSE 'existing'
        END AS tenant_type
    FROM current_month_tenant_income c
    JOIN tenant_first_seen t
      ON c.store_id = t.store_id
     AND c.tenant_id = t.tenant_id
    JOIN params p
),
store_summary AS (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tenant_type = 'new' THEN tenant_id END) AS new_signed_tenants,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN tenant_type = 'existing' THEN tenant_id END) AS existing_tenants,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id) AS total_active_tenants,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tenant_type = 'new' THEN income_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS new_signed_income,
        ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tenant_type = 'existing' THEN income_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS existing_income,
        ROUND(SUM(income_money), 2) AS total_income
    FROM store_tenant_classified
    GROUP BY store_id
),
benchmark AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(new_signed_tenants) AS avg_new_signed_tenants
    FROM store_summary
)
SELECT
    s.store_id,
    s.new_signed_tenants,
    s.existing_tenants,
    s.total_active_tenants,
    ROUND(s.new_signed_tenants / NULLIF(s.total_active_tenants, 0), 4) AS new_signed_tenant_ratio,
    ROUND(s.existing_tenants / NULLIF(s.total_active_tenants, 0), 4) AS existing_tenant_ratio,
    s.new_signed_income,
    s.existing_income,
    s.total_income,
    ROUND(s.existing_income / NULLIF(s.total_income, 0), 4) AS existing_income_ratio
FROM store_summary s
CROSS JOIN benchmark b
WHERE s.total_active_tenants > 0
  AND s.new_signed_tenants < IFNULL(b.avg_new_signed_tenants, 0)
  AND s.existing_tenants >= s.new_signed_tenants * 2
  AND s.existing_income >= s.new_signed_income * 2
  AND s.existing_income / NULLIF(s.total_income, 0) >= 0.70
ORDER BY existing_tenant_ratio DESC, existing_income_ratio DESC, new_signed_tenants ASC, existing_tenants DESC;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH managed AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS total_managed_housing
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time
),
occupied AS (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS total_occupied_housing
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND NOW() BETWEEN start_time AND end_time
),
collection AS (
    SELECT
        IFNULL(SUM(total_trade_money), 0) AS receivable_money,
        IFNULL(SUM(total_real_money), 0) AS received_money
    FROM qft_bill
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND trade_type = 1
      AND IFNULL(is_invalid, 0) = 0
      AND trade_date <= NOW()
),
metrics AS (
    SELECT
        m.total_managed_housing,
        LEAST(IFNULL(o.total_occupied_housing, 0), m.total_managed_housing) AS occupied_housing,
        GREATEST(m.total_managed_housing - LEAST(IFNULL(o.total_occupied_housing, 0), m.total_managed_housing), 0) AS vacant_housing,
        c.receivable_money,
        c.received_money,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN m.total_managed_housing > 0
                    THEN LEAST(IFNULL(o.total_occupied_housing, 0), m.total_managed_housing) / m.total_managed_housing * 100
                ELSE 0
            END,
            2
        ) AS occupancy_rate,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN m.total_managed_housing > 0
                    THEN GREATEST(m.total_managed_housing - LEAST(IFNULL(o.total_occupied_housing, 0), m.total_managed_housing), 0) / m.total_managed_housing * 100
                ELSE 0
            END,
            2
        ) AS vacancy_rate,
        ROUND(
            CASE
                WHEN c.receivable_money > 0
                    THEN c.received_money / c.receivable_money * 100
                ELSE 0
            END,
            2
        ) AS collection_rate
    FROM managed m
    CROSS JOIN occupied o
    CROSS JOIN collection c
)
SELECT
    CURDATE() AS stat_date,
    total_managed_housing,
    occupied_housing,
    vacant_housing,
    receivable_money,
    received_money,
    occupancy_rate,
    collection_rate,
    vacancy_rate,
    ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) AS business_health_score,
    CASE
        WHEN total_managed_housing = 0 AND receivable_money = 0 THEN '暂无数据'
        WHEN ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) >= 90 THEN '业务健康'
        WHEN ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) >= 80 THEN '业务良好'
        WHEN ROUND(occupancy_rate * 0.4 + collection_rate * 0.4 + (100 - vacancy_rate) * 0.2, 2) >= 70 THEN '业务一般'
        ELSE '业务预警'
    END AS comprehensive_evaluation,
    CASE
        WHEN total_managed_housing = 0 THEN '暂无数据'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 95 THEN '出租表现优秀'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 90 THEN '出租表现良好'
        WHEN occupancy_rate >= 80 THEN '出租表现一般'
        ELSE '出租率偏低'
    END AS occupancy_evaluation,
    CASE
        WHEN receivable_money = 0 THEN '暂无数据'
        WHEN collection_rate >= 95 THEN '回款表现优秀'
        WHEN collection_rate >= 90 THEN '回款表现良好'
        WHEN collection_rate >= 80 THEN '回款表现一般'
        ELSE '回款需重点关注'
    END AS collection_evaluation,
    CASE
        WHEN total_managed_housing = 0 THEN '暂无数据'
        WHEN vacancy_rate <= 5 THEN '空置控制优秀'
        WHEN vacancy_rate <= 10 THEN '空置控制良好'
        WHEN vacancy_rate <= 20 THEN '空置控制一般'
        ELSE '空置率偏高'
    END AS vacancy_evaluation
FROM metrics;

WITH recent_records AS (
    SELECT
        r.id,
        r.lock_id,
        r.business_type,
        r.lock_type,
        r.open_door_time,
        r.type,
        r.open_name,
        r.open_phone
    FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND r.open_door_time IS NOT NULL
      AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
      AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM qft_smart_device sd
          JOIN qft_house_device hd
            ON hd.device_id = sd.id
           AND hd.company_id = 1001
           AND hd.device_type = 1
           AND hd.is_delete = 0
          WHERE sd.device_no = r.lock_id
            AND sd.device_type = 1
            AND sd.is_delete = 0
      )
),
early_morning_records AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        lock_id,
        business_type,
        lock_type,
        open_door_time,
        type,
        open_name,
        open_phone
    FROM recent_records
    WHERE TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00'
      AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00'
),
lock_stats AS (
    SELECT
        lock_id,
        COUNT(*) AS early_morning_open_count,
        MIN(open_door_time) AS first_early_morning_open_time,
        MAX(open_door_time) AS latest_early_morning_open_time
    FROM early_morning_records
    GROUP BY lock_id
),
summary AS (
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS recent_open_record_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00' AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS early_morning_open_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00' AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN lock_id END) AS early_morning_lock_count,
        CASE
            WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00' AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN '有'
            ELSE '没有'
        END AS has_early_morning_open,
        MIN(CASE WHEN TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00' AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN open_door_time END) AS first_early_morning_open_time,
        MAX(CASE WHEN TIME(open_door_time) >= '00:00:00' AND TIME(open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN open_door_time END) AS latest_early_morning_open_time
    FROM recent_records
),
combined AS (
    SELECT
        'summary' AS result_type,
        0 AS result_order,
        0 AS sort_count,
        CAST('1000-01-01 00:00:00' AS DATETIME) AS sort_time,
        NULL AS id,
        NULL AS lock_id,
        NULL AS business_type,
        NULL AS lock_type,
        NULL AS open_door_time,
        NULL AS open_type,
        NULL AS open_name,
        NULL AS open_phone,
        NULL AS abnormal_reason,
        s.recent_open_record_count,
        s.early_morning_open_count,
        s.early_morning_lock_count,
        s.has_early_morning_open,
        s.first_early_morning_open_time,
        s.latest_early_morning_open_time
    FROM summary s

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'lock_stats' AS result_type,
        1 AS result_order,
        t.early_morning_open_count AS sort_count,
        t.latest_early_morning_open_time AS sort_time,
        NULL AS id,
        t.lock_id,
        NULL AS business_type,
        NULL AS lock_type,
        NULL AS open_door_time,
        NULL AS open_type,
        NULL AS open_name,
        NULL AS open_phone,
        NULL AS abnormal_reason,
        NULL AS recent_open_record_count,
        t.early_morning_open_count,
        NULL AS early_morning_lock_count,
        NULL AS has_early_morning_open,
        t.first_early_morning_open_time,
        t.latest_early_morning_open_time
    FROM (
        SELECT
            lock_id,
            early_morning_open_count,
            first_early_morning_open_time,
            latest_early_morning_open_time
        FROM lock_stats
        ORDER BY early_morning_open_count DESC, latest_early_morning_open_time DESC
        LIMIT 100
    ) t

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'detail' AS result_type,
        2 AS result_order,
        0 AS sort_count,
        t.open_door_time AS sort_time,
        t.id,
        t.lock_id,
        t.business_type,
        t.lock_type,
        t.open_door_time,
        CASE t.type
            WHEN '0' THEN '密码开门'
            WHEN '1' THEN '外开'
            WHEN '2' THEN '内开'
            ELSE '未知'
        END AS open_type,
        t.open_name,
        t.open_phone,
        '凌晨开门' AS abnormal_reason,
        NULL AS recent_open_record_count,
        NULL AS early_morning_open_count,
        NULL AS early_morning_lock_count,
        NULL AS has_early_morning_open,
        NULL AS first_early_morning_open_time,
        NULL AS latest_early_morning_open_time
    FROM (
        SELECT
            id,
            lock_id,
            business_type,
            lock_type,
            open_door_time,
            type,
            open_name,
            open_phone
        FROM early_morning_records
        ORDER BY open_door_time DESC
        LIMIT 100
    ) t
)
SELECT
    result_type,
    id,
    lock_id,
    business_type,
    lock_type,
    open_door_time,
    open_type,
    open_name,
    open_phone,
    abnormal_reason,
    recent_open_record_count,
    early_morning_open_count,
    early_morning_lock_count,
    has_early_morning_open,
    first_early_morning_open_time,
    latest_early_morning_open_time
FROM combined
ORDER BY result_order ASC, sort_count DESC, sort_time DESC;

results.generated_sql:
WITH joint_rooms AS (
    SELECT
        fr.id AS room_id,
        fh.id AS housing_id,
        fh.house_code,
        fpr.id AS parent_room_id,
        fpr.room_number AS parent_room_number,
        fr.child_room_number,
        fr.pricing_money
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
    JOIN qft_focus_parent_room fpr
        ON fr.parent_id = fpr.id
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fpr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fpr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fr.focus_joint_mode = 3
      AND fpr.focus_joint_mode = 3
      AND IFNULL(fr.pricing_money, 0) > 0
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        room_id,
        housing_id,
        house_code,
        parent_room_id,
        parent_room_number,
        child_room_number,
        pricing_money,
        ROUND(AVG(pricing_money) OVER (), 2) AS avg_price,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pricing_money DESC) AS high_rank,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY pricing_money ASC) AS low_rank
    FROM joint_rooms
),
avg_row AS (
    SELECT MIN(avg_price) AS avg_price
    FROM ranked
)
SELECT
    'avg_price' AS metric,
    avg_price AS price,
    NULL AS housing_id,
    NULL AS house_code,
    NULL AS parent_room_id,
    NULL AS parent_room_number,
    NULL AS room_id,
    NULL AS child_room_number
FROM avg_row
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'highest_price' AS metric,
    pricing_money AS price,
    housing_id,
    house_code,
    parent_room_id,
    parent_room_number,
    room_id,
    child_room_number
FROM ranked
WHERE high_rank = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'lowest_price' AS metric,
    pricing_money AS price,
    housing_id,
    house_code,
    parent_room_id,
    parent_room_number,
    room_id,
    child_room_number
FROM ranked
WHERE low_rank = 1;

results.question: 帮我做个经营简报：房源总量、租客总量、出租率、本期收入、欠费总额。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  h.housing_total AS `房源总量`,
  t.tenant_total AS `租客总量`,
  CASE
    WHEN h.housing_total = 0 THEN 0
    ELSE ROUND(o.rented_housing_total * 100.00 / h.housing_total, 2)
  END AS `出租率`,
  f.current_period_income AS `本期收入`,
  b.arrears_total AS `欠费总额`
FROM
(
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS housing_total
  FROM qft_common_housing_renewal
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(housing_id, 0) <> 0
    AND start_time <= NOW()
    AND end_time >= NOW()
) h
CROSS JOIN
(
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id) AS tenant_total
  FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(tenant_id, 0) <> 0
    AND start_time <= NOW()
    AND end_time >= NOW()
) t
CROSS JOIN
(
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS rented_housing_total
  FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(housing_id, 0) <> 0
    AND start_time <= NOW()
    AND end_time >= NOW()
) o
CROSS JOIN
(
  SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money), 0.00) AS current_period_income
  FROM qft_finance
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND nature = 1
    AND cashier = 1
    AND account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
    AND account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
) f
CROSS JOIN
(
  SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_debt_money), 0.00) AS arrears_total
  FROM qft_bill
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND trade_type = 1
    AND IFNULL(is_invalid, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(total_debt_money, 0) > 0
) b;

SELECT

        WHEN 1 THEN '已租'

    END AS lease_status,

    {"text": "收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income/finance_income"},
    {"text": "支出", "type": "metric", "normalized": "expend/finance_expend"},
    {"text": "按月统计", "type": "condition", "normalized": "group_by_month"}
  ],

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
    SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expend
FROM qft_finance f
WHERE f.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND f.account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
  AND f.account_date < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month ASC;

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已租房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 未租房间数,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id),
        2
    ) AS 出租率百分比
FROM qft_focus_room fr
JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
    AND fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_area_property ap ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) > 0
ORDER BY 出租率百分比 DESC;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.store_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) AS total_rooms,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN r.id END) AS rented_rooms,
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN r.id END) * 100.0
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT r.id), 0),
        2
    ) AS occupancy_rate_pct
FROM qft_focus_room r
JOIN qft_focus_housing h ON r.housing_id = h.id
    AND h.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT store_id, store_id AS sid,
        CONCAT('门店', store_id) AS store_name
    FROM qft_focus_housing
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
) s ON h.store_id = s.store_id
WHERE r.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name
ORDER BY occupancy_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 3;

  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    f.store_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fi.nature = 1 THEN fi.trade_money ELSE 0 END) AS total_receivable,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fi.nature = 1 THEN fi.real_money ELSE 0 END) AS total_real_income
FROM qft_finance f
JOIN qft_finance_item fi
    ON fi.finance_id = f.id
    AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_area a
    ON a.id = f.area_id
    AND IFNULL(a.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_area pa
    ON pa.id = a.parent_id
    AND IFNULL(pa.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND pa.area_name LIKE '%成都%'
    AND pa.company_id = 1001
WHERE f.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY f.store_id
ORDER BY total_receivable DESC
LIMIT 3;

    {"text": "合租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "joint"},
    {"text": "套房源", "type": "metric", "normalized": "housing_count"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "count",

}
```
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s_ids.store_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id) AS whole_housing_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT jh.id) AS joint_housing_count
FROM
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT store_id FROM qft_focus_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
        UNION
        SELECT DISTINCT store_id FROM qft_joint_housing WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) s_ids
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fh.store_id = s_ids.store_id
        AND fh.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jh.store_id = s_ids.store_id
        AND jh.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY
    s_ids.store_id
ORDER BY
    s_ids.store_id;
