results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    h.housing_id,
    h.id AS housing_renewal_id,
    h.housing_money AS acquisition_price,
    t.room_money AS rental_price,
    (t.room_money - h.housing_money) AS price_diff
FROM qft_common_housing_renewal h
INNER JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal t
    ON t.housing_id = h.housing_id
    AND t.company_id = h.company_id
    AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE h.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND h.business_type = 2
    AND t.business_type = 2
    AND h.log_index = (
        SELECT MAX(h2.log_index)
        FROM qft_common_housing_renewal h2
        WHERE h2.housing_id = h.housing_id
            AND h2.company_id = 1001
            AND IFNULL(h2.is_delete, 0) = 0
            AND h2.business_type = 2
    )
    AND t.log_index = (
        SELECT MAX(t2.log_index)
        FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal t2
        WHERE t2.housing_id = t.housing_id
            AND t2.company_id = 1001
            AND IFNULL(t2.is_delete, 0) = 0
            AND t2.business_type = 2
    )
ORDER BY price_diff DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT
    jt.id AS tenant_id,
    jt.tenants_name,
    jt.phone,
    jr.room_number,
    jh.door_number,
    SUM(jti.debt_money) AS total_debt_money
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id
    AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income jti ON jti.tenants_id = jt.id
    AND jti.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jti.business_type = 3
    AND jti.debt_money > 0
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY
    jt.id,
    jt.tenants_name,
    jt.phone,
    jr.room_number,
    jh.door_number
HAVING total_debt_money > 0
ORDER BY total_debt_money DESC;

results.question: 装修花了多少钱？按小区统计一下。

    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    SUM(f.money) AS 装修费用合计

results.question: 退房的租客都是什么原因退的？有没有违约的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    t.id AS tenant_id,
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    t.phone AS tenant_phone,
    ti.lease_starttime,
    ti.lease_endtime,
    ti.tenant_note AS checkout_reason,
    CASE
        WHEN ti.tenant_note LIKE '%违约%' THEN '是'
        ELSE '否'
    END AS is_breach_of_contract
FROM qft_focus_tenants t
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info ti ON ti.tenant_id = t.id
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room r ON r.id = t.room_id AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing h ON h.id = r.housing_id AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE t.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND t.communicate_type IN (2, 3)

UNION ALL

SELECT
    jt.id AS tenant_id,
    jt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
    jt.phone AS tenant_phone,
    jt.lease_starttime,
    jt.lease_endtime,
    jt.tenant_note AS checkout_reason,
    CASE
        WHEN jt.tenant_note LIKE '%违约%' THEN '是'
        ELSE '否'
    END AS is_breach_of_contract
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND jt.communicate_type = 2

ORDER BY lease_endtime DESC;

results.question: 整租和合租对比一下，谁更赚钱？
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "整租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "whole"},
    {"text": "合租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "joint"},
    {"text": "更赚钱", "type": "metric", "normalized": "profit_comparison"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": ["whole", "joint"],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": [
    "whole_bill_expend",
    "joint_bill_expend",
    "whole_tenants",
    "joint_tenants",
    "joint_tenants_income",
    "whole_housing",
    "joint_housi
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    business_mode,
    COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS housing_count,
    ROUND(SUM(total_income), 2) AS total_income,
    ROUND(SUM(total_expend), 2) AS total_expend,
    ROUND(SUM(total_income) - SUM(total_expend), 2) AS net_profit,
    ROUND((SUM(total_income) - SUM(total_expend)) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id), 0), 2) AS avg_profit_per_housing
FROM (
    -- 整租收入（租客缴纳的租金）
    SELECT
        '整租' AS business_mode,
        f.housing_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
        SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expend
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.type = 2  -- 整租业务类型
    GROUP BY f.housing_id

    UNION ALL

    -- 合租收入（租客缴纳的租金）
    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_mode,
        f.housing_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
        SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expend
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.type = 3  -- 合租业务类型
    GROUP BY f.housing_id
) t
GROUP BY business_mode
ORDER BY net_profit DESC;

    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.counterparty = 1
      AND b.is_invalid = 0
      AND b.start_time <= NOW()
      AND b.end_time >= NOW()
      AND b.room_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
store_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        f.store_id,
        SUM(f.money) AS total_revenue
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND f.account_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
      AND f.store_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY f.store_id
),
store_overdue AS (
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        SUM(b.total_debt_money) AS total_overdue
    FROM qft_bill b
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.counterparty = 1
      AND b.is_invalid = 0
      AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2)
      AND b.trade_date < NOW()
      AND b.total_debt_money > 0
      AND b.store_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY b.store_id
),
all_stores AS (
    SELECT store_id FROM store_rooms WHERE store_id IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT store_id FROM store_rented WHERE store_id IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT store_id FROM store_revenue WHERE store_id IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT store_id FROM store_overdue WHERE store_id IS NOT NULL
),
store_base AS (
    SELECT
        s.store_id,
        COALESCE(tr.total_rooms, 0)   AS total_rooms,
        COALESCE(sr.rented_rooms, 0)  AS rented_rooms,
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(tr.total_rooms, 0) = 0 THEN 0
            ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(sr.rented_rooms, 0) * 100.0 / tr.total_rooms, 2)
        END                           AS occupancy_rate_pct,
        COALESCE(rev.total_revenue, 0) AS total_revenue,
        COALESCE(ov.total_overdue, 0)  AS total_overdue
    FROM all_stores s
    LEFT JOIN store_rooms   tr  ON s.store_id = tr.store_id
    LEFT JOIN store_rented  sr  ON s.store_id = sr.store_id
    LEFT JOIN store_revenue rev ON s.store_id = rev.store_id
    LEFT JOIN store_overdue ov  ON s.store_id = ov.store_id
),
store_ranked AS (
    SELECT
        sb.store_id,
        sb.total_rooms,
        sb.rented_rooms,
        sb.occupancy_rate_pct,
        sb.total_revenue,
        sb.total_overdue,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sb.occupancy_rate_pct ASC) AS rank_occupancy,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sb.total_revenue ASC)      AS rank_revenue,
        RANK() OVER (ORDER BY sb.total_overdue DESC)     AS rank_overdue
    FROM store_base sb
    WHERE sb.store_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    sr.store_id,
    sr.total_rooms                                                        AS 房间总数,
    sr.rented_rooms                                                       AS 在租房间数,
    CONCAT(sr.occupancy_rate_pct, '%')                                    AS 出租率,
    sr.total_revenue                                                      AS 近12月实收收入,
    sr.total_overdue                                                      AS 当前欠费金额,
    sr.rank_occupancy                                                     AS 出租率排名_越小越差,
    sr.rank_revenue                                                       AS 收入排名_越小越差,
    sr.rank_overdue                                                       AS 欠费排名_越小越差,
    (sr.rank_occupancy + sr.rank_revenue + sr.rank_overdue)               AS 综合差评分
FROM store_ranked sr
ORDER BY 综合差评分 DESC, sr.total_overdue DESC;

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "三个门店", "type": "store", "normalized": "store"},
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income"},
    {"text": "欠费率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "arrears_rate"},
    {"text": "维修响应", "type": "metric", "normalized": "repair_response"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": [
    "store",
    "whole_housing",
results.generated_sql:
WITH
/* ─── 1. 门店基础 ─── */
store_base AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT store_id
  FROM qft_finance
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND store_id IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY store_id
  LIMIT 3
),

/* ─── 2. 各门店房间总数 & 已出租房间数（出租率） ─── */
room_stats AS (
  SELECT
    f.store_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.room_id)                                        AS total_rooms,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
      WHEN r.end_time >= NOW() AND r.start_time <= NOW()
           AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      THEN r.room_id END)                                            AS rented_rooms
  FROM store_base sb
  JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.store_id = sb.store_id
   AND f.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
  JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal r
    ON r.housing_id = f.housing_id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
  GROUP BY f.store_id
),

/* ─── 3. 各门店近 30 天实收收入 ─── */
income_stats AS (
  SELECT
    f.store_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_income
  FROM store_base sb
  JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.store_id = sb.store_id
   AND f.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND f.account_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
  GROUP BY f.store_id
),

/* ─── 4. 各门店欠费率（欠费金额 / 应收金额） ─── */
arrears_stats AS (
  SELECT
    b.store_id,
    COALESCE(SUM(b.total_trade_money), 0)                            AS total_receivable,
    COALESCE(SUM(b.total_debt_money),  0)                            AS total_debt
  FROM store_base sb
  JOIN qft_bill b
    ON b.store_id = sb.store_id
   AND b.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND b.trade_type = 1          -- 收入类账单
   AND b.is_invalid  = 0
  GROUP BY b.store_id
),

/* ─── 5. 各门店维修工单响应情况（用财务记录中维修相关流水近 90 天） ─── */
repair_stats AS (
  SELECT
    f.store_id,
    COUNT(*)                                                          AS repair_total,
    /* 3 天内记账视为及时响应 */
    SUM(CASE
          WHEN f.account_date <= DATE_ADD(f.create_time, INTERVAL 3 DAY)
          THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END)                                                          AS repair_timely
  FROM store_base sb
  JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.store_id = sb.store_id
   AND f.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND f.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
   AND f.cause IN (
       SELECT id FROM qft_finance_item
       WHERE IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
         AND company_id = 1001
         AND bill_item_type IN (
             /* 维修相关账单明细类型，取 cause 字段关联 */
             SELECT DISTINCT cause FROM qft_finance
             WHERE company_id = 1001
               AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
               AND cause IS NOT NULL
               AND classify IN (
                   /* 维修费用种类 */
                   SELECT DISTINCT classify FROM qft_finance
                   WHERE company_id = 1001
                     AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
                     AND remark LIKE '%维修%'
                   LIMIT 50
               )
             LIMIT 50
         )
       LIMIT 50
   )
  GROUP BY f.store_id
),

/* ─── 5b. 简化维修响应：直接用 remark 含"维修"的财务记录 ─── */
repair_simple AS (
  SELECT
    f.store_id,
    COUNT(*)                                                          AS repair_total,
    SUM(CASE
          WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, f.create_time, f.account_date) <= 3
          THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END)                                                          AS repair_timely
  FROM store_base sb
  JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.store_id = sb.store_id
   AND f.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND f.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
   AND (f.remark LIKE '%维修%' OR f.finance_abstract LIKE '%维修%')
  GROUP BY f.store_id
),

/* ─── 6. 全局最大值（用于归一化） ─── */
global_max AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(i.total_income)  AS max_income,
    MAX(r.total_rooms)   AS max_rooms
  FROM income_stats i
  CROSS JOIN room_stats r
),

/* ─── 7. 各维度得分（满分 100） ─── */
score_calc AS (
  SELECT
    sb.store_id,

    /* 出租率得分（权重 35%） */
    ROUND(
      COALESCE(rs.rented_rooms / NULLIF(rs.total_rooms, 0), 0) * 100, 2
    )                                                                 AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    ROUND(
      COALESCE(rs.rented_rooms / NULLIF(rs.total_rooms, 0), 0) * 100 * 0.35, 2
    )                                                                 AS occupancy_score,

    /* 收入得分（权重 30%，按最大值归一化） */
    ROUND(
      COALESCE(ins.total_income / NULLIF(gm.max_income, 0), 0) * 100, 2
    )                                                                 AS income_index,
    ROUND(
      COALESCE(ins.total_income / NULLIF(gm.max_income, 0), 0) * 100 * 0.30, 2
    )                                                                 AS income_score,

    /* 欠费率得分（权重 20%，欠费率越低得分越高） */
    ROUND(
      (1 - COALESCE(ar.total_debt / NULLIF(ar.total_receivable, 0), 0)) * 100, 2
    )                                                                 AS non_arrears_rate_pct,
    ROUND(
      (1 - COALESCE(ar.total_debt / NULLIF(ar.total_receivable, 0), 0)) * 100 * 0.20, 2
    )                                                                 AS arrears_score,

    /* 维修响应得分（权重 15%，及时率越高得分越高） */
    ROUND(
      COALESCE(rp.repair_timely / NULLIF(rp.repair_total, 0), 0) * 100, 2
    )                                                                 AS repair_timely_rate_pct,
    ROUND(
      COALESCE(rp.repair_timely / NULLIF(rp.repair_total, 0), 0) * 100 * 0.15, 2
    )                                                                 AS repair_score,

    /* 原始数据 */
    COALESCE(rs.total_rooms,    0)                                    AS total_rooms,
    COALESCE(rs.rented_rooms,   0)                                    AS rented_rooms,
    COALESCE(ins.total_income,  0)                                    AS income_30d,
    COALESCE(ar.total_receivable, 0)                                  AS total_receivable,
    COALESCE(ar.total_debt,     0)                                    AS total_debt,
    COALESCE(rp.repair_total,   0)                                    AS repair_total,
    COALESCE(rp.repair_timely,  0)                                    AS repair_timely

  FROM store_base sb
  LEFT JOIN room_stats    rs  ON rs.store_id  = sb.store_id
  LEFT JOIN income_stats  ins ON ins.store_id = sb.store_id
  LEFT JOIN arrears_stats ar  ON ar.store_id  = sb.store_id
  LEFT JOIN repair_simple rp  ON rp.store_id  = sb.store_id
  CROSS JOIN global_max   gm
)

/* ─── 8. 最终输出 ─── */
SELECT
  store_id                                                            AS 门店ID,

  /* 综合健康度评分 */
  ROUND(occupancy_score + income_score + arrears_score + repair_score, 1)
                                                                      AS 综合健康度评分,

  /* 出租率维度 */
  CONCAT(occupancy_rate_pct, '%')                                     AS 出租率,
  occupancy_score                                                     AS 出租率得分_35权重,

  /* 收入维度 */
  income_30d                                                          AS 近30天收入,
  income_score                                                        AS 收入得分_30权重,

  /* 欠费率维度 */
  CONCAT(ROUND(100 - non_arrears_rate_pct, 2), '%')                  AS 欠费率,
  arrears_score                                                       AS 欠费得分_20权重,

  /* 维修响应维度 */
  CONCAT(repair_timely_rate_pct, '%')                                 AS 维修及时响应率,
  repair_score                                                        AS 维修得分_15权重,

  /* 明细数据 */
  total_rooms                                                         AS 总房间数,
  rented_rooms                                                        AS 已出租房间数,
  total_receivable                                                    AS 应收总额,
  total_debt                                                          AS 欠费总额,
  repair_total                                                        AS 维修工单数_近90天,
  repair_timely                                                       AS 及时响应工单数

FROM score_calc
ORDER BY 综合健康度评分 DESC;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "每个小区", "type": "location", "normalized": "area_property"},
    {"text": "投资回报", "type": "metric", "normalized": "ROI"},
    {"text": "装修花了多少", "type": "metric", "normalized": "renovation_cost"},
    {"text": "租金收回来多少", "type": "metric", "normalized": "rental_income"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": [
    "area_property",
    "renovation",
    "rm_renovation_record",
    "income",
    "joint_
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.property_adrr AS '小区名称',
    COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id) AS '房源数量',
    -- 装修支出：从财务记录中统计支出类装修费用
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS '总支出金额',
    -- 租金收入：从财务记录中统计收入
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS '总收入金额',
    -- 净收益
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) 
        - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS '净收益',
    -- 投资回报率（收入/支出）
    CASE 
        WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(
            COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) 
            / COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2
        )
    END AS '投资回报率(%)'
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
    ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
    AND fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.property_id = ap.id
    AND f.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id) > 0
ORDER BY '净收益' DESC;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。

step1_intent.time_range: 近期（建议近3-6个月与历史同期对比）

results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "门店", "type": "store", "normalized": "store"},
    {"text": "新签租客少", "type": "condition", "normalized": "new_tenants_count_low"},
    {"text": "老租客", "type": "condition", "normalized": "existing_tenants_renewal"},
    {"text": "吃老本", "type": "metric", "normalized": "low_new_high_retention_ratio"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": "近期（建议近3-6个月与历史同期对比）",
  "search_keywords": [
    "store",
    "tenants",
    "contract",
results.generated_sql:
WITH date_range AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS period_start,
        DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)                             AS period_end,
        DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS last_year_start,
        DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01')  AS last_year_end
),

-- 近6个月各门店新签租客数（business_block=1 表示新签）
new_tenants_current AS (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ft.id) AS new_tenant_cnt
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON ft.room_id = fr.id
        AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND fr.company_id = 1001
    CROSS JOIN date_range dr
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ft.business_block = 1
      AND ft.create_time >= dr.period_start
      AND ft.create_time <= dr.period_end
    GROUP BY fr.store_id
),

-- 去年同期各门店新签租客数（对比基准）
new_tenants_last_year AS (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ft.id) AS new_tenant_cnt_ly
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON ft.room_id = fr.id
        AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND fr.company_id = 1001
    CROSS JOIN date_range dr
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ft.business_block = 1
      AND ft.create_time >= dr.last_year_start
      AND ft.create_time < dr.last_year_end
    GROUP BY fr.store_id
),

-- 近6个月各门店续约租客数（有续约记录即为老租客续租）
renewal_tenants_current AS (
    SELECT
        fh.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.tenant_id) AS renewal_cnt
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON ctr.housing_id = fh.id
        AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND fh.company_id = 1001
    CROSS JOIN date_range dr
    WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ctr.create_time >= dr.period_start
      AND ctr.create_time <= dr.period_end
    GROUP BY fh.store_id
),

-- 近6个月各门店在租租客总数（当前活跃租客）
active_tenants AS (
    SELECT
        fr.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ft.id) AS active_cnt
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON ft.room_id = fr.id
        AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND fr.company_id = 1001
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY fr.store_id
),

-- 汇总各门店指标
store_summary AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(nc.store_id, rc.store_id, ac.store_id) AS store_id,
        COALESCE(nc.new_tenant_cnt, 0)                  AS new_cnt_current,
        COALESCE(ly.new_tenant_cnt_ly, 0)               AS new_cnt_last_year,
        COALESCE(rc.renewal_cnt, 0)                     AS renewal_cnt,
        COALESCE(ac.active_cnt, 0)                      AS active_cnt
    FROM new_tenants_current nc
    LEFT JOIN new_tenants_last_year ly ON nc.store_id = ly.store_id
    LEFT JOIN renewal_tenants_current rc ON nc.store_id = rc.store_id
    LEFT JOIN active_tenants ac ON nc.store_id = ac.store_id
)

SELECT
    ss.store_id,
    ss.new_cnt_current                                                          AS 近6月新签租客数,
    ss.new_cnt_last_year                                                        AS 去年同期新签数,
    ss.renewal_cnt                                                              AS 近6月续约租客数,
    ss.active_cnt                                                               AS 当前在租租客总数,
    -- 新签同比变化率
    CASE
        WHEN ss.new_cnt_last_year = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND((ss.new_cnt_current - ss.new_cnt_last_year) * 100.0 / ss.new_cnt_last_year, 2)
    END                                                                         AS 新签同比变化率_pct,
    -- 续约占比（续约数/活跃租客数）
    CASE
        WHEN ss.active_cnt = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(ss.renewal_cnt * 100.0 / ss.active_cnt, 2)
    END                                                                         AS 续约占活跃租客比_pct,
    -- 新签占比（新签数/活跃租客数）
    CASE
        WHEN ss.active_cnt = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(ss.new_cnt_current * 100.0 / ss.active_cnt, 2)
    END                                                                         AS 新签占活跃租客比_pct,
    -- 吃老本判断：新签同比下降 且 续约占比高于新签占比
    CASE
        WHEN (ss.new_cnt_last_year > 0
              AND ss.new_cnt_current < ss.new_cnt_last_year
              AND ss.renewal_cnt > ss.new_cnt_current)
            THEN '⚠️ 疑似吃老本'
        ELSE '正常'
    END                                                                         AS 吃老本风险判断
FROM store_summary ss
WHERE ss.active_cnt > 0
ORDER BY
    -- 优先展示风险门店，再按新签同比降幅排序
    CASE WHEN ss.new_cnt_last_year > 0 AND ss.new_cnt_current < ss.new_cnt_last_year AND ss.renewal_cnt > ss.new_cnt_current THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
    (ss.new_cnt_current - ss.new_cnt_last_year) ASC;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.step1_raw:
```json

-- 整体业务健康度综合评估：出租率、回款率、空置率
-- 基于当前时间点的数据快照

SELECT
    -- ==================== 房源规模 ====================
    housing_stats.total_housing                                    AS 总房源数,
    housing_stats.rented_housing                                   AS 已出租房源数,
    housing_stats.vacant_housing                                   AS 空置房源数,

    -- ==================== 出租率 ====================
    ROUND(housing_stats.rented_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2)  AS 出租率_百分比,

    -- ==================== 空置率 ====================
    ROUND(housing_stats.vacant_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2)  AS 空置率_百分比,

    -- ==================== 账单回款 ====================
    bill_stats.total_receivable                                    AS 应收总金额,
    bill_stats.total_received                                      AS 已收总金额,
    bill_stats.total_debt                                          AS 未收总金额,

    -- ==================== 回款率 ====================
    ROUND(bill_stats.total_received * 100.0 / NULLIF(bill_stats.total_receivable, 0), 2)      AS 回款率_百分比,

    -- ==================== 健康度综合评分（三项均值） ====================
    ROUND(
        (
            ROUND(housing_stats.rented_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2)
            +
            ROUND(bill_stats.total_received * 100.0 / NULLIF(bill_stats.total_receivable, 0), 2)
            +
            (100 - ROUND(housing_stats.vacant_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2))
        ) / 3.0
    , 2)                                                           AS 综合健康度评分,

    -- ==================== 健康度等级 ====================
    CASE
        WHEN ROUND(
            (
                ROUND(housing_stats.rented_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2)
                +
                ROUND(bill_stats.total_received * 100.0 / NULLIF(bill_stats.total_receivable, 0), 2)
                +
                (100 - ROUND(housing_stats.vacant_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2))
            ) / 3.0
        , 2) >= 90 THEN '优秀 ★★★★★'
        WHEN ROUND(
            (
                ROUND(housing_stats.rented_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2)
                +
                ROUND(bill_stats.total_received * 100.0 / NULLIF(bill_stats.total_receivable, 0), 2)
                +
                (100 - ROUND(housing_stats.vacant_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2))
            ) / 3.0
        , 2) >= 75 THEN '良好 ★★★★'
        WHEN ROUND(
            (
                ROUND(housing_stats.rented_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2)
                +
                ROUND(bill_stats.total_received * 100.0 / NULLIF(bill_stats.total_receivable, 0), 2)
                +
                (100 - ROUND(housing_stats.vacant_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2))
            ) / 3.0
        , 2) >= 60 THEN '一般 ★★★'
        WHEN ROUND(
            (
                ROUND(housing_stats.rented_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2)
                +
                ROUND(bill_stats.total_received * 100.0 / NULLIF(bill_stats.total_receivable, 0), 2)
                +
                (100 - ROUND(housing_stats.vacant_housing * 100.0 / NULLIF(housing_stats.total_housing, 0), 2))
            ) / 3.0
        , 2) >= 40 THEN '较差 ★★'
        ELSE '危险 ★'
    END                                                            AS 健康度等级,

    NOW()                                                          AS 统计时间

FROM
    -- ==================== 子查询1：房源出租/空置统计 ====================
    (
        SELECT
            COUNT(DISTINCT chr.housing_id)                         AS total_housing,
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                WHEN ctr.id IS NOT NULL
                 AND ctr.start_time <= NOW()
                 AND ctr.end_time   >= NOW()
                 AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
                THEN chr.housing_id
            END)                                                   AS rented_housing,
            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                WHEN ctr.id IS NULL
                  OR ctr.start_time > NOW()
                  OR ctr.end_time   < NOW()
                  OR IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 1
                THEN chr.housing_id
            END)                                                   AS vacant_housing
        FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
        LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
            ON  ctr.housing_id    = chr.housing_id
            AND ctr.company_id    = chr.company_id
            AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
            AND ctr.start_time   <= NOW()
            AND ctr.end_time     >= NOW()
        WHERE chr.company_id      = 1001
          AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND chr.start_time     <= NOW()
          AND chr.end_time       >= NOW()
    ) AS housing_stats,

    -- ==================== 子查询2：账单回款统计（近12个月应收账单） ====================
    (
        SELECT
            COALESCE(SUM(b.total_trade_money), 0)                  AS total_receivable,
            COALESCE(SUM(b.total_real_money),  0)                  AS total_received,
            COALESCE(SUM(b.total_debt_money),  0)                  AS total_debt
        FROM qft_bill b
        WHERE b.company_id        = 1001
          AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND b.is_invalid         = 0
          AND b.trade_type         = 1          -- 收入类账单
          AND b.counterparty       = 1          -- 交易对手为租客
          AND b.trade_date        >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
          AND b.trade_date        <= NOW()
    ) AS bill_stats;

  ],

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    jt.id AS tenant_id,
    jt.tenants_name,
    jt.phone,
    jr.room_number,
    jh.house_code,
    jh.door_number,
    SUM(jti.debt_money) AS total_debt_money
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id
    AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_tenants_income jti ON jti.tenants_id = jt.id
    AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jti.company_id = 1001
    AND jti.business_type = 3
    AND jti.pay_status IN (1, 2)
    AND jti.debt_money > 0
JOIN qft_store s ON s.id = jh.store_id
    AND s.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND s.name LIKE '%城东%'
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jh.company_id = 1001
GROUP BY jt.id, jt.tenants_name, jt.phone, jr.room_number, jh.house_code, jh.door_number
HAVING total_debt_money > 0
ORDER BY total_debt_money DESC;

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？

```
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    fh.id AS housing_id,
    fh.house_code AS 房源编号,
    ft.hosting_create_time AS 托管开始时间,
    ft.hosting_end_time AS 托管到期时间,
    ft.contract_year AS 合同期限年,
    ft.contract_month AS 合同期限月,
    ft.contract_day AS 合同期限日,
    CONCAT(
        IFNULL(ft.contract_year, 0), '年',
        IFNULL(ft.contract_month, 0), '月',
        IFNULL(ft.contract_day, 0), '天'
    ) AS 托管期限,
    DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) AS 距到期天数,
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) < 0 THEN '已到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 30 THEN '30天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 60 THEN '60天内到期'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(ft.hosting_end_time, NOW()) <= 90 THEN '90天内到期'
        ELSE '未到期'
    END AS 到期状态
FROM
    qft_focus_housing fh
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_trust ft ON fh.trust_id = ft.id
WHERE
    fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND fh.is_check_out = 0
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
        WHERE chr.housing_id = fh.id
          AND chr.company_id = 1001
          AND chr.business_type = 2
          AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    )
ORDER BY
    距到期天数 ASC;

results.question: 集中式和合租哪个更划算？从投入和收益两方面分析。

{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "集中式", "type": "condition", "normalized": "focus"},
    {"text": "合租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "joint"},
    {"text": "投入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "expend"},
    {"text": "收益", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": ["focus", "joint"],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": [
    "focus_bill_expend",
    "joint_bill_expend",

    "joint_tenants_income",
results.generated_sql:
-- 集中式 vs 合租：投入与收益对比分析
-- 投入：应支账单（房东租金支出）
-- 收益：应收账单（租客租金收入）

SELECT
    business_mode,
    -- 房源数量
    COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS housing_count,
    -- 房间数量
    COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) AS room_count,

    -- ===== 投入分析（应支给房东的费用）=====
    -- 应支账单总金额（收房成本）
    SUM(total_expend_money) AS total_expend_money,
    -- 实付金额
    SUM(total_real_pay_money) AS total_real_pay_money,
    -- 欠付金额
    SUM(total_arrear_money) AS total_arrear_money,
    -- 平均每套房源月均投入
    ROUND(SUM(total_expend_money) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id), 0), 2) AS avg_expend_per_housing,

    -- ===== 收益分析（租客缴纳的租金）=====
    -- 应收账单总金额
    SUM(total_income_money) AS total_income_money,
    -- 实收金额
    SUM(total_real_income_money) AS total_real_income_money,
    -- 欠收金额
    SUM(total_arrear_income_money) AS total_arrear_income_money,
    -- 平均每套房源月均收益
    ROUND(SUM(total_income_money) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id), 0), 2) AS avg_income_per_housing,

    -- ===== 利润分析 =====
    -- 毛利润（应收 - 应支）
    SUM(total_income_money) - SUM(total_expend_money) AS gross_profit,
    -- 实际利润（实收 - 实付）
    SUM(total_real_income_money) - SUM(total_real_pay_money) AS real_profit,
    -- 利润率（毛利润 / 应支投入）
    ROUND(
        (SUM(total_income_money) - SUM(total_expend_money))
        / NULLIF(SUM(total_expend_money), 0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS profit_rate_pct

FROM (

    -- ========== 集中式：投入（应支账单）==========
    SELECT
        '集中式' AS business_mode,
        fbe.housing_id,
        NULL AS room_id,
        fbe.pay_money AS total_expend_money,
        fbe.real_money AS total_real_pay_money,
        fbe.arrear_money AS total_arrear_money,
        0 AS total_income_money,
        0 AS total_real_income_money,
        0 AS total_arrear_income_money
    FROM qft_focus_bill_expend fbe
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fbe.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE fbe.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fbe.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fbe.is_deposit = 0          -- 排除押金账单
      AND fbe.is_history = 0          -- 只取最新账单

    UNION ALL

    -- ========== 集中式：收益（租客应收账单）==========
    SELECT
        '集中式' AS business_mode,
        fh.id AS housing_id,
        ctr.room_id,
        0 AS total_expend_money,
        0 AS total_real_pay_money,
        0 AS total_arrear_money,
        fi.trade_money AS total_income_money,
        fi.real_money AS total_real_income_money,
        (fi.trade_money - fi.real_money) AS total_arrear_income_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON f.housing_id = fh.id
    INNER JOIN qft_finance_item fi ON fi.finance_id = f.id
    LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
        ON ctr.housing_id = fh.id
        AND ctr.business_type = 1
        AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1                -- 收入
      AND f.type = 1                  -- 业务类型：集中整租
      AND fi.nature = 1

    UNION ALL

    -- ========== 合租：投入（应支账单，通过财务记录）==========
    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_mode,
        fh.id AS housing_id,
        NULL AS room_id,
        f.money AS total_expend_money,
        CASE WHEN f.cashier = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END AS total_real_pay_money,
        CASE WHEN f.cashier != 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END AS total_arrear_money,
        0 AS total_income_money,
        0 AS total_real_income_money,
        0 AS total_arrear_income_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON f.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 0                -- 支出
      AND f.type = 3                  -- 业务类型：合租

    UNION ALL

    -- ========== 合租：收益（租客应收账单）==========
    SELECT
        '合租' AS business_mode,
        fh.id AS housing_id,
        ctr.room_id,
        0 AS total_expend_money,
        0 AS total_real_pay_money,
        0 AS total_arrear_money,
        fi.trade_money AS total_income_money,
        fi.real_money AS total_real_income_money,
        (fi.trade_money - fi.real_money) AS total_arrear_income_money
    FROM qft_finance f
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON f.housing_id = fh.id
    INNER JOIN qft_finance_item fi ON fi.finance_id = f.id
    LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
        ON ctr.housing_id = fh.id
        AND ctr.business_type = 3
        AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1                -- 收入
      AND f.type = 3                  -- 业务类型：合租
      AND fi.nature = 1

) t
GROUP BY business_mode
ORDER BY profit_rate_pct DESC;

results.question: 门锁最近的开门记录有啥异常吗？有没有凌晨被打开的？

step1_intent.time_range: 最近一段时间，重点关注凌晨时段（00:00-06:00）

results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "门锁", "type": "device", "normalized": "smart_lock"},
    {"text": "开门记录", "type": "metric", "normalized": "lock_open_record"},
    {"text": "凌晨", "type": "time", "normalized": "00:00-06:00"},
    {"text": "最近", "type": "time", "normalized": "recent"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "list",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": "最近一段时间，重点关注凌晨时段（00:00-06:00）",
  "search_keywords": [
    "smart_lock",
    "lock",
    "house_device",
    "smart_device",
    "device"
  ]
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    r.id AS 记录ID,
    r.company_id,
    r.open_door_time AS 开门时间,
    HOUR(r.open_door_time) AS 开门小时,
    r.type AS 开门类型描述,
    CASE r.type
        WHEN '0' THEN '密码开门'
        WHEN '1' THEN '外开'
        WHEN '2' THEN '内开'
        ELSE r.type
    END AS 开门方式,
    r.lock_id AS 锁编号,
    r.lock_type AS 门锁品牌类型,
    CASE r.lock_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '柚石'
        WHEN 2 THEN '蛋呗'
        WHEN 3 THEN '果加'
        WHEN 4 THEN '丁盯'
        WHEN 7 THEN '榉树'
        ELSE CONCAT('类型', r.lock_type)
    END AS 门锁品牌,
    r.open_name AS 开门人姓名,
    r.open_phone AS 开门人电话,
    r.pwd_id AS 密码ID,
    r.business_type AS 业务类型,
    CASE r.business_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '集中整租'
        WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
        WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
        ELSE CONCAT('类型', r.business_type)
    END AS 业务类型描述,
    s.house_id AS 房源ID,
    s.room_id AS 房间ID,
    s.sale_type AS 统计业务类型,
    s.lock_status AS 锁状态,
    s.lock_power AS 门锁电量,
    CASE
        WHEN HOUR(r.open_door_time) >= 0 AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) < 6
        THEN '⚠️ 凌晨异常开门'
        ELSE '正常时段'
    END AS 异常标记
FROM
    qft_smart_lock_open_record r
LEFT JOIN
    qft_smart_lock_statistics s
    ON r.lock_id = s.lock_id
WHERE
    r.company_id = 1001
    AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN HOUR(r.open_door_time) >= 0 AND HOUR(r.open_door_time) < 6
        THEN 0
        ELSE 1
    END ASC,
    r.open_door_time DESC
LIMIT 200;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    b.user_id AS employee_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id) AS housing_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ft.id) AS tenant_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.id) AS tenant_renewal_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT chr.id) AS housing_renewal_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fdo.id) AS delivery_order_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fi.id) AS finance_count,
    (
        COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT ft.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT chr.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT fdo.id) +
        COUNT(DISTINCT fi.id)
    ) AS total_task_count
FROM qft_butler b
-- 负责的房源
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
    ON b.housing_id = fh.id
    AND fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
-- 房源下的租客
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room fr
    ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
    AND fr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
    ON ft.room_id = fr.id
    AND ft.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
-- 租客续约
LEFT JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    ON ctr.housing_id = fh.id
    AND ctr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
-- 房源续约
LEFT JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    ON chr.housing_id = fh.id
    AND chr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
-- 交割单
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_delivery_order fdo
    ON fdo.housing_id = fh.id
    AND fdo.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fdo.is_delete, 0) = 0
-- 财务记录
LEFT JOIN qft_finance fi
    ON fi.housing_id = fh.id
    AND fi.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
GROUP BY b.user_id
ORDER BY total_task_count DESC;

results.question: 合租每间房的均价是多少？哪间最贵哪间最便宜？
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "合租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "joint"},
    {"text": "每间房", "type": "room", "normalized": "joint_room"},
    {"text": "均价", "type": "metric", "normalized": "avg_price"},
    {"text": "最贵", "type": "metric", "normalized": "max_price"},
    {"text": "最便宜", "type": "metric", "normalized": "min_price"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode": ["joint"],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["joint_room", "joint_housing", "joint_tenants_i
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    t.room_id,
    t.room_number,
    t.housing_door_number,
    t.house_code,
    t.avg_price,
    t.max_price,
    t.min_price,
    t.tenant_count,
    CASE
        WHEN t.avg_price = overall.global_max THEN '最贵'
        WHEN t.avg_price = overall.global_min THEN '最便宜'
        ELSE ''
    END AS price_rank
FROM (
    SELECT
        jr.id AS room_id,
        jr.room_number,
        jh.door_number AS housing_door_number,
        jh.house_code,
        ROUND(AVG(jt.lease_price), 2) AS avg_price,
        MAX(jt.lease_price) AS max_price,
        MIN(jt.lease_price) AS min_price,
        COUNT(jt.id) AS tenant_count
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    JOIN qft_joint_housing jh
        ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
        AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND jh.company_id = 1001
    JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt
        ON jt.room_id = jr.id
        AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
        AND jt.company_id = 1001
        AND jt.lease_price IS NOT NULL
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
        AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY jr.id, jr.room_number, jh.door_number, jh.house_code
) t
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT
        MAX(sub.avg_price) AS global_max,
        MIN(sub.avg_price) AS global_min
    FROM (
        SELECT
            jr2.id,
            ROUND(AVG(jt2.lease_price), 2) AS avg_price
        FROM qft_joint_room jr2
        JOIN qft_joint_housing jh2
            ON jr2.housing_id = jh2.id
            AND IFNULL(jh2.is_delete, 0) = 0
            AND jh2.company_id = 1001
        JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt2
            ON jt2.room_id = jr2.id
            AND IFNULL(jt2.is_delete, 0) = 0
            AND jt2.company_id = 1001
            AND jt2.lease_price IS NOT NULL
        WHERE jr2.company_id = 1001
            AND IFNULL(jr2.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY jr2.id
    ) sub
) overall
ORDER BY t.avg_price DESC;

results.question: 如果要优化运营，你觉得最该关注哪些问题？从数据角度给我分析分析。
results.step1_raw:
```json

  "entities": [],

  ]
}
```
results.generated_sql:
-- 1. 逾期欠款分析（按逾期天数分层）
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 1  AND 7   THEN '逾期1-7天'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 8  AND 30  THEN '逾期8-30天'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 90  THEN '逾期31-90天'
        WHEN DATEDIFF(NOW(), b.trade_date) > 90               THEN '逾期90天以上'
        ELSE '未逾期'
    END AS overdue_level,
    b.sale_type,
    COUNT(*)                        AS bill_count,
    SUM(b.total_debt_money)         AS total_debt_money,
    AVG(b.total_debt_money)         AS avg_debt_money,
    SUM(b.total_trade_money)        AS total_should_money
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.is_invalid = 0
  AND b.bill_status IN (0, 2)
  AND b.trade_type = 1
  AND b.trade_date < NOW()
GROUP BY overdue_level, b.sale_type
ORDER BY total_debt_money DESC;

-- 2. 坏账分析（近12个月按业务类型和月份）
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(b.trade_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
    b.sale_type,
    COUNT(*)                           AS bad_debt_count,
    SUM(b.total_debt_money)            AS bad_debt_money,
    SUM(b.total_trade_money)           AS total_money,
    ROUND(SUM(b.total_debt_money) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(b.total_trade_money), 0), 2) AS bad_debt_rate_pct
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.is_bad_debt = 1
  AND b.trade_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(b.trade_date, '%Y-%m'), b.sale_type
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(b.trade_date, '%Y-%m') DESC, bad_debt_money DESC;

-- 3. 续约率分析（近12个月租客续约情况）
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(ctr.before_end_time, '%Y-%m') AS expire_month,
    ctr.business_type,
    COUNT(*)                                   AS total_expire,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ctr.log_index > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS renewed_count,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN ctr.log_index > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2
    ) AS renew_rate_pct
FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
  AND ctr.is_delete = 0
  AND ctr.before_end_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
  AND ctr.before_end_time <= NOW()
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(ctr.before_end_time, '%Y-%m'), ctr.business_type
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(ctr.before_end_time, '%Y-%m') DESC;

-- 4. 近6个月收支趋势分析
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
    SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS total_expend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END) AS net_profit,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN 1 END)             AS income_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN 1 END)             AS expend_count
FROM qft_finance f
WHERE f.company_id = 1001
  AND f.is_delete = 0
  AND f.account_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
  AND f.cashier = 1
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(f.account_date, '%Y-%m') DESC;

-- 5. 集中业务应支账单付款状态分析
SELECT
    fbe.pay_status,
    fbe.expend_type,
    COUNT(*)                    AS bill_count,
    SUM(fbe.pay_money)          AS total_pay_money,
    SUM(fbe.real_money)         AS total_real_money,
    SUM(fbe.arrear_money)       AS total_arrear_money,
    ROUND(AVG(DATEDIFF(NOW(), fbe.pay_date)), 1) AS avg_overdue_days
FROM qft_focus_bill_expend fbe
WHERE fbe.company_id = 1001
  AND fbe.is_delete = 0
  AND fbe.is_history = 0
  AND fbe.pay_date < NOW()
  AND fbe.pay_status IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY fbe.pay_status, fbe.expend_type
ORDER BY total_arrear_money DESC;

-- 6. 近6个月退房频次最高的房源 TOP 20
SELECT
    fbe.housing_id,
    COUNT(*)                    AS check_out_count,
    SUM(fbe.arrear_money)       AS total_arrear_on_checkout,
    MIN(fbe.valid_start_time)   AS earliest_contract,
    MAX(fbe.valid_end_time)     AS latest_contract
FROM qft_focus_bill_expend fbe
WHERE fbe.company_id = 1001
  AND fbe.is_delete = 0
  AND fbe.is_check_out = 1
  AND fbe.update_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
GROUP BY fbe.housing_id
ORDER BY check_out_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- 7. 水电代缴异常分析（近3个月）
SELECT
    bp.house_id,
    bp.room_id,
    bp.project,
    COUNT(*)            AS pay_count,
    SUM(bp.money)       AS total_money,
    MAX(bp.money)       AS max_single_money,
    MIN(bp.create_time) AS first_pay_time,
    MAX(bp.create_time) AS last_pay_time
FROM qft_behalf_pay bp
WHERE bp.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(bp.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND bp.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)
GROUP BY bp.house_id, bp.room_id, bp.project
HAVING MAX(bp.money) > 500
    OR COUNT(*) > 10
ORDER BY total_money DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- 8. 房源空置情况分析（有合同但已过期的房间）
SELECT
    chr.housing_id,
    chr.business_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.room_id)                                                        AS total_rented_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ctr.end_time < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                             AS expired_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN ctr.end_time >= NOW() AND ctr.start_time <= NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_rooms,
    ROUND(
        SUM(CASE WHEN ctr.end_time < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0
        / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT ctr.room_id), 0), 2
    ) AS vacancy_rate_pct
FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    ON ctr.housing_id = chr.housing_id
    AND ctr.business_type = chr.business_type
WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
  AND ctr.is_delete = 0
  AND chr.is_delete = 0
GROUP BY chr.housing_id, chr.business_type
ORDER BY vacancy_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  trade_name AS tenant_name,
  COUNT(*) AS bill_count,
  SUM(total_trade_money) AS should_pay_total,
  SUM(total_real_money) AS paid_total,
  SUM(total_debt_money) AS debt_total,
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(total_debt_money) = 0 THEN '已交清'
    WHEN SUM(total_real_money) = 0 THEN '未交'
    ELSE '部分已交'
  END AS rent_pay_status
FROM qft_bill
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND counterparty = 1
  AND trade_name LIKE '%张三%'
GROUP BY trade_name;

results.question: 智能门锁装了几个？有没有离线的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT hd.device_id) AS installed_lock_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sd.online_state = 2 THEN hd.device_id END) AS offline_lock_count,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sd.online_state = 2 THEN hd.device_id END) > 0 THEN '有'
    ELSE '没有'
  END AS has_offline
FROM qft_house_device hd
JOIN qft_smart_device sd ON hd.device_id = sd.id
WHERE hd.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(hd.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(sd.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND hd.device_type = 1
  AND sd.device_type = 1;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE months AS (
  SELECT DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY), INTERVAL 5 MONTH) AS month_start
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  FROM months
  WHERE month_start < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY)
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_SUB(account_date, INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(account_date) - 1 DAY) AS month_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS income_money,
    SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN IFNULL(money, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS expend_money
  FROM qft_finance
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY), INTERVAL 5 MONTH)
    AND account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(CURDATE()) - 1 DAY), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  GROUP BY DATE_SUB(account_date, INTERVAL DAYOFMONTH(account_date) - 1 DAY)
)
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  IFNULL(a.income_money, 0) AS income_money,
  IFNULL(a.expend_money, 0) AS expend_money
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN agg a ON m.month_start = a.month_start
ORDER BY m.month_start;

results.question: 三个门店哪个出租率最好？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  t.store_id,
  t.total_room_count,
  t.leased_room_count,
  t.occupancy_rate
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.store_id,
    s.total_room_count,
    s.leased_room_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * s.leased_room_count / NULLIF(s.total_room_count, 0), 2) AS occupancy_rate,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      ORDER BY s.leased_room_count / NULLIF(s.total_room_count, 0) DESC,
               s.total_room_count DESC,
               s.store_id ASC
    ) AS rn
  FROM (
    SELECT
      h.store_id,
      COUNT(*) AS total_room_count,
      SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(r.is_lease, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_room_count
    FROM qft_focus_room r
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h ON r.housing_id = h.id
    WHERE r.company_id = 1001
      AND h.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY h.store_id
  ) s
) t
WHERE t.rn <= 3
ORDER BY t.rn;

results.question: 每个门店的维修单情况怎么样？哪个最多？

SELECT

  t.repair_bill_count,
  t.repair_total_money,
  t.repair_real_money,

  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.repair_bill_count DESC, t.repair_total_money DESC, t.store_id) AS rank_num

results.step1_raw:
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "整租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "whole"},
    {"text": "收房价", "type": "metric", "normalized": "rent_in_price"},
    {"text": "出房价", "type": "metric", "normalized": "rent_out_price"},
    {"text": "差价", "type": "metric", "normalized": "price_difference"},
    {"text": "赚得最多", "type": "metric", "normalized": "max_profit"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode": ["whole"],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["whole_housing", "housing", "room",
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    t.housing_id,
    t.house_code,
    t.rent_in_price,
    t.rent_out_price,
    t.price_difference
FROM (
    SELECT
        fh.id AS housing_id,
        fh.house_code,
        chr.housing_money AS rent_in_price,
        ctr.room_money AS rent_out_price,
        (ctr.room_money - chr.housing_money) AS price_difference,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY fh.id
            ORDER BY (ctr.room_money - chr.housing_money) DESC, chr.create_time DESC, ctr.create_time DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    INNER JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
        ON ctr.renew_id = chr.id
       AND ctr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND ctr.business_type = 2
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fh.id = chr.housing_id
       AND fh.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE chr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND chr.business_type = 2
) t
WHERE t.rn = 1
ORDER BY t.price_difference DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  COALESCE(t.name, NULLIF(f.relate_name, ''), CONCAT('tenant_', IFNULL(f.tenant_id, 0))) AS charger_name,
  f.tenant_id,
  COUNT(*) AS recharge_count,
  SUM(COALESCE(f.money, 0)) AS total_recharge_money
FROM qft_finance f
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants t
  ON f.tenant_id = t.id
  AND t.company_id = 1001

  AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0

ORDER BY total_recharge_money DESC, recharge_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: 哪些合租租客有欠费？按欠费金额排个序。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    b.counterparty_id AS tenant_id,
    b.trade_name AS tenant_name,
    b.trade_phone AS tenant_phone,
    SUM(b.total_debt_money) AS arrears_amount
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND b.sale_type = 3
  AND b.trade_type = 1
  AND b.counterparty = 1
  AND b.is_invalid = 0
  AND b.counterparty_id IS NOT NULL
  AND b.counterparty_id <> 0
  AND b.total_debt_money > 0
GROUP BY b.counterparty_id, b.trade_name, b.trade_phone
HAVING SUM(b.total_debt_money) > 0
ORDER BY arrears_amount DESC, tenant_id;

  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 1 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN nature = 0 THEN money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS profit_or_loss_amount,
  CASE

results.generated_sql:
WITH biz AS (
  SELECT
    CASE sale_type
      WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
      WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
    END AS business_type,
    SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money ELSE 0 END) AS income_money,
    SUM(CASE WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN total_real_money ELSE 0 END) AS expend_money,
    SUM(CASE
          WHEN trade_type = 1 THEN total_real_money
          WHEN trade_type = 2 THEN -total_real_money
          ELSE 0
        END) AS profit_money
  FROM qft_bill
  WHERE company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND sale_type IN (2, 3)
  GROUP BY sale_type
),
winner AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN business_type = '整租' THEN profit_money END) IS NULL THEN '合租'
      WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN business_type = '合租' THEN profit_money END) IS NULL THEN '整租'
      WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN business_type = '整租' THEN profit_money END) > MAX(CASE WHEN business_type = '合租' THEN profit_money END) THEN '整租'
      WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN business_type = '整租' THEN profit_money END) < MAX(CASE WHEN business_type = '合租' THEN profit_money END) THEN '合租'
      ELSE '持平'
    END AS more_profitable
  FROM biz
)
SELECT
  b.business_type,
  ROUND(b.income_money, 2) AS income_money,
  ROUND(b.expend_money, 2) AS expend_money,
  ROUND(b.profit_money, 2) AS profit_money,
  w.more_profitable
FROM biz b
CROSS JOIN winner w
ORDER BY b.profit_money DESC;

results.question: 有没有租客是逾期后才交的钱？

SELECT
    f.tenant_id,
    MAX(f.relate_name) AS tenant_name,
    MAX(f.house_code) AS house_code,
    COUNT(1) AS overdue_pay_count,
    SUM(IFNULL(f.money, 0)) AS overdue_pay_total_money,
    MIN(f.receivable_time) AS earliest_receivable_time,
    MAX(f.account_date) AS latest_account_date
FROM qft_finance f
WHERE f.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND f.nature = 1
  AND f.source_type IN (2, 5)
  AND f.tenant_id IS NOT NULL
  AND f.receivable_time IS NOT NULL
  AND f.account_date IS NOT NULL
  AND f.account_date > f.receivable_time
GROUP BY f.tenant_id
ORDER BY overdue_pay_total_money DESC, overdue_pay_count DESC;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.generated_sql:
WITH finance_stat AS (
  SELECT
    f.property_id,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN f.nature = 0
         AND (
              IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%装修%'
           OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%改造%'
           OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%翻新%'
           OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%装修%'
           OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%改造%'
           OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%翻新%'
         )
        THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0)
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS renovation_cost,
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN f.nature = 1
         AND (
              f.source_type = 2
           OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%租金%'
           OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%房租%'
           OR IFNULL(f.finance_abstract, '') LIKE '%收租%'
           OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%租金%'
           OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%房租%'
           OR IFNULL(f.remark, '') LIKE '%收租%'
         )
        THEN IFNULL(f.money, 0)
        ELSE 0
      END
    ) AS rental_income
  FROM qft_finance f
  WHERE f.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
  GROUP BY f.property_id
)
SELECT
  ap.id AS `小区ID`,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ap.property_adrr, ''), CONCAT('未命名小区-', ap.id)) AS `小区`,
  a.area_name AS `所属区域`,
  ROUND(COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0), 2) AS `装修花费`,
  ROUND(COALESCE(fs.rental_income, 0), 2) AS `租金收入`,
  ROUND(COALESCE(fs.rental_income, 0) - COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0), 2) AS `净回报`,
  CASE
    WHEN COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(fs.rental_income, 0) / COALESCE(fs.renovation_cost, 0) * 100, 2)
  END AS `回报率(%)`
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN qft_area a
  ON a.id = ap.area_id
 AND a.company_id = 1001

results.question: 帮我统计一下，整租房源的托管期限都是多久？快到期的有哪些？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  分类,
  托管期限,
  房源数,
  housing_id,
  house_code,
  托管开始时间,
  托管到期时间,
  剩余天数
FROM (
  SELECT
    '托管期限统计' AS 分类,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(t.contract_year, 0), '年', IFNULL(t.contract_month, 0), '月', IFNULL(t.contract_day, 0), '天') AS 托管期限,
    COUNT(*) AS 房源数,
    NULL AS housing_id,
    NULL AS house_code,
    NULL AS 托管开始时间,
    NULL AS 托管到期时间,
    NULL AS 剩余天数,
    1 AS sort_no
  FROM qft_focus_housing h
  JOIN qft_focus_trust t ON h.trust_id = t.id
  JOIN qft_butler b ON b.housing_id = h.id AND b.businessType = 2
  WHERE h.company_id = 1001
    AND h.is_delete = 0
    AND b.company_id = 1001
  GROUP BY t.contract_year, t.contract_month, t.contract_day

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    '快到期房源' AS 分类,
    CONCAT(IFNULL(t.contract_year, 0), '年', IFNULL(t.contract_month, 0), '月', IFNULL(t.contract_day, 0), '天') AS 托管期限,
    NULL AS 房源数,
    h.id AS housing_id,
    h.house_code,
    t.hosting_create_time AS 托管开始时间,
    t.hosting_end_time AS 托管到期时间,
    DATEDIFF(t.hosting_end_time, NOW()) AS 剩余天数,
    2 AS sort_no
  FROM qft_focus_housing h
  JOIN qft_focus_trust t ON h.trust_id = t.id
  JOIN qft_butler b ON b.housing_id = h.id AND b.businessType = 2
  WHERE h.company_id = 1001
    AND h.is_delete = 0
    AND b.company_id = 1001
    AND t.hosting_end_time >= NOW()
    AND t.hosting_end_time < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
) x
ORDER BY sort_no, 托管期限, 托管到期时间;

results.question: 门锁最近的开门记录有啥异常吗？有没有凌晨被打开的？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  x.id,
  x.lock_id,
  x.house_id,
  x.room_id,
  x.open_door_time,
  x.open_name,
  x.open_phone,
  x.open_type,
  CASE
    WHEN TIME(x.open_door_time) < '06:00:00' THEN '凌晨开门'
    WHEN x.prev_open_door_time IS NOT NULL
         AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, x.prev_open_door_time, x.open_door_time) <= 10 THEN '短时间频繁开门'
    ELSE '正常'
  END AS anomaly_tag,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, x.prev_open_door_time, x.open_door_time) AS minutes_since_prev
FROM (
  SELECT
    r.id,
    r.lock_id,
    s.house_id,
    s.room_id,
    r.open_door_time,
    r.open_name,
    r.open_phone,
    CASE r.type
      WHEN '0' THEN '密码开门'
      WHEN '1' THEN '外开'
      WHEN '2' THEN '内开'
      ELSE r.type
    END AS open_type,
    LAG(r.open_door_time) OVER (PARTITION BY r.lock_id ORDER BY r.open_door_time) AS prev_open_door_time
  FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
  LEFT JOIN qft_smart_lock_statistics s
    ON r.lock_id = s.lock_id
   AND s.company_id = 1001
  WHERE r.company_id = 1001
    AND r.open_door_time IS NOT NULL
    AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
) x
WHERE TIME(x.open_door_time) < '06:00:00'
   OR (x.prev_open_door_time IS NOT NULL AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, x.prev_open_door_time, x.open_door_time) <= 10)
ORDER BY x.open_door_time DESC
LIMIT 200;

    housing_id,

    AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0

)
SELECT

  (SELECT room_id FROM room_data ORDER BY pricing_money DESC, room_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS max_room_id,
  (SELECT room_number FROM room_data ORDER BY pricing_money DESC, room_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS max_room_number,

  (SELECT housing_id FROM room_data ORDER BY pricing_money ASC, room_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS min_housing_id,
  (SELECT room_id FROM room_data ORDER BY pricing_money ASC, room_id ASC LIMIT 1) AS min_room_id,

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) AS 总房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 已租房间数,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 空置房间数,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) * 100, 2) AS 出租率,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) >= 0.8 THEN '好租'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) >= 0.5 THEN '一般'
        ELSE '不好租'
    END AS 租赁评价
FROM qft_focus_room fr
INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
INNER JOIN qft_area_property ap ON fh.property_adrr = ap.id
WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND fh.is_check_out = 0
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND ap.company_id = 1001
GROUP BY ap.id, ap.property_adrr
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT fr.id) > 0
ORDER BY 出租率 DESC;

results.step1_raw:

{

    {"text": "整租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "whole"},
    {"text": "收房价", "type": "metric", "normalized": "收房价/成本价"},
    {"text": "出房价", "type": "metric", "normalized": "出房价/租金"},
    {"text": "差价", "type": "metric", "normalized": "出房价减收房价"},

  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode": ["whole"],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["whole_housing", "whole_room", "housing", "room
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    fh.house_code AS 房源编号,
    pr.room_number AS 门牌号,
    be.housing_money AS 收房价,
    ctr.room_money AS 出房价,
    (ctr.room_money - be.housing_money) AS 差价
FROM qft_focus_housing fh
INNER JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr
    ON pr.housing_id = fh.id
    AND IFNULL(pr.is_delete, 0) = 0
INNER JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
    ON ft.room_id = pr.id
    AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND ft.company_id = 1001
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT housing_id, housing_money
    FROM (
        SELECT housing_id, housing_money, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY housing_id ORDER BY valid_start_time DESC) rn
        FROM qft_focus_bill_expend
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND is_deposit = 0
          AND is_history = 0
    ) sub
    WHERE rn = 1
) be ON be.housing_id = fh.id
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT tenant_id, room_money
    FROM (
        SELECT tenant_id, room_money, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY tenant_id ORDER BY start_time DESC) rn
        FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND business_type = 1
    ) sub2
    WHERE rn = 1
) ctr ON ctr.tenant_id = ft.id
WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_check_out, 0) = 0
ORDER BY 差价 DESC
LIMIT 50;

  jt.tenants_name,
  jt.phone,
  jh.door_number,
  jr.room_number,
  SUM(fti.debt_money) AS total_arrears
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jt.room_id = jr.id AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0

  AND fti.company_id = 1001

  AND fti.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND fti.contract_type != 4
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete, 0) = 0
GROUP BY jt.id, jt.tenants_name, jt.phone, jh.door_number, jr.room_number

SELECT

        WHEN 2 THEN '是(待退)'
        WHEN 3 THEN '延期退房'
        ELSE '未知'
    END AS communicate_type_desc,
    t.communicate_remark AS checkout_remark,
    fi.contract_type,
    CASE fi.contract_type
        WHEN 1 THEN '正常'
        WHEN 2 THEN '添加生成'

    END AS bill_type_desc,

    AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0

    {"text": "综合表现最差", "type": "condition", "normalized": "worst_performance"},
    {"text": "关掉", "type": "condition", "normalized": "close_consideration"},
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income_amount"},
    {"text": "欠费", "type": "metric", "normalized": "arrears_amount"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode":
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    b.store_id,
    -- 出租率：已收款账单数 / 总账单数（近似出租率）
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bill_status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS paid_bills,
    COUNT(*) AS total_bills,
    ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bill_status = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    -- 收入：应收总金额
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0 END) AS total_income,
    -- 欠费：剩余应收金额（未收回部分）
    SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END) AS total_arrears,
    -- 欠费率
    ROUND(
        CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END) > 0
             THEN SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END)
                  / SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_trade_money ELSE 0 END) * 100
             ELSE 0
        END, 2
    ) AS arrears_rate_pct,
    -- 综合得分：收入越低越差、欠费率越高越差、收款完成率越低越差
    -- 综合排名分 = 收入排名权重 + 欠费率权重 + 收款完成率权重（值越大表现越差）
    ROUND(
        - SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_real_money ELSE 0 END)
        + SUM(CASE WHEN b.trade_type = 1 THEN b.total_debt_money ELSE 0 END) * 2
        - COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bill_status = 1 THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 10000
    , 2) AS worse_score
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
  AND b.store_id IS NOT NULL
  AND b.store_id > 0
GROUP BY b.store_id
ORDER BY worse_score DESC
LIMIT 20;

    b.trade_name,

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "三个门店", "type": "store", "normalized": "three_stores"},
    {"text": "健康度评分", "type": "metric", "normalized": "health_score"},
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "收入", "type": "metric", "normalized": "income"},
    {"text": "欠费率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "arrears_rate"},
    {"text": "维修响应", "type": "metric", "normalized": "repair_response"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": [],
  "ti
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    store_id,
    ROUND(occupancy_rate * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    ROUND(total_income, 2) AS total_income,
    ROUND(arrears_rate * 100, 2) AS arrears_rate_pct,
    ROUND(avg_repair_response_hours, 2) AS avg_repair_response_hours,
    ROUND(
        occupancy_rate * 30
        + LEAST(total_income / 100000, 30)
        + (1 - arrears_rate) * 25
        + CASE WHEN avg_repair_response_hours <= 24 THEN 15
               WHEN avg_repair_response_hours <= 72 THEN 10
               WHEN avg_repair_response_hours <= 168 THEN 5
               ELSE 0 END
    , 2) AS health_score
FROM (
    SELECT
        b.store_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN b.bill_status IN (1,2) THEN b.room_id END)
            / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id), 0) AS occupancy_rate,
        IFNULL(inc.total_income, 0) AS total_income,
        IFNULL(SUM(b.total_debt_money) / NULLIF(SUM(b.total_trade_money), 0), 0) AS arrears_rate,
        IFNULL(rep.avg_repair_response_hours, 0) AS avg_repair_response_hours
    FROM qft_bill b
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_income
        FROM qft_finance
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND nature = 1
          AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
        GROUP BY store_id
    ) inc ON inc.store_id = b.store_id
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            f.store_id,
            AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, d.create_time, d.audit_time)) AS avg_repair_response_hours
        FROM qft_focus_delivery_order d
        JOIN qft_finance f ON f.housing_id = d.housing_id
            AND f.company_id = d.company_id
            AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
        WHERE d.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(d.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND d.audit_time IS NOT NULL
          AND d.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
        GROUP BY f.store_id
    ) rep ON rep.store_id = b.store_id
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND b.is_invalid = 0
      AND b.trade_type = 1
      AND b.trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
      AND b.store_id IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY b.store_id, inc.total_income, rep.avg_repair_response_hours
) t
ORDER BY health_score DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "每个小区", "type": "location", "normalized": "area_property"},
    {"text": "投资回报", "type": "metric", "normalized": "investment_return_rate"},
    {"text": "装修花了多少", "type": "metric", "normalized": "renovation_cost_sum"},
    {"text": "租金收回来多少", "type": "metric", "normalized": "rent_income_sum"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "compare",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["area_property", "renovation", "rm_renovation_record", "income", "wh
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    IFNULL(exp_data.装修支出, 0) AS 装修支出,
    IFNULL(inc_data.租金收入, 0) AS 租金收入,
    CASE 
        WHEN IFNULL(exp_data.装修支出, 0) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE ROUND(IFNULL(inc_data.租金收入, 0) / exp_data.装修支出 * 100, 2)
    END AS 投资回报率百分比
FROM qft_area_property ap
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT fh.property_adrr AS property_id
    FROM qft_focus_housing fh
    WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
) fh_list ON fh_list.property_id = ap.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        fh.property_adrr AS property_id,
        SUM(f.money) AS 装修支出
    FROM qft_finance f
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON f.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 0
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND f.type = 1
    GROUP BY fh.property_adrr
) exp_data ON exp_data.property_id = ap.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        fh.property_adrr AS property_id,
        SUM(f.money) AS 租金收入
    FROM qft_finance f
    INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON f.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.nature = 1
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND f.type = 1
    GROUP BY fh.property_adrr
) inc_data ON inc_data.property_id = ap.id
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY 投资回报率百分比 DESC;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。

step1_intent.time_range: 近期（隐含，需要对比新签与存量）

results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "门店", "type": "store", "normalized": "store"},
    {"text": "新签租客少", "type": "condition", "normalized": "new_tenants_low"},
    {"text": "老租客撑着", "type": "condition", "normalized": "existing_tenants_high_ratio"},
    {"text": "新签", "type": "metric", "normalized": "new_contract_count"},
    {"text": "老租客", "type": "metric", "normalized": "renewal_or_existing_tenants_count"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rank",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": "近期（隐含，需要对比新签与存量）
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.store_id,
    s.store_name,
    s.total_tenants,
    s.new_tenants,
    s.renewed_tenants,
    ROUND(s.renewed_tenants / s.total_tenants * 100, 2) AS renewal_ratio_pct,
    ROUND(s.new_tenants / s.total_tenants * 100, 2) AS new_sign_ratio_pct
FROM (
    SELECT
        ft_info.store_id,
        ft_info.store_name,
        ft_info.total_tenants,
        IFNULL(new_t.new_tenants, 0) AS new_tenants,
        ft_info.total_tenants - IFNULL(new_t.new_tenants, 0) AS renewed_tenants
    FROM (
        -- 每个门店当前在住租客总数（通过房间关联门店）
        SELECT
            r.store_id,
            MAX(r.store_name) AS store_name,
            COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS total_tenants
        FROM qft_focus_tenants t
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT id, store_id,
                   CAST(store_id AS CHAR) AS store_name
            FROM qft_focus_room
            WHERE company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
        ) r ON t.room_id = r.id
        WHERE t.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY r.store_id
    ) ft_info
    LEFT JOIN (
        -- 最近90天内新签的租客数（business_block=1 表示新签）
        SELECT
            r.store_id,
            COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS new_tenants
        FROM qft_focus_tenants t
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT id, store_id
            FROM qft_focus_room
            WHERE company_id = 1001
              AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
        ) r ON t.room_id = r.id
        WHERE t.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND t.business_block = 1
          AND t.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
        GROUP BY r.store_id
    ) new_t ON ft_info.store_id = new_t.store_id
) s
WHERE s.total_tenants > 0
ORDER BY new_sign_ratio_pct ASC, renewed_tenants DESC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。
results.step1_raw:
```json
{
  "entities": [
    {"text": "出租率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "occupancy_rate"},
    {"text": "回款率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "collection_rate"},
    {"text": "空置率", "type": "metric", "normalized": "vacancy_rate"},
    {"text": "业务健康度", "type": "metric", "normalized": "business_health"}
  ],
  "query_goal": "rate",
  "business_mode": [],
  "time_range": null,
  "search_keywords": ["room", "housing", "tenants", "income", "finance", "whole_room", "joint_room", "focus_room",
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  '业务健康度综合评估' AS report_name,
  -- 出租率相关
  total_rooms,
  rented_rooms,
  ROUND(rented_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
  -- 空置率相关
  vacant_rooms,
  ROUND(vacant_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2) AS vacancy_rate_pct,
  -- 回款率相关
  total_receivable_money,
  total_received_money,
  ROUND(total_received_money / NULLIF(total_receivable_money, 0) * 100, 2) AS collection_rate_pct,
  -- 综合健康度评分（出租率权重40% + 回款率权重40% + (100-空置率)权重20%）
  ROUND(
    ROUND(rented_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2) * 0.4
    + ROUND(total_received_money / NULLIF(total_receivable_money, 0) * 100, 2) * 0.4
    + (100 - ROUND(vacant_rooms / NULLIF(total_rooms, 0) * 100, 2)) * 0.2,
    2
  ) AS health_score
FROM (
  SELECT
    -- 房间总数与出租/空置统计（基于账单表中有租客收入账单的房间视为已出租）
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id)
     FROM qft_bill b
     WHERE b.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND b.is_invalid = 0
       AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
    ) AS total_rooms,

    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id)
     FROM qft_bill b
     WHERE b.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND b.is_invalid = 0
       AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
       AND b.trade_type = 1
       AND b.counterparty = 1
       AND b.source_type IN (1, 2, 3)
       AND b.end_time >= NOW()
       AND b.start_time <= NOW()
    ) AS rented_rooms,

    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id)
     FROM qft_bill b
     WHERE b.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND b.is_invalid = 0
       AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
    ) -
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.room_id)
     FROM qft_bill b
     WHERE b.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND b.is_invalid = 0
       AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
       AND b.trade_type = 1
       AND b.counterparty = 1
       AND b.source_type IN (1, 2, 3)
       AND b.end_time >= NOW()
       AND b.start_time <= NOW()
    ) AS vacant_rooms,

    -- 回款率：应收总额 vs 已收总额（近12个月租客应收账单）
    (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(b.total_trade_money), 0)
     FROM qft_bill b
     WHERE b.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND b.is_invalid = 0
       AND b.trade_type = 1
       AND b.counterparty = 1
       AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
       AND b.trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
       AND b.trade_date <= NOW()
    ) AS total_receivable_money,

    (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(b.total_real_money), 0)
     FROM qft_bill b
     WHERE b.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
       AND b.is_invalid = 0
       AND b.trade_type = 1
       AND b.counterparty = 1
       AND b.sale_type IN (1, 2, 3)
       AND b.trade_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
       AND b.trade_date <= NOW()
    ) AS total_received_money
) AS stats;

    {"text": "合租", "type": "condition", "normalized": "joint"},
    {"text": "欠费", "type": "condition", "normalized": "欠费/未缴清"},
