results.generated_sql:
WITH latest_renewal AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            r.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY r.housing_id
                ORDER BY r.log_index DESC, r.end_time DESC, r.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_common_housing_renewal r
        WHERE r.company_id = 1001
          AND r.is_delete = 0
          AND r.business_type = 2
    ) rr
    WHERE rr.rn = 1
),
base AS (
    SELECT
        h.id AS housing_id,
        h.house_code,
        h.building,
        h.unit_name,
        CASE
            WHEN lr.id IS NOT NULL THEN '房东续约'
            ELSE '初始托管'
        END AS trust_source,
        COALESCE(lr.start_time, t.hosting_create_time) AS hosting_start_time,
        COALESCE(lr.end_time, t.hosting_end_time) AS hosting_end_time,
        CASE
            WHEN lr.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(IFNULL(lr.contract_year, 0), '年', IFNULL(lr.contract_month, 0), '月', IFNULL(lr.contract_day, 0), '日')
            ELSE CONCAT(IFNULL(t.contract_year, 0), '年', IFNULL(t.contract_month, 0), '月', IFNULL(t.contract_day, 0), '日')
        END AS trust_term,
        DATEDIFF(DATE(COALESCE(lr.end_time, t.hosting_end_time)), CURDATE()) AS days_to_expire,
        CASE
            WHEN DATE(COALESCE(lr.end_time, t.hosting_end_time)) < CURDATE() THEN '已到期'
            WHEN DATE(COALESCE(lr.end_time, t.hosting_end_time)) <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN '30天内到期'
            ELSE '未到期'
        END AS expiry_status
    FROM qft_focus_housing h
    INNER JOIN qft_butler b
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND b.company_id = 1001
       AND b.businessType = 2
    LEFT JOIN qft_focus_trust t
        ON t.id = h.trust_id
       AND t.housing_id = h.id
    LEFT JOIN latest_renewal lr
        ON lr.housing_id = h.id
    WHERE h.company_id = 1001
      AND h.is_delete = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
      AND COALESCE(lr.end_time, t.hosting_end_time) IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT
        '托管期限统计' AS `结果类型`,
        base.trust_term AS `托管期限`,
        COUNT(*) AS `房源数`,
        NULL AS `房源ID`,
        NULL AS `房源编号`,
        NULL AS `座栋`,
        NULL AS `单元`,
        NULL AS `当前托管来源`,
        NULL AS `托管开始时间`,
        NULL AS `托管到期时间`,
        NULL AS `距离到期天数`,
        NULL AS `到期状态`
    FROM base
    GROUP BY base.trust_term

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        '30天内到期房源' AS `结果类型`,
        base.trust_term AS `托管期限`,
        NULL AS `房源数`,
        base.housing_id AS `房源ID`,
        base.house_code AS `房源编号`,
        base.building AS `座栋`,
        base.unit_name AS `单元`,
        base.trust_source AS `当前托管来源`,
        base.hosting_start_time AS `托管开始时间`,
        base.hosting_end_time AS `托管到期时间`,
        base.days_to_expire AS `距离到期天数`,
        base.expiry_status AS `到期状态`
    FROM base
    WHERE DATE(base.hosting_end_time) BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
) x
ORDER BY
    CASE WHEN x.`结果类型` = '托管期限统计' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
    CASE WHEN x.`结果类型` = '托管期限统计' THEN x.`房源数` END DESC,
    CASE WHEN x.`结果类型` = '托管期限统计' THEN x.`托管期限` END ASC,
    CASE WHEN x.`结果类型` = '30天内到期房源' THEN x.`托管到期时间` END ASC,
    CASE WHEN x.`结果类型` = '30天内到期房源' THEN x.`房源ID` END ASC;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.abnormal_result,
    s.recent_open_total,
    s.early_morning_open_cnt,
    s.early_morning_lock_cnt,
    s.frequent_open_abnormal_cnt,
    s.frequent_open_abnormal_lock_cnt,
    d.id,
    d.lock_id,
    d.lock_type,
    d.lock_type_name,
    d.business_type,
    d.business_type_name,
    d.open_door_time,
    d.open_type,
    d.pwd_id,
    d.open_name,
    d.open_phone,
    d.open_cnt_10m,
    d.abnormal_reason
FROM
(
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN x.is_early_morning = 1 OR x.open_cnt_10m >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) > 0 THEN '有异常'
            ELSE '未发现明显异常'
        END AS abnormal_result,
        COUNT(*) AS recent_open_total,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN x.is_early_morning = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS early_morning_open_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN x.is_early_morning = 1 THEN x.lock_id END) AS early_morning_lock_cnt,
        COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN x.open_cnt_10m >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS frequent_open_abnormal_cnt,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN x.open_cnt_10m >= 3 THEN x.lock_id END) AS frequent_open_abnormal_lock_cnt
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            r.id,
            r.lock_id,
            r.lock_type,
            r.business_type,
            r.open_door_time,
            r.`type`,
            r.pwd_id,
            r.open_name,
            r.open_phone,
            CASE WHEN HOUR(r.open_door_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_early_morning,
            (
                SELECT COUNT(1)
                FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r2
                WHERE r2.company_id = 1001
                  AND r2.lock_id = r.lock_id
                  AND r2.open_door_time IS NOT NULL
                  AND r2.open_door_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(r.open_door_time, INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND r.open_door_time
                  AND EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1
                      FROM qft_smart_device sd2
                      JOIN qft_house_device hd2
                        ON hd2.device_id = sd2.id
                       AND hd2.company_id = 1001
                       AND hd2.device_type = 1
                       AND hd2.is_delete = 0
                      WHERE sd2.device_no = r2.lock_id
                        AND sd2.device_type = 1
                        AND sd2.is_delete = 0
                  )
            ) AS open_cnt_10m
        FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
        WHERE r.company_id = 1001
          AND r.open_door_time IS NOT NULL
          AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
          AND EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM qft_smart_device sd
              JOIN qft_house_device hd
                ON hd.device_id = sd.id
               AND hd.company_id = 1001
               AND hd.device_type = 1
               AND hd.is_delete = 0
              WHERE sd.device_no = r.lock_id
                AND sd.device_type = 1
                AND sd.is_delete = 0
          )
    ) x
) s
LEFT JOIN
(
    SELECT
        x.id,
        x.lock_id,
        x.lock_type,
        CASE x.lock_type
            WHEN 1 THEN '柚石'
            WHEN 2 THEN '蛋呗'
            WHEN 3 THEN '果加'
            WHEN 4 THEN '丁盯'
            WHEN 7 THEN '榉树'
            ELSE '未知'
        END AS lock_type_name,
        x.business_type,
        CASE x.business_type
            WHEN 1 THEN '集中'
            WHEN 2 THEN '整租'
            WHEN 3 THEN '合租'
            ELSE '未知'
        END AS business_type_name,
        x.open_door_time,
        CASE x.`type`
            WHEN '0' THEN '密码开门'
            WHEN '1' THEN '外开'
            WHEN '2' THEN '内开'
            ELSE '未知'
        END AS open_type,
        x.pwd_id,
        x.open_name,
        x.open_phone,
        x.open_cnt_10m,
        CASE
            WHEN x.is_early_morning = 1 AND x.open_cnt_10m >= 3 THEN '凌晨开门,且10分钟内频繁开门'
            WHEN x.is_early_morning = 1 THEN '凌晨开门'
            WHEN x.open_cnt_10m >= 3 THEN '10分钟内频繁开门'
            ELSE NULL
        END AS abnormal_reason
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            r.id,
            r.lock_id,
            r.lock_type,
            r.business_type,
            r.open_door_time,
            r.`type`,
            r.pwd_id,
            r.open_name,
            r.open_phone,
            CASE WHEN HOUR(r.open_door_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_early_morning,
            (
                SELECT COUNT(1)
                FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r2
                WHERE r2.company_id = 1001
                  AND r2.lock_id = r.lock_id
                  AND r2.open_door_time IS NOT NULL
                  AND r2.open_door_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(r.open_door_time, INTERVAL 10 MINUTE) AND r.open_door_time
                  AND EXISTS (
                      SELECT 1
                      FROM qft_smart_device sd2
                      JOIN qft_house_device hd2
                        ON hd2.device_id = sd2.id
                       AND hd2.company_id = 1001
                       AND hd2.device_type = 1
                       AND hd2.is_delete = 0
                      WHERE sd2.device_no = r2.lock_id
                        AND sd2.device_type = 1
                        AND sd2.is_delete = 0
                  )
            ) AS open_cnt_10m
        FROM qft_smart_lock_open_record r
        WHERE r.company_id = 1001
          AND r.open_door_time IS NOT NULL
          AND r.open_door_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
          AND EXISTS (
              SELECT 1
              FROM qft_smart_device sd
              JOIN qft_house_device hd
                ON hd.device_id = sd.id
               AND hd.company_id = 1001
               AND hd.device_type = 1
               AND hd.is_delete = 0
              WHERE sd.device_no = r.lock_id
                AND sd.device_type = 1
                AND sd.is_delete = 0
          )
    ) x
    WHERE x.is_early_morning = 1
       OR x.open_cnt_10m >= 3
    ORDER BY x.open_door_time DESC
    LIMIT 200
) d
ON 1 = 1
ORDER BY d.open_door_time DESC;

WITH employee_list AS (

        b.user_id AS employee_id
    FROM qft_butler b
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
    GROUP BY b.user_id
),
task_union AS (
    SELECT
        b.user_id AS employee_id,
        CONCAT('housing_renewal_', chr.id) AS task_key
    FROM qft_butler b
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_common_housing_renewal chr
        ON chr.housing_id = h.id
       AND chr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        b.user_id AS employee_id,
        CONCAT('tenant_renewal_', ctr.id) AS task_key
    FROM qft_butler b
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
        ON ctr.housing_id = h.id
       AND ctr.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        b.user_id AS employee_id,
        CONCAT('finance_', f.id) AS task_key
    FROM qft_butler b
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_finance f
        ON f.housing_id = h.id
       AND f.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        b.user_id AS employee_id,
        CONCAT('delivery_order_', d.id) AS task_key
    FROM qft_butler b
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_delivery_order d
        ON d.housing_id = h.id
       AND d.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(d.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        b.user_id AS employee_id,
        CONCAT('earnest_', e.id) AS task_key
    FROM qft_butler b
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_room_earnest e
        ON e.housing_id = h.id
       AND e.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(e.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        b.user_id AS employee_id,
        CONCAT('bill_expend_', x.id) AS task_key
    FROM qft_butler b
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON b.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_bill_expend x
        ON x.housing_id = h.id
       AND x.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(x.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE b.company_id = 1001
),
task_count AS (
    SELECT
        tu.employee_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tu.task_key) AS handled_task_count
    FROM task_union tu
    GROUP BY tu.employee_id
)
SELECT
    el.employee_id,
    COALESCE(tc.handled_task_count, 0) AS handled_task_count,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (
        ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.handled_task_count, 0) DESC, el.employee_id
    ) AS busy_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.handled_task_count, 0) DESC, el.employee_id
        ) = 1 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_busiest
FROM employee_list el
LEFT JOIN task_count tc
    ON tc.employee_id = el.employee_id
ORDER BY handled_task_count DESC, employee_id;

results.question: 合租每间房的均价是多少？哪间最贵哪间最便宜？
results.generated_sql:
WITH room_prices AS (
    SELECT
        fr.id AS room_id,
        fh.house_code,
        fpr.room_number AS parent_room_number,
        fr.child_room_number,
        fr.pricing_money
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    JOIN qft_focus_parent_room fpr
        ON fr.parent_id = fpr.id
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh
        ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fpr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fpr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fr.focus_joint_mode = 3
      AND fr.pricing_money IS NOT NULL
      AND fr.pricing_money > 0
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        room_id,
        house_code,
        parent_room_number,
        child_room_number,
        pricing_money,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pricing_money DESC, room_id ASC) AS rn_desc,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pricing_money ASC, room_id ASC) AS rn_asc
    FROM room_prices
)
SELECT
    ROUND((SELECT AVG(pricing_money) FROM room_prices), 2) AS avg_price,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn_desc = 1 THEN CONCAT_WS('-', house_code, parent_room_number, child_room_number) END) AS most_expensive_room,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn_desc = 1 THEN pricing_money END) AS max_price,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn_asc = 1 THEN CONCAT_WS('-', house_code, parent_room_number, child_room_number) END) AS cheapest_room,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn_asc = 1 THEN pricing_money END) AS min_price
FROM ranked;

results.question: 如果把所有欠费都收回来，能多收多少钱？占总应收的比例是多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN total_debt_money > 0 THEN total_debt_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS unpaid_receivable_amount,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN total_trade_money > 0 THEN total_trade_money ELSE 0 END), 2) AS total_receivable_amount,
  CONCAT(
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN total_trade_money > 0 THEN total_trade_money ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN total_debt_money > 0 THEN total_debt_money ELSE 0 END)
             / SUM(CASE WHEN total_trade_money > 0 THEN total_trade_money ELSE 0 END) * 100
      END,
      2
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS unpaid_receivable_rate
FROM qft_bill
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND trade_type = 1
  AND counterparty = 1
  AND IFNULL(is_invalid, 0) = 0;

results.question: 帮我做个经营简报：房源总量、租客总量、出租率、本期收入、欠费总额。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  housing.housing_count AS housing_count,
  tenants.tenants_count AS tenants_count,
  CONCAT(
    IFNULL(
      ROUND(occupied.occupied_housing_count / NULLIF(housing.housing_count, 0) * 100, 2),
      0
    ),
    '%'
  ) AS occupancy_rate,
  income.current_period_income AS current_period_income,
  arrears.arrears_amount AS arrears_amount
FROM
  (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS housing_count
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND start_time <= NOW()
      AND end_time >= NOW()
  ) housing
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tenant_id) AS tenants_count
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND start_time <= NOW()
      AND end_time >= NOW()
      AND IFNULL(transfer_status, 0) <> 1
  ) tenants
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT housing_id) AS occupied_housing_count
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND start_time <= NOW()
      AND end_time >= NOW()
      AND IFNULL(transfer_status, 0) <> 1
  ) occupied
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT IFNULL(SUM(money), 0) AS current_period_income
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND nature = 1
      AND cashier = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
      AND account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
  ) income
CROSS JOIN
  (
    SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_debt_money), 0) AS arrears_amount
    FROM qft_bill
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND trade_type = 1
      AND is_invalid = 0
      AND total_debt_money > 0
  ) arrears;

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
WITH latest_renewal AS (
    SELECT tenant_id, room_id, room_money
    FROM (
        SELECT
            tr.tenant_id,
            tr.room_id,
            tr.room_money,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY tr.tenant_id, tr.room_id
                ORDER BY tr.log_index DESC, tr.create_time DESC, tr.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal tr
        WHERE tr.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(tr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    ) x
    WHERE x.rn = 1
),
latest_earnest AS (
    SELECT tenant_id, room_id, appoint_rent_money
    FROM (
        SELECT
            e.tenant_id,
            e.room_id,
            e.appoint_rent_money,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY e.tenant_id, e.room_id
                ORDER BY e.create_time DESC, e.id DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM qft_focus_room_earnest e
        WHERE e.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(e.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND e.earnest_status IN (2, 5)
    ) x
    WHERE x.rn = 1
)
SELECT
    t.name AS tenant_name,
    CASE
        WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(
            IFNULL(pr_by_child.room_number, ''),
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(pr_by_child.room_number, '') <> ''
                     AND IFNULL(NULLIF(r.child_room_number, ''), r.room_number) <> '' THEN '-'
                ELSE ''
            END,
            IFNULL(NULLIF(r.child_room_number, ''), r.room_number)
        )
        ELSE pr_direct.room_number
    END AS room_name,
    COALESCE(
        lr.room_money,
        le.appoint_rent_money,
        r.pricing_money,
        pr_by_child.pricing_money,
        pr_direct.pricing_money
    ) AS monthly_rent
FROM qft_focus_tenants t
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_room r
    ON t.room_id = r.id
   AND r.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr_by_child
    ON r.parent_id = pr_by_child.id
   AND pr_by_child.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(pr_by_child.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room pr_direct
    ON t.room_id = pr_direct.id
   AND pr_direct.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(pr_direct.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN latest_renewal lr
    ON lr.tenant_id = t.id
   AND lr.room_id = t.room_id
LEFT JOIN latest_earnest le
    ON le.tenant_id = t.id
   AND le.room_id = t.room_id
WHERE t.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(t.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND t.name = '张三'
ORDER BY t.id DESC;

results.question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    b.trade_name AS tenant_name,
    b.bill_code,
    b.start_time,
    b.end_time,
    b.trade_date,
    b.total_trade_money AS should_pay_amount,
    b.total_real_money AS paid_amount,
    b.total_debt_money AS arrears_amount,
    CASE b.bill_status
        WHEN 0 THEN '待收款'
        WHEN 1 THEN '已收款'
        WHEN 2 THEN '部分收款'
        ELSE '未知'
    END AS bill_status,
    SUM(IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0)) OVER () AS total_arrears_amount,
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(IFNULL(b.total_debt_money, 0)) OVER () = 0 THEN '已交清'
        WHEN SUM(IFNULL(b.total_real_money, 0)) OVER () = 0 THEN '未交'
        ELSE '部分已交'
    END AS overall_payment_status
FROM qft_bill b
WHERE b.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(b.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(b.is_invalid, 0) = 0
  AND b.counterparty = 1
  AND b.trade_type = 1
  AND b.trade_name = '张三'
ORDER BY b.trade_date DESC, b.bill_code DESC;

results.question: 近半年收入和支出各是多少？按月统计一下。
results.generated_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE months AS (
    SELECT CAST(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE) AS month_start
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
    FROM months
    WHERE month_start < CAST(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AS DATE)
)
SELECT
    DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m') AS stat_month,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income_amount,
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 0 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expend_amount
FROM months m
LEFT JOIN qft_finance f
    ON f.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
   AND f.account_date >= m.month_start
   AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(m.month_start, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(m.month_start, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY stat_month;

results.question: 哪个小区的房子好租？哪个不好租？
results.generated_sql:
WITH property_housing AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        f.property_id,
        f.housing_id
    FROM qft_finance f
    WHERE f.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(f.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND f.property_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.property_id > 0
      AND f.housing_id IS NOT NULL
      AND f.housing_id > 0
),
property_stats AS (
    SELECT
        ap.id AS property_id,
        a.area_name,
        ap.property_adrr,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ph.housing_id) AS housing_count,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(h.room_count, 0) > 0 THEN IFNULL(h.room_count, 0)
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS total_room_count,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(h.room_count, 0) > 0 THEN GREATEST(LEAST(IFNULL(h.room_count, 0) - IFNULL(h.rest_room_count, 0), IFNULL(h.room_count, 0)), 0)
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS rented_room_count,
        SUM(
            CASE
                WHEN IFNULL(h.room_count, 0) > 0 THEN GREATEST(LEAST(IFNULL(h.rest_room_count, 0), IFNULL(h.room_count, 0)), 0)
                ELSE 0
            END
        ) AS vacant_room_count
    FROM qft_area_property ap
    JOIN qft_area a
        ON ap.area_id = a.id
       AND a.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(a.is_delete, 0) = 0
    JOIN property_housing ph
        ON ph.property_id = ap.id
    JOIN qft_focus_housing h
        ON ph.housing_id = h.id
       AND h.company_id = 1001
       AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0
    WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND IFNULL(h.is_check_out, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY ap.id, a.area_name, ap.property_adrr
    HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN IFNULL(h.room_count, 0) > 0 THEN IFNULL(h.room_count, 0) ELSE 0 END) > 0
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        area_name,
        property_adrr,
        housing_count,
        total_room_count,
        rented_room_count,
        vacant_room_count,
        ROUND(rented_room_count / NULLIF(total_room_count, 0), 4) AS rent_rate,
        ROUND(vacant_room_count / NULLIF(total_room_count, 0), 4) AS vacancy_rate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY rented_room_count / NULLIF(total_room_count, 0) DESC, total_room_count DESC, housing_count DESC, property_adrr
        ) AS good_rank,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY rented_room_count / NULLIF(total_room_count, 0) ASC, total_room_count DESC, housing_count DESC, property_adrr
        ) AS bad_rank
    FROM property_stats
)
SELECT
    rent_level AS 租赁表现,
    area_name AS 区县,
    property_adrr AS 小区,
    housing_count AS 房源数,
    total_room_count AS 总房间数,
    rented_room_count AS 已出租房间数,
    vacant_room_count AS 空置房间数,
    rent_rate AS 出租率,
    vacancy_rate AS 空置率,
    rank_no AS 排名
FROM (
    SELECT
        1 AS sort_no,
        '好租' AS rent_level,
        area_name,
        property_adrr,
        housing_count,
        total_room_count,
        rented_room_count,
        vacant_room_count,
        rent_rate,
        vacancy_rate,
        good_rank AS rank_no
    FROM ranked
    WHERE good_rank <= 10

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        2 AS sort_no,
        '不好租' AS rent_level,
        area_name,
        property_adrr,
        housing_count,
        total_room_count,
        rented_room_count,
        vacant_room_count,
        rent_rate,
        vacancy_rate,
        bad_rank AS rank_no
    FROM ranked
    WHERE bad_rank <= 10
) t
ORDER BY sort_no, rank_no;

SELECT
  store_id,
  SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0)) AS total_rooms,
  SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0) - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0)) AS rented_rooms,
  ROUND(
    SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0) - IFNULL(rest_room_count, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0)), 0) * 100,
    2
  ) AS rental_rate
FROM qft_focus_housing
WHERE company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND IFNULL(is_check_out, 0) = 0
GROUP BY store_id
HAVING SUM(IFNULL(room_count, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY rental_rate DESC, rented_rooms DESC, store_id ASC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 整租的收房价和出房价差价多少？哪套赚得最多？
results.generated_sql:
WITH latest_in_price AS (
    SELECT
        chr.housing_id,
        chr.housing_money AS in_price,
        chr.start_time,
        chr.end_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY chr.housing_id
            ORDER BY chr.start_time DESC, chr.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_housing_renewal chr
    WHERE chr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(chr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND chr.business_type = 2
      AND chr.start_time <= NOW()
      AND chr.end_time >= NOW()
),
latest_out_price AS (
    SELECT
        ctr.housing_id,
        ctr.tenant_id,
        ctr.room_money AS out_price,
        ctr.start_time,
        ctr.end_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY ctr.housing_id
            ORDER BY ctr.start_time DESC, ctr.id DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM qft_common_tenant_renewal ctr
    WHERE ctr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(ctr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND ctr.business_type = 2
      AND ctr.start_time <= NOW()
      AND ctr.end_time >= NOW()
)
SELECT
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY (lop.out_price - lip.in_price) DESC) AS profit_rank,
    fh.id AS housing_id,
    fh.house_code,
    fpr.id AS parent_room_id,
    fpr.room_number,
    lip.in_price AS in_price,
    lop.out_price AS out_price,
    (lop.out_price - lip.in_price) AS price_diff
FROM qft_focus_housing fh
JOIN latest_in_price lip
    ON lip.housing_id = fh.id
   AND lip.rn = 1
JOIN latest_out_price lop
    ON lop.housing_id = fh.id
   AND lop.rn = 1
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft
    ON ft.id = lop.tenant_id
   AND ft.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete, 0) = 0
LEFT JOIN qft_focus_parent_room fpr
    ON fpr.id = ft.room_id
   AND fpr.housing_id = fh.id
   AND fpr.company_id = 1001
   AND IFNULL(fpr.is_delete, 0) = 0
WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
ORDER BY price_diff DESC, fh.id ASC;
